2. sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. dip in batter or in egg and crumbs
4. fry and drain

title: Fried Egg-Plant
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one egg-plant
- one egg
- one cup milk
- one-half cup flour
- pepper and salt
- lard for frying

## Directions

1. Slice the egg-plant about half an inch thick, peeling the slices
2. Lay them in salt and water for an hour, placing a plate on them to keep them down
3. Wipe each slice dry
4. Dip into batter made of egg, milk, flour, pepper and salt
5. Fry in boiling dripping
6. Drain off all the grease

title: Fried Frogs' Legs
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Frogs' legs, hind legs only
- Milk
- Pepper
- Salt
- Flour
- Deep boiling fat
- Egg
- Pounded cracker

## Directions

1. Skin, wash, and lay in milk for fifteen minutes
2. Without wiping them, pepper and salt, and coat with flour
3. Fry in deep boiling fat to a light brown
4. Or, wipe off the milk, dip in egg and pounded cracker, and fry

title: Fried Minced Meat
body:
## Ingredients

- cold meat
- bread crumbs
- 1 well-beaten egg
- hot fat

## Directions

1. Mince fine any pieces of cold meat
2. Add bread crumbs, enough for meal, and 1 well-beaten egg
3. Press together
4. Fry in slices in hot fat

title: Fried Oysters
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- fine large oysters
- cracker-dust
- pepper
- salt
- beaten egg
- butter

## Directions

1. Drain and wipe fine large oysters
2. Dip each first in cracker-dust (peppered and salted)
3. Then in beaten egg
4. And again in the cracker
5. Arrange upon a large cold platter
6. Set upon ice for half an hour
7. Fry in butter that has been gradually brought to a boil
8. Cook a few at a time
9. If the crumbs come off in the fat, strain them out before the next instalment goes in

title: Fried Oysters
body:
## Ingredients

- large oysters
- cracker crumbs or cornmeal
- hot butter

## Directions

1. Select the largest oysters for frying
2. Take them carefully from the liquor, lay them on a cloth and press another lightly upon them to absorb the moisture
3. Roll in cracker crumbs or cornmeal
4. Fry quickly to a light brown in hot butter
5. Serve at once in a warm dish

title: Fried Parsnips
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- parsnips
- salt
- hot water
- pepper
- flour
- dripping

## Directions

1. Boil tender in salted, hot water
2. Let them get cold
3. Scrape off the skin and slice lengthwise
4. Pepper and salt
5. Dredge with flour
6. Fry in hot dripping to a light brown
7. Drain and serve

title: Fried Parsnips
body:
## Ingredients

- parsnips
- salted water
- flour
- salt
- pepper
- hot butter
- eggs

## Directions

1. Treat parsnips in the usual manner
2. Cut in slices lengthwise about ½ inch thick
3. Boil in slightly salted water until tender
4. Remove from water
5. Dip in flour seasoned with salt and pepper
6. Lay in pan with some hot butter
7. Brown
8. Serve at once
9. May also be dipped in beaten egg

title: Fried Parsnips (Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- parsnips
- salted water

## Directions

1. Boil in salted water till tender
2. Drain and fry till brown
3. Serve very hot

title: Fried Parsnips (Second Method)
body:
## Ingredients

- parsnips
- butter
- fresh drippings
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Wash and scrape, splitting largest ones
2. Cut crosswise in ¼-inch slices
3. Have spider ready with butter or fresh drippings
4. Put parsnips in
5. Add salt and pepper to taste
6. Cover and fry slowly 25 or 30 minutes
7. Turn with cake turner or broad knife to prevent sticking

title: Fried Pickerel
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- pickerel
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- egg
- cracker-dust
- cottolene
- oil

## Directions

1. Clean, wipe dry, roll in salted and peppered flour, or dip in egg and roll in seasoned cracker-dust, and fry quickly in deep cottolene or oil brought slowly to the boil.

title: Fried Pork
body:
## Ingredients

- pork slices
- sugar
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Have the pan hot greased
2. Cut the slices less than a quarter of an inch thick, take off the rind, place on the pan
3. If fresh, add a little sugar, salt and pepper, will brown quicker and a nicer flavor
4. Have a fork and spoon; cook thoroughly, press down all white places with a spoon until they are brown
5. When nicely browned both sides, lay on a platter
6. With the spoon pour a little gravy over each piece, and serve

title: Fried Pork (Method 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- pork
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Slice in nice thin slices and put in a bread pan
2. Sprinkle with pepper and salt if fresh
3. Put in the oven, turn when half cooked, then cook till a nice brown

title: Fried Potato Balls And Straws
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- hot fat

## Directions

1. To make balls use a potato scoop; press it well into the potato before turning it.
2. To make straws cut the potato into slices lengthwise, and then into strips, making each one about one-eighth of an inch thick.
3. Slices or strips cut with a fluted knife are good forms for fried potatoes.
4. Fry the potatoes in hot fat, using a basket.
5. Fancy fried potatoes are used to garnish any broiled meat dish.

title: Fried Potatoes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- cold boiled potatoes
- butter
- flour
- raw potatoes
- hot fat
- salt

## Directions

1. Cold boiled potatoes are sliced, then put into a saute-pan with butter, and cooked until browned on both sides.
2. If rolled in flour they will form a crisp crust.
3. Raw potatoes are sliced or cut into any shape, and put into cold water for half an hour.
4. Dry them well on a napkin, and immerse in hot fat until done.
5. Too many must not be put in the basket at once, as it cools the fat.
6. Fry them to an amber color; then drain, and place them on a paper in the oven until all are done.
7. Serve them at once, as they lose their crispness if kept.

title: Fried Salmon
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can best salmon
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 6 soda biscuits rolled fine
- pepper and salt to taste
- butter for frying

## Directions

1. Work the mixture into rolls
2. Fry in butter

title: Fried Squashes
body:
## Ingredients

- squash
- salt
- 2 eggs
- butter

## Directions

1. Cut squash into thin slices
2. Sprinkle with salt
3. Let it stand a few minutes
4. Beat two eggs and dip squash into them
5. Fry brown in butter

title: Fried Sweet Peppers
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet peppers
- salt
- flour
- cottolene

## Directions

1. Cut open crosswise, extract the seeds, cut the peppers into slices
2. Lay in cold water for fifteen minutes
3. Salt slightly
4. Dust with flour
5. Fry in hot cottolene for five or six minutes

title: Fried Sweet Peppers
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet peppers
- cold water
- salt
- flour
- cottolene

## Directions

1. Cut open crosswise
2. Extract the seeds
3. Cut the peppers into slices
4. Lay in cold water for fifteen minutes
5. Salt slightly
6. Dust with flour
7. Fry in hot cottolene for five or six minutes

title: Fried Toast
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 cup water
- salt
- slice of bread
- butter

## Directions

1. Mix egg, sugar, water, and salt. Dip slice of bread in mixture. Fry in butter.

title: Fried Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- smooth, solid tomatoes
- pepper
- salt
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon boiling water
- crumbs

## Directions

1. Cut tomatoes into slices and drain well
2. Dust each with pepper and salt
3. Beat an egg in a saucer until light
4. Add to it a tablespoon of boiling water
5. Dip each slice first in this, then in crumbs
6. Fry brown on both sides
7. Take up carefully and serve very hot

title: Fried Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- pepper
- salt
- egg
- boiling water
- crumbs

## Directions

1. Cut tomatoes into slices and drain well
2. Dust each with pepper and salt
3. Beat an egg in a saucer until light, and add to it a tablespoon of boiling water
4. Dip each slice first in the egg mixture, then in crumbs
5. Fry brown on both sides
6. Take up carefully, and serve very hot

title: Fried Tomatoes (Plain)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- paprika
- salt
- sugar
- onion-juice
- fine corn-meal
- cottolene

## Directions

1. Wash and wipe, but do not peel, the tomatoes.
2. Slice, dust each piece with paprica, salt, and sugar, sprinkle with a few drops of onion-juice.
3. Dip in fine corn-meal, and fry in deep, hot cottolene, as you would fritters.
4. Serve dry with fish or with chops.

title: Fried Tomatoes in Batter
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe tomatoes
- flour
- milk
- egg

## Directions

1. Dip slices of ripe tomatoes into a batter made of flour, milk and an egg.
2. Fry them a delicate brown.

title: Fried Tomatoes with Toast
body:
## Ingredients

- large solid tomatoes
- egg
- rolled cracker crumbs
- butter
- pepper
- salt
- buttered toast

## Directions

1. Peel and cut in halves large solid tomatoes
2. Dip in egg, then in rolled cracker crumbs
3. Fry in butter with a dash of pepper and salt
4. Place on buttered toast

title: Fried Whitefish
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- flour
- dripping

## Directions

1. Scale and draw the fish
2. Wash in cold water
3. Cut off the head and fins
4. Split down both sides of the back
5. Cut the lengths into sections of the desired size
6. Roll in flour
7. Cook in plenty of very hot dripping
8. Do not let burn
9. It is done when well browned on both sides

title: Fried Whitefish
body:
## Ingredients

- Whitefish
- Flour
- Very hot dripping

## Directions

1. Scale and draw the fish
2. Wash in cold water, cut off the head and fins
3. Split down both sides of the back
4. Cut the lengths into sections of the desired size
5. Roll in flour, and cook in plenty of very hot dripping
6. Cook until well browned on both sides

title: Fritters
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon salt
- flour enough to make stiff batter

## Directions

1. Drop by spoonfuls into hot fat and fry
2. Serve hot with syrup

title: Frosting
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon lemon
- boiling milk

## Directions

1. Stir in enough boiling milk to make a soft dough

title: Frosting or Icing
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- white of one egg
- one small teacupful of powdered sugar

## Directions

1. In the first place, the eggs should be cold, and the platter on which they are to be beaten also cold.
2. Break the eggs and throw a small handful of the sugar on them as soon as you begin beating.
3. Keep adding sugar at intervals until it is all used up.
4. The eggs must not be beaten until the sugar has been added in this way, which gives a smooth, tender frosting, and one that will dry much sooner than the old way.
5. Spread with a broad knife evenly over the cake, and if it seems too thin, beat in a little more sugar.
6. Cover the cake with two coats, the second after the first has become dry, or nearly so.
7. If the icing gets too dry or stiff before the last coat is needed, it can be thinned sufficiently with a little water, enough to make it work smoothly.

title: Frozen Fig Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart sweet milk
- 4 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 teaspoons vanilla
- 1 pound English walnuts
- 1 pound figs

## Directions

1. Scald the milk
2. Beat eggs, add sugar
3. Pour hot milk into the eggs and cook until it coats the spoon
4. Add the other ingredients
5. Freeze

title: Frozen Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 large pt. milk
- 1/2 cupful flour, scant
- 2 cupfuls sugar
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls gelatine
- brandy
- 1 qt. cream
- 1 lb. preserved fruit
- 4 tablespoonfuls sherry wine

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in water two hours
2. Soak fruit in brandy
3. Cook milk, flour, eggs, gelatine and one cupful of sugar
4. When cool add cream, wine, and the other cup of sugar, and freeze
5. Then add fruit, and pack in bricks

title: Fruit Biscuits
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups brown sugar
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1/4 cup sour milk
- 1 cup stoned raisins
- 1 tablespoon cream
- 1/2 teaspoon soda
- 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 3 cups flour

## Directions

1. Combine 1 1/2 cups brown sugar, 1/4 cup butter, 1/4 cup sour milk, 1 cup stoned raisins, 1 tablespoon cream, 1/2 teaspoon soda, 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
2. Mix in 3 cups flour.
3. Roll 1/2 inch thick.

title: Fruit Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. sugar
- 1 lb. flour
- 0.75 lb. butter
- 1 cup molasses
- 10 eggs
- 2 lbs. seeded raisins
- 2 lbs. currants
- 1 lb. citron
- 0.5 lb. almonds
- 0.5 oz. mace
- 0.5 teaspoonful rose water
- 1 nutmeg
- 1 tablespoonful each cloves and cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat sugar and butter together
2. Scorch the flour
3. Mix all together
4. Cook till done
5. Try with a straw

title: Fruit Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. melted butter
- 1/2 lb. brown sugar or white sugar
- 3/4 cup scalding milk
- 1 lb. flour
- 1/2 nutmeg, grated
- 1 lb. currants
- 1/2 lb. raisins and candied peel mixed
- 1 small teaspoonful soda

## Directions

1. Mix well-melted butter with sugar
2. Add scalding milk
3. Grate 1/2 nutmeg
4. Stir in well the sifted flour, currants, raisins and candied peel
5. Add soda wet with boiling water
6. Butter the pans and put a piece of buttered paper in bottom of pans
7. Bake for 1 and 1/2 hours in a moderately hot oven

title: Fruit Cake (Recipe 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 1/2 cup milk
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- whites of 2 eggs
- 1/2 cup raisins
- 1/2 cup walnut meats

## Directions

1. Cream 1 cup sugar and 1/2 cup butter together.
2. Add yolks of 2 eggs and beat till well mixed.
3. Add 1/2 cup milk.
4. Sift in 2 cups flour and 2 teaspoons baking powder.
5. When well mixed, beat with an even stroke so that air will get into it to make it light.
6. Add beaten whites of 2 eggs, 1/2 cup raisins, and 1/2 cup walnut meats.
7. Bake in bread tin.

title: Fruit Cake 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 4 tablespoons molasses
- 1/2 teaspoon soda dissolved in it
- 4 eggs
- 1/2 cup citron cut fine
- 1/2 pound seeded raisins
- 1/2 pound well-washed currants
- 1 grated nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon cloves and cinnamon
- 2 cups sifted flour
- essence of lemon
- whites of the eggs

## Directions

1. Beat butter and sugar to a cream
2. Add eggs gradually, then spices, fruit and flour
3. Beat well, add peel and almonds
4. Add the whites of the eggs at the very last
5. Bake in a moderate oven for 1 hour

title: Fruit Cake 4
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound butter
- 1 pound sugar
- 1 pound flour
- 2 pounds raisins
- 2 pounds currants
- 1/2 pound mixed peel
- 3/8 pound almonds
- 8 eggs
- spices to taste
- soda

## Directions

1. Beat butter and sugar to a cream
2. Add eggs gradually
3. Add spices, fruit and flour
4. Beat well
5. Add peel and almonds
6. Just before baking add the soda

title: Fruit Cake Without Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups sugar
- 2 cups raisins
- 2 cups currants
- 2 cups buttermilk
- 1 1/2 teaspoons soda
- 4 cups flour
- spice to suit the taste

## Directions

1. Combine 1 cup butter, 2 cups sugar, 2 cups raisins, 2 cups currants, 2 cups buttermilk, 1 1/2 teaspoons soda, 4 cups flour and spice to suit the taste.

title: Fruit Cake Without Eggs (Recipe 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- 2 cups sour milk
- 4 cups flour
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon soda
- 1/2 cup strong coffee
- 2 pounds currants
- 2 pounds raisins
- 1/2 pound mixed peel
- 1 pound dates
- 1/4 pound almonds
- 1 tablespoon vanilla
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1/4 teaspoon cloves
- 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Combine 2 cups brown sugar, 2 cups sour milk, 4 cups flour, 1 tablespoon butter, 1 tablespoon soda, 1/2 cup strong coffee, 2 pounds currants, 2 pounds raisins, 1/2 pound mixed peel, 1 pound dates, 1/4 pound almonds, 1 tablespoon vanilla, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, 1/4 teaspoon cloves, 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg and 1 teaspoon salt.
2. This makes 2 good loaves.

title: Fruit Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 1 egg
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon grated nutmeg
- 3/4 cup currants
- flour
- milk
- sugar

## Directions

1. Mix soft and roll out, using just enough flour to stiffen sufficiently
2. Cut out with a large cutter
3. Wet the tops with milk and sprinkle sugar over them
4. Bake on buttered tins in quick oven

title: Fruit Cookies 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup raisins
- 1 1/2 cups brown sugar
- 1 cup shortening (butter and lard mixed)
- 1 beaten egg
- 4 tablespoons sweet milk
- 1 teaspoon baking soda
- flour
- grated nutmeg
- cinnamon
- ground cloves

## Directions

1. Seed and chop finely 1 cup raisins; flour these and set them aside
2. Beat together 1 1/2 cups brown sugar and 1 cup shortening (butter and lard mixed)
3. When creamy, add 1 beaten egg, 4 tablespoons sweet milk, 1 teaspoon baking soda and enough flour to make a stiff batter
4. Add floured raisins with grated nutmeg, cinnamon and ground cloves to taste
5. Add enough more flour to make a stiff dough
6. Roll rather thin and bake in quick oven

title: Fruit Cookies 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups white sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups chopped raisins
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup buttermilk
- 1 heaping teaspoon soda
- 1 nutmeg

## Directions

1. Mix butter soft and bake carefully

title: Fruit Cookies 4
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1 1/2 cups butter
- 1 cup raisins chopped and seeded
- 1 cup currants
- 3 eggs
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon coffee
- 1 teaspoon lemon essence
- 1 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in a very little water

## Directions

1. Mix soft

title: Fruit Cookies 5
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1 1/2 cups butter and lard
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup currants
- 1 teaspoon soda
- cinnamon
- nutmeg
- flour to mix stiff

## Directions

1. Mix stiff

title: Fruit Cookies 6
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups white sugar
- 3 tablespoons sweet milk
- 1 tablespoon syrup
- 1/2 cup currants
- 1/2 cup raisins
- some lemon peel
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- flour enough to roll
- cocoanut

## Directions

1. Mix and roll
2. Sprinkle with cocoanut

title: Fruit Cream Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup brown sugar
- butter the size of an egg
- 1 cup rich sour cream
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- nutmeg to taste
- 1 1/2 cups seeded raisins

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. Bake 1 hour

title: Fruit Drop Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1 cup lard and butter
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 cup chopped nuts
- 1 cup figs or raisins (chopped)
- 3 eggs
- 4 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon
- 1/2 teaspoon ground cloves

## Directions

1. Drop on buttered baking pans with spoon, according to size desired

title: Fruit Fudge Candy
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound chopped walnuts
- 1/4 pound prunes
- 1/4 pound figs
- 1/2 pound dates
- 1/2 pound raisins
- 2 handfuls cocoanut

## Directions

1. Chop very fine and mix well
2. Pack in mould
3. Cut in squares
4. Roll in white sugar

title: Fruit Gingerbread
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup sour cream
- 2 cups raisins
- a generous quantity lemon peel
- 1 heaping tablespoon ginger
- 1 1/2 teaspoons soda
- water
- flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs
2. Add brown sugar
3. Add molasses and butter
4. Add sour cream
5. Add raisins and lemon peel
6. Add ginger
7. Dissolve soda in a little water and add
8. Add flour to make rather stiff
9. Bake in large dripping pan

title: Fruit Jelly
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 box gelatine
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 lemons
- 0.5 pt. cold water
- 1.5 pts. boiling water
- Peaches
- Bananas
- Oranges, sliced

## Directions

1. Dissolve gelatine in one-half pint cold water
2. Add sugar and lemon juice, with boiling water
3. Let this stand until the jelly begins to thicken
4. Pour a little into the mould
5. Place on it a layer of peaches, cut any shape desired
6. Put in more jelly and fruit, alternately until the mould is filled
7. Place on ice to set
8. Serve with whipped cream
9. Allow each layer of fruit and jelly to set before putting in another, so that the fruit will not fall together

title: Fruit Jelly Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups granulated sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup sweet milk
- 3 cups flour
- 4 eggs
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 small cup chopped raisins
- 1/2 teaspoon allspice
- 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon
- a little nutmeg

## Directions

1. Stir together sugar, butter, milk, flour, eggs, and baking powder
2. Divide into 3 equal parts
3. Into 1 part stir chopped raisins, allspice, cinnamon, and nutmeg

title: Fruit Jumbles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups brown sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 1 pound dates
- 1/2 cup chopped walnuts
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 3 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 tablespoon warm water

## Directions

1. Cream together 1 1/2 cups brown sugar and 1/2 cup butter.
2. Add 3 eggs, 1 pound dates, 1/2 cup chopped walnuts and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
3. Mix in 3 cups flour.
4. Dissolve 1 teaspoon soda into 1 tablespoon warm water and stir in.
5. Put in teaspoonfuls in a greased pan and bake quickly.

title: Fruit Junklets
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/4 cups white sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 1 pound chopped dates
- 3/4 pound walnuts
- 3 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 tablespoon warm water

## Directions

1. Stir 1 1/4 cups white sugar and 1/2 cup butter together.
2. Add beaten 3 eggs, then 3 cups flour.
3. Add 1 pound chopped dates and 3/4 pound walnuts and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
4. Dissolve 1 teaspoon soda in 1 tablespoon warm water and stir in last of all.
5. Drop mixture, size of a walnut, in buttered pans and spread with a wet knife.
6. Bake in a hot oven.

title: Fruit Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 1/2 teaspoons ground cloves
- 1 1/2 teaspoons cinnamon
- butter the size of an egg
- 1 cup chopped raisins
- 4 tablespoons molasses
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Bake in 3 layers

title: Fruit Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- pie crust
- chopped sour apples
- chopped raisins
- sugar
- butter
- cloves
- nutmeg
- 1 pound of raisins
- 10 or 12 good-sized apples
- 2 large cups sugar

## Directions

1. Make a nice pie crust and put a layer of it in the bottom of a 2-quart tin basin
2. Add a layer of chopped sour apples 2 inches thick
3. Add a layer of chopped raisins and sprinkle sugar over this
4. Add pieces of butter and sprinkle cloves and nutmeg
5. Alternate layers of crust and fruit until dish is full
6. Put a crust on the top
7. Bake slowly for 2 hours
8. When done turn bottom upwards on a plate
9. Before putting it on the table sprinkle fine sugar over it

title: Fruit Pin Wheels
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt flour
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 1 tablespoonful sugar
- 0.5 pt milk
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- 1 cup currants
- a little nutmeg
- a large spoonful of slightly melted butter
- one cupful of Demerara sugar

## Directions

1. Mix sifted flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder
2. Rub in butter, and mix into a moderately stiff dough with half a pint of milk
3. Sprinkle the pastry board with flour, turn out the dough and roll it to a large square about half an inch thick
4. Spread a large spoonful of slightly melted butter on this
5. Add one cupful of Demerara sugar, and one cupful of well-cleaned currants
6. Grate a little nutmeg over the sugar and currants
7. Roll up just like a jelly roll or poly-poly
8. Cut the roll into slices about three-quarters of an inch thick
9. Place them upon a well-buttered baking shell or tin, but do not let the slices touch

title: Fruit Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup suet, chopped
- 1 cup raisins
- 1/2 cup currants
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- Baking powder, salt, spices to taste

## Directions

1. Steam two hours in buttered mould.
2. Serve with hard sauce (butter and sugar creamed together and hot water sparingly added to thin to desired consistency), flavored with vanilla or lemon.

title: Fruit Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup chopped suet
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup currants
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon ground cloves
- 1 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon sour milk
- 1 teaspoon baking soda
- flour to thicken

## Directions

1. Dissolve 1 teaspoon baking soda in sour milk
2. Mix all ingredients as stiff as can be stirred with a batter spoon
3. Steam 2 hours

title: Fruit Pudding (2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup currants
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup suet
- 1 cup flour or a little more if needed
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup syrup
- a pinch salt
- spice to suit the taste

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Steam 3 hours

title: Fruit Pudding (3)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 pound raisins
- 1 cup currants
- nutmeg
- 3 1/2 lemon peel
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 pound suet
- 1 cup water
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 cups flour
- 2 heaping teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Steam 3 hours

title: Fruit Rolls
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups flour
- 6 very scant teaspoons baking powder
- 2 heaping tablespoons sugar
- 3/4 cup shortening
- sweet milk
- melted butter
- raisins

## Directions

1. Mix flour and baking powder thoroughly
2. Add sugar and salt and rub in shortening
3. Add milk, stirred in gradually
4. Turn dough on board and knead a little
5. Roll out and brush with melted butter
6. Cut out with biscuit cutter
7. On one half sprinkle some raisins and turn other half over it
8. Bake

title: Fruit Salad
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Equal quantities of grape fruit or oranges
- apples
- celery
- bananas
- cream dressing
- tender lettuce leaves

## Directions

1. Peel the grape fruit or oranges, carefully removing all the bitter white skin
2. Cut the pulp with bananas and apples into small dice
3. Cut the celery fine as for other salads
4. Put the orange and apple together; the latter will absorb the juice of the orange
5. Set all on ice
6. When it is time to serve mix the fruit and celery together
7. Put into a salad bowl
8. Cover with cream dressing into which has been stirred a third as much cream as there is dressing
9. Add a little more salt to it in mixing
10. Serve in a bed of tender lettuce leaves

title: Fruit Snaps
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups brown sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup seeded raisins
- 1 cup currants
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour

## Directions

1. Combine 1 1/2 cups brown sugar, 3 eggs, 1/2 cup molasses, 1 cup butter, 1 cup seeded raisins, 1 cup currants, 1 teaspoon allspice, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, 1 teaspoon ginger, 2 teaspoons baking powder and 1 teaspoon soda.
2. Add flour to mix soft dough.

title: Fruit Snaps
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 3 eggs
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup currants
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- flour

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients
2. Roll as soft as can be cut
3. Bake

title: Fruit Snowballs
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 cup butter
- 1/4 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup milk
- 1 cup flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 3 whites eggs
- 1 cup fruit

## Directions

1. Cream butter, add sugar
2. Add flour and baking powder and milk
3. Fold in the whites of eggs
4. Put fruit in bottom of cups, add batter
5. Cover with oiled paper and steam 1 1/2 hour

title: Fruit Souffle
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup fruit pulp either peach, apricot, quince or prunes
- 3 whites of eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- lemon juice
- butter

## Directions

1. Cook fruit, rub through a sieve, sweeten and add perhaps lemon juice
2. If canned fruit is used, first drain from syrup
3. Beat whites of eggs until stiff
4. Add fruit pulp gradually and continue beating
5. Turn into buttered moulds, having them 3/4 full
6. Set moulds in pan of hot water and bake in slow oven until firm
7. Serve with custard

title: Fruit Tea Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup chopped raisins (seeded)
- 3 tablespoons sour cream
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients with flour enough to make a stiff dough to roll out
2. Cut in shapes
3. Bake in a hot oven

title: Fudge
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1/4 lb. chocolate
- 1 cup milk
- Butter size of walnut

## Directions

1. Scald the milk, then add the sugar, butter and chocolate broken into small pieces
2. Boil until it sets when tried in cold water
3. Take off the fire, and beat until nearly cold
4. Then turn out on plates and mark into squares

title: Fudge
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups granulated sugar
- 1/2 cup cocoa
- a pinch of salt
- 1 cup milk
- a lump of butter the size of an egg
- 1/2 teaspoon cream tartar
- vanilla
- nuts

## Directions

1. Stir sugar, cocoa, and salt well together
2. Add milk a little at a time, stirring thoroughly
3. When well blended, place on stove over a brisk flame and stir constantly
4. When candy will not separate upon being dropped into cold water but will adhere together like gum on the bottom, just before removing from stove add butter
5. When butter has melted add cream tartar
6. When candy foams up in kettle remove from fire at once and add vanilla and beat briskly until stiff
7. Nuts may be added after it has been beaten for a few moments
8. Pour into a buttered plate and mark in squares when cold

title: Fudge (Second Recipe)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 3/4 cup cream
- butter size of an egg
- 1/2 cup grated Cowan's Perfection Chocolate or Cocoa
- flavoring

## Directions

1. Mix sugar and chocolate before adding cream
2. Boil until it balls in water
3. Remove from stove and add flavoring
4. Beat until cool enough to turn in buttered pan

title: Fudge Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1/2 cup chocolate melted
- 1/2 cup walnuts broken up
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 1 3/4 teaspoons butter
- 3/4 cup cocoa
- a few grains salt
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Cream 3/4 cup butter and 1 cup sugar together.
2. Add 1 cup sweet milk.
3. Stir in lightly 2 1/2 cups flour sifted with 1 teaspoon baking powder.
4. Stir in 1/2 cup chocolate melted and 1/2 cup walnuts broken up.
5. Add lastly 3 eggs, yolk and whites beaten separately.
6. For Fudge Frosting: Melt 1 3/4 teaspoons butter.
7. Add 3/4 cup cocoa, 1 1/2 cups sugar, a few grains salt and 3/4 cup milk.
8. Boil 8 minutes and add 1 teaspoon vanilla.

title: Galantine of Veal
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. breast of veal
- Salt, pepper and nutmeg
- 1 lb. sausage meat
- A few walnuts
- A little cooked ham or tongue
- 1 lb. grated breadcrumbs
- Bones taken from the veal
- 1/2 oz. gelatine
- 1 cup stock
- A drop of carmine

## Directions

1. Mix with the sausage meat the breadcrumbs, nutmeg, salt, and pepper
2. Put half in the veal, then some ham cut in long strips, then walnuts, then more sausage meat, then ham and walnuts
3. Tuck the veal over it and sew up
4. Tie up in a cloth very firmly at ends and stitch cloth at top
5. Put into boiling water and boil for two and a half hours
6. After it is boiled put between two boards to press
7. Brush the veal over with glaze made from half ounce gelatine, one cup of stock, and a drop of carmine two or three times

title: Game Pie
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- two turkey livers
- legs of two partridges
- forcemeat
- one and one half cups bread-crumbs
- one half teaspoonful cloves
- one half teaspoonful cinnamon
- pepper
- salt
- water
- paste

## Directions

1. Chop up the livers very fine, also the meat of the partridge legs
2. Add the bread-crumbs after having put them through a sifter
3. Add pepper and salt to taste
4. Mix all together and moisten with water
5. Put it in a pan and cook for half an hour, keeping it moist and turning over often
6. Put in a pie dish and cover with paste and bake
7. To be eaten cold

title: Game Sauce
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck ripe plums
- 1 dozen white onions
- 1 pint vinegar
- 4 lbs. white sugar
- 1 teaspoonful cayenne
- 1 teaspoonful black pepper
- 2 oz. stick cinnamon broken in pieces
- 1 teaspoonful salt

## Directions

1. Stone the plums.
2. Chop onions and plums very fine.
3. Put the plums on to cook in a saucepan, the onions on in the vinegar.
4. Cook until done.
5. Then add the plums, also sugar and seasoning.
6. It will take several hours to cook, doing slowly at the back of the stove.
7. When cool cork tight in bottles.

title: Gateaux aux Prunes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. prunes
- 3 oz. sugar
- 1/2 oz. gelatine
- 1 glass brandy
- 1 pt. water
- A few drops cochineal
- Juice and rind of 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Boil the prunes in the water and sugar until quite soft.
2. Take them out and take the stones out, crack the kernels.
3. Add kernels with the brandy, lemon juice and peel, a little cochineal and the gelatine dissolved in a little water.
4. Boil all for twenty minutes.
5. Pour into a border mould.
6. When set, turn out, and serve with whipped cream in the centre.

title: Gelatine Frosting
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 teaspoon gelatine
- 2 tablespoons cold water
- 2 tablespoons hot water
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- lemon to taste

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in cold water until soft
2. Add hot water until entirely dissolved
3. Add 1 cup powdered sugar
4. Beat while yet warm until white and light
5. Add lemon to taste
6. This frosts 1 sheet of cake

title: Gems
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs, yolks and whites, separate beaten
- 1 1/2 cups granulated sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup sour cream
- 1 teaspoon cream tartar
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour to roll real soft

## Directions

1. Bake in a quick oven

title: German Apple Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- pie paste
- tart quartered apples
- 3 1/2 cup flour
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 3/4 sour cream

## Directions

1. Line a pie pan with pie paste
2. lay in side by side tart quartered apples
3. sprinkle over this 3 1/2 cup flour, 3/4 cup sugar, and 3/4 sour cream
4. Bake a rich brown without upper crust

title: German Buns
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups sifted flour
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1/2 cup lard
- 1 egg well beaten
- milk
- 1/2 water
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar
- 1 egg
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 3/4 cup flour

## Directions

1. Mix paste ingredients: flour, salt, sugar, butter, lard, egg with milk and water to a dough
2. Add soda and cream tartar
3. Make filling: mix 1 egg, 1 cup brown sugar, 3/4 cup flour
4. Roll paste out
5. Spread with filling
6. Roll up like rolly-polly pudding
7. Cut in slices crosswise
8. Leave softest part up in pan
9. Bake in quick oven

title: German Cinnamon Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart flour
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons baking powder
- 2 teaspoons sugar
- 3 teaspoons butter
- 1 egg
- 1 pint sweet milk
- lemon or vanilla flavoring
- sugar
- cinnamon
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Make a rich biscuit dough with flour, salt, baking powder, sugar, butter, egg, and sweet milk
2. Flavor with lemon or vanilla
3. Mix all into a soft dough
4. Roll 3/4 inch thick
5. Put dough in a shallow pan
6. Cover top with a mixture of sugar, cinnamon and melted butter
7. Bake in quick oven

title: German Coffee Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one quart of lukewarm milk
- one Fleischmann's yeast cake
- flour enough to make stiff sponge
- cinnamon and sugar
- chopped almonds

## Directions

1. sift flour twice before using
2. knead till batter shows large bubbles, mix in evening
3. next morning knead again
4. put batter about three-quarters high in tins, let raise till twice this size
5. glaze with melted butter, and sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar over top (or chopped almonds instead of cinnamon)
6. Bake in medium hot oven
7. Serve with coffee

title: German Omelet
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 4 teaspoonfuls cornstarch
- 1 pt. milk
- salt
- celery salt

## Directions

1. Beat eggs separately.
2. Mix beaten yolks, milk, cornstarch and seasoning and divide into two parts.
3. Pour half into a hot buttered frying-pan and cook slowly.
4. When beginning to set, put on the top of the omelet half the beaten whites, and when cooked turn over so that the white of the eggs is enrolled in the omelet.
5. Serve very hot, with brown side up.
6. Proceed in the same manner with the remaining half.

title: German Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck green tomatoes
- 2 large white cabbages
- 1 dozen large onions
- salt
- 1 teaspoon tumeric
- 1 teaspoon celery seed
- 1 tablespoon cloves
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon allspice
- 1 tablespoon cayenne
- 1 tablespoon red pepper
- ½ pound mustard
- 2 pounds brown sugar
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop green tomatoes, white cabbages, and large onions all fine
2. Sprinkle with salt
3. Hang up in a sack over night
4. In the morning put in a large granite kettle or boiler
5. Add 1 teaspoon each of tumeric and celery seed, 1 tablespoon each of cloves, cinnamon, allspice, cayenne and red pepper, ½ pound mustard, 2 pounds brown sugar
6. Almost cover with vinegar
7. Boil 2½ hours
8. Do not put in brown sugar until nearly done to prevent burning

title: German Red Cabbage
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 head red cabbage
- 1 onion
- 2 apples
- salt
- pepper
- allspice
- 1 wine glass sherry
- 1/2 cup vinegar
- 2 tablespoonfuls sugar
- butter size of 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Shave cabbage very fine, put slowly into quart of boiling water.
2. Add onion cut fine, apples, salt, pepper and allspice to taste, sherry, vinegar, sugar, butter, let simmer one and one-half or two hours and serve hot.

title: German Rice Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups milk
- 1 cup rice
- salt
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 4 teaspoons butter
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Let 3 cups milk come to scald in double boiler
2. Add 1 cup rice and some salt
3. Boil till soft
4. Add 3/4 cup sugar and 4 teaspoons butter
5. Put in a dish
6. Sprinkle with remainder of sugar, butter and cinnamon

title: Gherkin Salat (German)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Medium-sized cucumbers
- Salted water
- French dressing
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Peel medium-sized cucumbers. Slice across as thin as possible into salted water, in which leave for several hours.
2. Take out and drain, place in towel and wring gently until dry.
3. Turn into salad dish and toss lightly in French dressing (oil, vinegar, salt and pepper), and sprinkle with finely chopped parsley.

title: Giblet Sauce
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- giblets
- flour
- water
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Boil the giblets until tender.
2. Chop them, but not very fine.
3. Add a tablespoonful of flour to the pan in which the chicken was roasted.
4. Let it brown, stirring constantly.
5. Add slowly a cupful of water in which the giblets were boiled.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Strain and add the chopped giblets.
8. Serve in a sauceboat.
9. The liver is a tidbit, and should be roasted and served with the chicken, instead of being used in the sauce.

title: Giblet Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One quart of chicken stock
- Giblets of two fowls
- A little chopped parsley
- Two tablespoonfuls of brown roux
- Hard-boiled yolks
- A little butter
- A raw egg
- Browned flour

## Directions

1. Heat one quart of chicken stock
2. When it boils, stir in the finely minced giblets of two fowls with a little chopped parsley, cook half an hour and thicken with two tablespoonfuls of brown roux
3. Season judiciously
4. Make force-meat balls of hard-boiled yolks, rubbed to a paste with a little butter, bound with a raw egg and rolled in browned flour
5. Drop force-meat balls in one minute before the soup leaves the fire

title: Giblet Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Giblets of four chickens or two turkeys
- One medium onion
- One carrot
- Half a turnip
- A few sprigs of parsley
- Butter size of an egg
- One tablespoonful of flour
- One tablespoonful of salt
- One teaspoonful of pepper
- Three quarts of water or stock in part or any chicken bones
- A tablespoonful of melted butter
- One tablespoonful browned flour
- Juice of small lemon
- Yolks of three hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Heat butter size of an egg in stew-pan, throw in the sliced onion
2. Add the minced carrot and turnip; when tender and a light brown, add the giblets, stirring in a tablespoonful of flour
3. Be careful to stir often that they do not burn
4. Cut up giblets and put with vegetables into soup kettle with tablespoonful of salt, teaspoonful of pepper and three quarts of water, or stock in part, if you have it, or any chicken bones
5. Let this simmer slowly for three hours or more; then strain it
6. Take all the livers, mash into them a tablespoonful of melted butter, tablespoonful browned flour; squeeze the juice of small lemon into this and add to the soup
7. Place in tureen yolks of three hard-boiled eggs cut in half-dozen pieces, pour over the soup; serve

title: Gingee Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups flour
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup golden syrup
- 1/4 cup suet
- 3 teaspoonfuls baking-powder
- 2 teaspoonfuls ginger
- water

## Directions

1. Mix with water to a thin batter.
2. Steam two hours and eat with sweet sauce.

title: Ginger Apples
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 pounds firm pippins
- 1/4 pound green ginger root
- 4 lemons
- 5 pounds sugar

## Directions

1. Peel and cut apples into even sized pieces while firm
2. Cut the ginger root into thin slices and the lemon peel into thin chips
3. Boil till it looks clear
4. Drain, and let stand till cold, using the water in which they are boiled to make the syrup
5. Simmer the apples in this syrup till they are tender enough to be pierced with a straw
6. Put them into fruit jars
7. Cook the lemon and ginger a little more in the syrup and then divide it among the jars of apples, filling up with a thick syrup
8. Screw the lids while the syrup is hot

title: Ginger Apples
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. apples
- 4 lbs. sugar
- 1/2 lb. white ginger
- 2 pints water

## Directions

1. Infuse the ginger in boiling water for several hours to extract all the substance
2. Pare the apples and quarter them, removing the cores
3. Throw them into a basin of cold water
4. Put into a preserving pan the sugar and two pints water, using the ginger water as part of it
5. Bring this to a boil and boil for five minutes
6. Lift the apples from the water into the pan and boil for three-quarters of an hour or till they become transparent
7. Put in jars and cover

title: Ginger Beer
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 qts. water
- 3 lbs. sugar
- 3 oz. ginger
- 3 oz. cream tartar
- juice and rind 6 lemons
- 6 teaspoonfuls brewer's yeast or 6 cakes of yeast

## Directions

1. Pour ten quarts of boiling water on sugar, ginger bruised, cream of tartar, the thin rind and juice of six lemons.
2. When cool add yeast; let stand two days, bottle and cork.

title: Ginger Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Three cups of flour
- one cup of sour milk
- one cup of sugar
- one cup of molasses
- two-thirds cup of butter
- two eggs not beaten
- a little soda

## Directions

1. Bake

title: Ginger Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup butter
- 1 egg
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour, enough to roll out nicely

## Directions

1. Boil the sugar, molasses and butter
2. Let it cool
3. Add 1 egg, 1 teaspoon ginger, 1 teaspoon soda and flour, enough to roll out nicely

title: Ginger Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup butter
- 1 egg
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour

## Directions

1. Boil sugar, molasses and butter
2. Let it cool
3. Add egg, ginger, and soda
4. Add flour enough to roll out nicely

title: Ginger Cookies
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup black molasses
- 1 cup lard (scant)
- 3 eggs
- 2 teaspoonfuls ginger
- 1 heaping teaspoonful soda dissolved in 2 of hot water
- flour to roll

## Directions

1. Bake in hot oven.

title: Ginger Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup butter or lard
- 1 cup baking syrup
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon ginger
- 1 cup buttermilk
- 2 teaspoons soda
- flour enough to roll out easily

## Directions

1. Mix and roll out

title: Ginger Cookies 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup melted butter
- 1 cup dark sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 cup molasses
- 1/2 cup buttermilk
- heaping teaspoon soda
- spice to taste

## Directions

1. Make moderately stiff dough

title: Ginger Cookies 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup butter
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon vinegar
- 1 tablespoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in boiling water

## Directions

1. Mix cookie dough rather soft

title: Ginger Cookies 4
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups butter and lard mixed
- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1 pint molasses
- 3/4 cup warm water
- 3 teaspoons soda
- 3 teaspoons ginger
- 2 teaspoons salt
- 2 teaspoons cloves or other spice
- 2 eggs
- flour to thicken

## Directions

1. Boil mixture
2. When cool add 2 eggs and flour to thicken

title: Ginger Cordial
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 gal. whisky
- 8 lemons
- 4 lbs. sugar
- 1/2 lb. ginger biscuit
- 1 qt. water
- 4 lbs. red currants

## Directions

1. Put the whisky, lemons and ginger in a crock and let it stand for three days, stirring every day; then strain and add the sugar, which has been dissolved in the quart of water.
2. Stir until all is well mixed; then bottle. Ready for use at once.

title: Ginger Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one gill of milk
- one ounce of sugar
- yolks of three eggs
- one gill of syrup from preserved ginger jar
- two ounces of preserved ginger
- three-quarters ounce gelatine
- water
- one-half pint whipped cream

## Directions

1. Make a custard of a gill of milk, one ounce of sugar, the beaten yolks of three eggs.
2. Stir in a double boiler until thick, let it cool.
3. Add one gill of the syrup from the jar of preserved ginger, and two ounces of the ginger cut up.
4. Add three-quarters ounce, full weight, of gelatine melted in as little water as possible.
5. Last of all add one-half pint of whipped cream.
6. Mix gently until well blended, pour into a mould and set on ice.

title: Ginger Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Four ounces of prepared ginger
- One ounce of gelatine
- One pint of milk
- Four tablespoonfuls of sugar
- One pint of whipped cream

## Directions

1. Cut four ounces of prepared ginger in dice
2. Put one ounce of gelatine into a saucepan with a pint of milk and four tablespoonfuls of sugar
3. Let it boil slowly, stirring all the time till the gelatine is dissolved
4. Add ginger
5. When cool add one pint of whipped cream
6. Pour in dampened mould to form

title: Ginger Drop Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup shortening
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 rounding teaspoon soda
- flour enough to make a thick batter

## Directions

1. Mix shortening, sour milk, brown sugar, molasses, eggs, ginger and soda with flour to make a thick batter
2. Drop from a spoon in drops as large as an egg in a bread pan, far enough apart not to touch
3. Bake and eat warm

title: Ginger Drop Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup shortening
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 rounding teaspoon soda
- flour

## Directions

1. Combine shortening, sour milk, brown sugar, and molasses
2. Add eggs and ginger
3. Add soda
4. Add flour enough to make a thick batter
5. Drop from a spoon in drops as large as an egg in a bread pan, far enough apart not to touch
6. To be eaten warm

title: Ginger Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 4 eggs
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 3/4 cups sour milk
- 3 teaspoons ginger
- 2 teaspoons cloves
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 2 teaspoons nutmeg
- 1 pound currants
- 1 pound raisins
- 2 3/4 teaspoons soda
- 4 cups flour

## Directions

1. Combine sugar and butter
2. Add eggs
3. Add molasses and sour milk
4. Add ginger, cloves, cinnamon, and nutmeg
5. Add flour
6. Add fruit last
7. Bake in a slow oven

title: Ginger Gems
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 egg
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 tablespoon ginger
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- a little salt

## Directions

1. bake in patty pan tins

title: Ginger Honey-Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup honey
- 1/2 cup butter or drippings
- 1 tablespoon boiled cider in 1/2 cup hot water (or 1/2 cup sour milk)
- 1 tablespoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour enough to make a soft batter

## Directions

1. Warm honey, butter (or drippings), and boiled cider in hot water together
2. Add 1 tablespoon ginger and 1 teaspoon soda sifted in with flour enough to make a soft batter
3. Bake in a flat pan

title: Ginger Pears for Meat
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds pears (winter ones preferred)
- 5 pounds white sugar
- ¼ package seeded raisins
- 1 ounce crystallized ginger
- 2 whole lemons

## Directions

1. Chop pears
2. Boil 1 hour
3. Boil 2 whole lemons for 1 hour separately
4. Chop lemons fine
5. Add to pears
6. Boil 20 minutes more
7. Seal

title: Ginger Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup sour milk
- 1 cup raisins
- 2 teaspoons ginger
- 2 tablespoons molasses
- butter size of a walnut
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour enough to thicken

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Steam 1 hour

title: Ginger Pudding (2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1/4 teaspoon cloves
- 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon butter melted
- 1 egg
- 1 cup flour
- 1 level teaspoon soda
- boiling water

## Directions

1. Put 1 level teaspoon soda in a cup and then half fill cup with boiling water
2. Mix 1/2 cup brown sugar, 1/2 cup molasses, 1 teaspoon ginger, 1/4 teaspoon cloves, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, 1 tablespoon butter melted, 1 egg, 1 cup flour
3. Stir in soda water quickly
4. Bake in angel cake tin
5. Do not move while baking
6. Serve with sauce

title: Ginger Snaps
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 2 tablespoons soda
- 1 tablespoon vinegar
- 1 tablespoon ginger
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- flour enough to roll

## Directions

1. Beat sugar and egg together
2. Warm the molasses and pour into the mixture
3. Add ginger and salt, stir well
4. Add soda and vinegar, beat and mix with flour
5. Roll rather thin, cut in shapes, and bake in hot oven

title: Ginger Snaps
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup lard
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 3 teaspoons ginger
- flour to make a stiff dough

## Directions

1. Boil brown sugar, molasses, and lard for a few minutes
2. Stir in soda and ginger
3. Add flour to make a stiff dough
4. Roll out thin and cut as desired
5. Bake in a moderate oven till a dark brown

title: Ginger Snaps
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup golden molasses
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon soda
- 2 tablespoons ginger
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 nutmeg
- flour to roll

## Directions

1. Take a portion the size of a walnut, roll in a ball instead of cutting with cutter, and place on buttered pan and bake.

title: Ginger Snaps 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon ginger
- 1 cup syrup
- 1/2 cup lard
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in a little warm water
- flour to roll out thin

## Directions

1. Put all this together and let come to a boil, then add to this just before removing from the stove 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in a little warm water.
2. Let this mix, cool and then add enough flour to roll out thin.

title: Ginger Snaps 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon ginger
- 1 cup syrup
- 1/2 cup lard
- 1 cup granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Put all this together and let

title: Ginger Sweet Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- plain suet pudding
- 4 tablespoons molasses
- 2 teaspoons ground ginger

## Directions

1. Add to plain suet pudding 4 tablespoons molasses and 2 teaspoons ground ginger.
2. Serve with lemon sauce.

title: Ginger Wine
body:
## Ingredients

- tartaric acid (1 ounce)
- essence of ginger (0.5 ounce)
- essence cayenne (0.75 ounce)
- burnt sugar (1 ounce)
- lemons (3)
- white sugar (3 pounds)
- boiling water (6 quarts)
- fruit coloring

## Directions

1. Slice 3 lemons or squeeze out the juice
2. Pour over all six quarts boiling water
3. Let stand until cold
4. Bottle ready for use
5. Use a little fruit coloring if desired a darker color

title: Ginger-Bread Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- flour enough to make stiff

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together with flour enough to make stiff.

title: Gingerbread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 3/4 cup butter or dripping
- 3/4 cup hot water
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon ginger
- other spices if desired

## Directions

1. Combine sugar and molasses
2. Add butter or dripping
3. Dissolve soda in hot water and add
4. Add enough flour to make a thick batter
5. Beat up and add egg
6. Add ginger and other spices if desired

title: Gingerbread No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sour milk
- 3/4 cup lard and butter mixed
- 3 cups heaped flour
- 2 eggs
- 2 teaspoons soda
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- warm water

## Directions

1. Combine brown sugar, molasses, sour milk, and lard and butter mixed
2. Add flour
3. Add eggs
4. Add ginger and cinnamon
5. Dissolve soda in warm water
6. Bake in deep pans
7. Will keep a long time

title: Glace Nuts
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups granulated sugar
- 1 cup boiling water
- 3/4 cup white wine vinegar
- nuts

## Directions

1. Boil sugar and water without stirring until thick
2. Add vinegar until, when dropped in cold water, it cracks
3. Set the saucepan on warm place, but not where it can boil
4. Stick nuts on ends of hat pins and, taking 2 at a time, dip into the taffy
5. Hold in cool place until hard enough to handle them, then drop on tin plate

title: Glazed Sweet Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- medium-sized potatoes
- sugar
- butter
- water

## Directions

1. Boil potatoes and cut in halves
2. Lay evenly in a baking pan
3. Bake in a hot oven until tender and nicely browned
4. Baste while baking with a syrup made by boiling sugar, butter and water together for a few minutes

title: Golden Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 cup butter
- 1 cup light brown sugar
- 1/2 cup fruit juice
- 3/8 teaspoon mace
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. put over hot water
3. stir until liquid
4. add beaten yolks, mace and fruit juice
5. stir until it thickens
6. Serve at once

title: Good Beef Stew
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- a good round steak, two or three pounds
- butter
- 1 pint of water
- pepper
- salt
- minced onion
- stoned olives
- mushrooms

## Directions

1. Brown steak well on both sides in butter
2. Add a pint of water
3. Cook very slowly well covered two hours
4. Add pepper, salt and minced onion if liked
5. Cook half an hour longer
6. Add stoned olives and mushrooms

title: Good Cheap Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup white sugar
- 1 small tablespoon butter
- 1 egg
- 3/4 cup milk or cream
- 1/4 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cream of tartar
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- Flour

## Directions

1. Beat butter and egg together
2. Add sugar
3. Add milk or cream
4. Mix in soda, cream of tartar, and salt
5. Sift with flour enough to make cake stiff
6. Add any flavoring desired or none at all
7. Bake until done

title: Good Chopped Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 onions
- 12 green tomatoes
- 12 apples, all uniform size
- vinegar
- 3 cups granulated sugar
- 2 tablespoons mustard

## Directions

1. Chop onions, green tomatoes, and apples
2. Cover with vinegar
3. Add sugar and mustard

title: Good Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 egg
- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour
- granulated sugar for topping

## Directions

1. Beat well together the sugar, butter and egg, then add cream with soda in it.
2. Add to this sufficient flour to make nice soft dough, roll thin.
3. Sprinkle granulated sugar over top of them before going into oven.
4. Bake lightly.

title: Good Corn Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 large cup cornmeal
- 1 small cup flour
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 eggs well beaten
- 2 teaspoons heaped baking powder
- 3 tablespoons heaped of butter
- a pinch of salt
- sweet milk

## Directions

1. Mix 1 large cup cornmeal, 1 small cup flour, 1/2 cup sugar, 2 eggs well beaten, 2 teaspoons heaped baking powder, 3 tablespoons heaped of butter, a pinch of salt
2. Add sweet milk to make a thin batter
3. Bake in biscuit tin in moderate oven

title: Gooseberry Catsup
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe gooseberries (8 pounds)
- sugar (4 pounds)
- good vinegar (1 pint)
- cloves (2 ounces)
- cinnamon (2 ounces)

## Directions

1. Boil berries and sugar for 3 or 4 hours
2. Add spices and boil a little more
3. Pour through a sieve and bottle

title: Gooseberry Jam
body:
## Ingredients

- red, rough, ripe gooseberries
- lump sugar (half the quantity of gooseberries)

## Directions

1. Break them well
2. Boil together for 1 hour or more, if necessary
3. Put into pots and cover with papers

title: Gooseberry Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- green, unripe gooseberries (6 pounds)
- water (6 pints)
- sugar (1 pound to every pint of juice)
- vanilla (1 sprig)

## Directions

1. Boil 6 pounds green, unripe gooseberries in 6 pints water
2. Pour into a basin, and let stand covered with a cloth 24 hours
3. Strain through a jelly bag
4. To every pint of juice add 1 pound sugar
5. Boil it for an hour, then skim and boil for an hour longer with a sprig of vanilla

title: Gooseberry Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 pounds green, unripe gooseberries
- 6 pints water
- 1 pound sugar per pint of juice
- 1 sprig of vanilla

## Directions

1. Boil 6 pounds green, unripe gooseberries in 6 pints water
2. Pour into a basin, and let stand covered with a cloth 24 hours
3. Strain through a jelly bag
4. To every pint of juice add 1 pound sugar
5. Boil it for an hour, then skim and boil for an hour longer with a sprig of vanilla

title: Governor Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck green tomatoes
- 1 quart onions
- 5 green peppers
- 1/2 cup salt
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon ground cloves
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 4 cups vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop fine and press out water
2. Put in kettle
3. Add salt, sugar, cloves, and cinnamon
4. Boil 1 hour

title: Graham Biscuit
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt. milk or water
- 1 tablespoonful butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls sugar
- 1/2 cup or 1/2 cake of yeast
- wheat flour to make thin batter
- graham flour to make stiff as can be stirred with a spoon
- salt

## Directions

1. If dry yeast is used, take half cake of yeast dissolved in half cupful warm water.
2. Use enough of wheat flour to make a thin batter; add the remainder of the ingredients and as much graham flour as can be stirred in with a spoon.
3. Set away until morning.
4. In the morning butter a pan, and with floured hands tear off bits of dough the size of an egg, roll lightly between the palms, put in the pan, let rise twenty minutes and bake in a hot oven.

title: Graham Bread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 4 cups graham flour
- 2 cups warm milk
- 1 cake compressed yeast
- ½ cup molasses
- 2 teaspoonfuls salt
- 1 teaspoonful soda dissolved in water

## Directions

1. Make as stiff as can be stirred with a spoon
2. Let it rise over night
3. In the morning beat it a little, form in one or two loaves, put in pans
4. When it rises again, bake one hour in a moderate oven

title: Graham Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups white flour
- 1 White Swan Yeast Cake
- 1 3/4 quarts warm water
- 1 cup sugar
- 4 breadspoons baking syrup
- about 1 3/4 sifters white flour
- Graham flour
- 2 handfuls salt

## Directions

1. At noon scald 2 cups white flour and let it stand until lukewarm
2. Add 1 soaked White Swan Yeast Cake
3. Set in a warm place to rise
4. At night put 1 3/4 quarts warm water, 1 cup sugar, 4 breadspoons baking syrup and about 1 3/4 sifters white flour with the sponge
5. Finish setting with Graham flour
6. In the morning put in 2 handfuls salt and stiffen with white flour
7. Set to rise
8. Put in pan and let rise again
9. This will make 5 or 6 loaves

title: Graham Bread 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup Graham flour
- 1 cup white flour
- 1 cup cornmeal
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. Steam three hours

title: Graham Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 egg well beaten
- 1/2 teaspoon soda
- a little salt
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- Graham flour

## Directions

1. Beat 1 egg well.
2. Mix 1 cup sour milk, beaten egg, 1/2 teaspoon soda, a little salt and 1 tablespoon sugar.
3. Add Graham flour enough for stiff batter.
4. Add 1 tablespoon butter (melted) lastly.

title: Graham Flour Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Two cups graham flour
- one cup sweet milk
- one cup of molasses
- one cup of currants or raisins
- one teaspoonful baking powder
- one teaspoonful of salt

## Directions

1. Put in a shape and boil or steam for three hours.
2. Serve with foam sauce.

title: Graham Gems
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup of milk
- one egg
- one tablespoonful of sugar
- one teaspoonful of cream-tartar
- half a teaspoonful of soda
- one and a half cups of Graham flour
- Salt

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients and bake

title: Graham Gems
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Graham flour
- Milk
- A pinch of salt
- 1 egg

## Directions

1. Mix graham flour with milk to form a stiff batter
2. Add a pinch of salt and one egg
3. Bake in gems, hot and well greased

title: Graham Gems
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 1/2 cups of brown sugar
- 1 1/2 cups sour cream
- pinch of salt
- 1 small teaspoon cinnamon
- a good 1/2 cup of currants
- 3 cups Graham flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and sugar together
2. add the sour cream, salt, cinnamon and currants
3. beat well together
4. add the flour in which the soda has been thoroughly mixed
5. Bake in well-buttered gem rings

title: Graham Gems 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 2 cups sour milk
- 2 cups Graham flour
- 1 cup white flour
- 2 teaspoons baking soda

## Directions

1. moisten with hot water
2. Bake in gem rings

title: Graham Gems with Baking Powder
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful butter
- 1 beaten egg
- 1 cup milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls sugar
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- Graham flour for good batter

## Directions

1. Mix butter, egg, milk, sugar, and baking powder into graham flour batter
2. Bake in gem-pans
3. Tear gems open with a fork, and butter

title: Graham Muffins
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup sour cream
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup white flour
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- enough Graham flour to make stiff batter

## Directions

1. Beat the sugar with the eggs
2. Add the sour cream and salt
3. Sift in the white flour with baking powder in
4. Mix thoroughly and then add enough Graham flour to make a stiff batter

title: Graham Nut Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 3/4 cup brown sugar
- 1 heaping teaspoon soda
- sour milk or hot water
- 1 cup walnuts cut up
- 2 cups Graham flour
- 2 cups white flour
- 1 pinch salt

## Directions

1. Dissolve 1 heaping teaspoon soda in sour milk or hot water.
2. Mix 1 cup molasses, 3/4 cup brown sugar, the soda mixture, 1 cup walnuts cut up, 2 cups Graham flour, 2 cups white flour and 1 pinch salt like cake batter.

title: Graham Popovers
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 cup Graham flour
- 1/2 cup flour
- 2 cups milk
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. eggs beaten separately

title: Graham Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup Graham flour
- 3/4 cup golden syrup
- 1/2 teaspoon soda
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1 scant teaspoon salt
- 1 egg
- 1 cup figs or raisins

## Directions

1. Melt butter.
2. Add milk and egg well beaten.
3. Add fruit last.
4. Sift flour on fruit.
5. Steam 1 1/2 hours.

title: Graham Pudding 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 cups Graham flour
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup molasses
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 cup raisins
- 2 small teaspoons soda
- 1 saltspoon salt

## Directions

1. Steam 2 1/2 hours.

title: Graham Pudding 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups Graham flour
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 1/2 cup yellow sugar
- 1/2 cup warm water
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 nutmeg
- 1 cup chopped dates, raisins, figs or currants (optional)

## Directions

1. Dissolve soda in the water.
2. Combine all ingredients.
3. Steam 2 or 3 hours.

title: Graham Puffs
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart Graham flour
- 1/2 pint fine white flour
- enough milk or water, a little warm, to make a thick batter

## Directions

1. no salt or baking powder
2. have your oven hotter than for biscuit
3. have your gems pans standing in the oven until you get ready
4. beat batter thoroughly
5. grease your pans
6. drop in while the irons are smoking hot
7. Bake quickly a nice brown

title: Graham Scones
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup white flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- a little salt
- 1 cup Graham flour
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup shortening
- 1 egg
- cold water

## Directions

1. Sift together 1 cup white flour, 2 teaspoons baking powder and a little salt.
2. Add 1 cup Graham flour, 1/2 cup sugar and 1/4 cup shortening.
3. Beat up 1 egg in a saucer and leave awhile.
4. Pour out 3/4 egg in a cup and fill up with cold water and mix to a soft dough.
5. Roll out in squares and brush with egg left in saucer.

title: Graham Wafers
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/2 cup butter
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- unbeaten white of 1 egg
- 3/4 teaspoon soda
- 8 tablespoons warm water
- 1 quart Graham flour

## Directions

1. Beat to a cream 3/2 cup butter.
2. Add gradually 1 cup granulated sugar and the unbeaten white of 1 egg.
3. Beat vigorously for 2 minutes.
4. Dissolve 3/4 teaspoon soda in 8 tablespoons warm water and add.
5. Stir in slowly 1 quart Graham flour.
6. Knead until smooth.
7. Roll out a little at a time into a sheet as thin as a wafer.
8. Cut in squares and bake in a slow oven until crisp and brown.
9. Rye meal may be used.

title: Grandmother's Apple Dumplings
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sweet milk
- 3 heaping teaspoons baking powder
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 teaspoon salt
- flour
- apples peeled and quartered
- sugar
- sweetened cream

## Directions

1. Stir baking powder in a little flour
2. Take a small pan of flour and make a roll in centre, in which mix the above till stiff enough to roll out and cut in squares
3. Have some apples peeled and quartered
4. Roll the apples in the dough and a little sugar
5. Seal up tight by patting and rolling
6. Boil 20 or 30 minutes in water
7. Serve with sweetened cream

title: Grandmother's Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup shortening
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- flour enough to roll

## Directions

1. Mix and roll

title: Grape Catsup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds grapes
- 1.5 pounds sugar
- 1 pint vinegar
- 2 tablespoonfuls salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls cinnamon
- 2 tablespoonfuls allspice
- 0.5 teaspoonful red pepper
- A little ground cloves
- 1 teaspoonful grated nutmeg

## Directions

1. Stew grapes over a slow fire until soft, then strain through a sieve
2. Add sugar, vinegar, salt, cinnamon and allspice, red pepper, cloves (ground), and grated nutmeg
3. Mix all together and boil till quite thick

title: Grape Catsup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 lbs. grapes
- 3½ lbs. sugar
- 1 pint vinegar
- good tablespoonful ground cloves
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Squeeze out the pulp from grapes
2. Heat up pulp without any water
3. Let it come to a boil, then put through a sieve
4. Take skins and pulp, and mix with sugar, vinegar, ground cloves and cinnamon
5. Cook till thick
6. Watch it constantly

title: Grape Catsup
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 pounds grapes
- 4 pounds sugar
- 1 quart vinegar
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon allspice
- 2 tablespoons ground cloves

## Directions

1. Take 8 pounds grapes and cook until very soft
2. Put through a sieve, return to kettle
3. Add 4 pounds sugar, 1 quart vinegar, 1 tablespoon cinnamon and allspice, and 2 tablespoons ground cloves
4. Boil till thick

title: Grape Catsup 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds grapes
- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 pint vinegar
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon cloves
- 1 tablespoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon pepper

## Directions

1. Boil 5 pounds grapes to a pulp
2. Strain
3. Add 2 pounds sugar, 1 pint vinegar, 1 tablespoon each cinnamon, cloves, allspice, and 1 teaspoon pepper
4. Boil until thick enough for catsup

title: Grape Jam
body:
## Ingredients

- grapes
- water
- 3/4 pound sugar per pound of fruit

## Directions

1. Separate skin from pulp of grapes, keeping them in separate dishes
2. Put pulp in preserving kettle with a teacup of water
3. When thoroughly heated, run them through a colander to separate the seeds
4. Put your skins with them and weigh
5. To each pound of fruit put 3/4 of a pound of sugar, add merely enough to keep from burning
6. Cook slowly 3/4 hour

title: Grape Jelly
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Small cupful of water
- Grapes to fill a four-quart kettle
- One pound of sugar to a pint of juice

## Directions

1. Put small cupful of water in the bottom of a four-quart kettle, filled with grapes
2. Let fruit boil until all the juice is extracted
3. Strain and add a pound of sugar to a pint of juice
4. Boil until it jellies

title: Grape Juice
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 basket grapes
- water
- 2 pounds sugar for each basket
- paraffine wax

## Directions

1. Take the contents of 1 basket grapes, wash and stem
2. Put on stove with just enough water to cover
3. Let come to a boil, remove from fire and pour into cheese cloth bag
4. When cool enough, press out the juice with the hands
5. Put juice back on stove with 2 pounds sugar for each basket
6. Let come to a boil
7. Bottle while hot, cork and seal with paraffine wax, to exclude the air

title: Grape Juice 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 pounds grapes
- water
- 3 pounds white sugar

## Directions

1. Weigh grapes before taking them off the stems
2. Pick off the stems, put in a porcelain kettle
3. Add a little water, and cook until stones and pulp separate
4. Press and strain through thick cloth
5. Return juice to kettle and add 3 pounds white sugar
6. Heat to simmering, bottle hot and seal

title: Grape Juice 3
body:
## Ingredients

- grapes
- sugar

## Directions

1. Wash grapes, pick from stems
2. Put in preserving pan and crush slightly
3. Heat slowly and boil gently for 3/4 an hour
4. Crush fruit with wooden spoon, strain through cheese cloth over sieve or colander
5. Drain well, then draw edges of cheese cloth together and twist hard to press out all juice and put in clean preserving kettle on fire
6. When it boils up, draw back and skim
7. Let it boil up again and skim
8. Add 1 gill of sugar to each quart of juice, stir until dissolved, boil 5 minutes, skimming carefully
9. Fill hot sterilized jars or bottles, put jars in moderate oven for 10 minutes in pans of boiling water
10. Fill jars with more boiling juice and seal

title: Grape Preserves
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint fruit
- 3/4 pint sugar

## Directions

1. Wash, drain grapes, remove from stems
2. Heat to boiling point
3. Wash and cook until seeds come out
4. Strain out seeds and skins
5. Cook 10 minutes, measure, add sugar and boil until liquid thickens
6. Put in sterilized jars

title: Grape-Nut Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup grape-nut
- 1 1/2 cups milk
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 1/2 cup white sugar
- 1/2 cup chopped raisins
- whites of 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Scald milk and pour over grape-nut.
2. Beat yolks of eggs with sugar, raisins and flavoring.
3. Add to the milk.
4. Beat the whites of eggs and add to mixture.
5. Bake in a slow oven in a pan of water for 1/2 hour.

title: Grapenut Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup grapenut
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup shortening (butter and lard mixed)
- scant 1/2 cup milk
- 1/2 teaspoon soda
- 1/2 teaspoon baking powder
- spices to taste (cinnamon or cloves)
- flour to make stiff

## Directions

1. Mix stiff

title: Great Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one-quarter pound macaroons
- six eggs
- two and one-half pounds ladies' fingers soaked in wine
- two and one-half cups sugar
- two tablespoonfuls gelatine
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Beat macaroons, ladyfingers, eggs and sugar for one-half an hour
2. Dissolve gelatine and mix with eggs after they are beaten
3. Whip quickly for a minute or two
4. Have whipped cream on top

title: Green Apple Sauce Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups unsweetened apple sauce
- 4 teaspoons soda
- 2 cups granulated sugar
- 1 cup shortening
- half butter and lard
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 1/2 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- nutmeg
- 5 cents' worth lemon peel
- 2 cups chopped raisins
- 3 tablespoons molasses
- 3 1/2 cups sifted flour

## Directions

1. Stir 4 teaspoons soda in the apple sauce
2. Mix in 2 cups granulated sugar, 1 cup shortening (half butter and lard), 2 teaspoons cinnamon, 1/2 teaspoon cloves, 1 teaspoon allspice and a little nutmeg
3. Add 5 cents' worth lemon peel, 2 cups chopped raisins, 3 tablespoons molasses and 3 1/2 cups sifted flour
4. Bake in a 4-quart pan

title: Green Corn Patties
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint corn (grated)
- 1 teacup flour
- 1 egg
- pepper and salt to taste
- a little milk

## Directions

1. Grate corn to make 1 pint
2. Mix with flour, egg, pepper and salt
3. If too thick, add a little milk
4. Fry in butter

title: Green Cucumber Pickles
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 gal. vinegar
- 1 oz. ginger root
- 1/2 lb. mustard
- 1 lb. salt
- 2 oz. mustard seed
- 2 oz. peppercorns
- a few red peppers
- cucumbers
- beans

## Directions

1. Drop in as many cucumbers, beans, etc., as the vinegar will cover.
2. Stir frequently.
3. Good to use in a month.

title: Green Pea Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 qts. stock
- 1 peck old peas
- 2 lettuce
- 1 onion
- 1 tablespoonful butter
- 1 tablespoonful flour
- a few sprigs of mint
- a little cucumber
- toasted bread

## Directions

1. Reserve one quart of stock and a teacupful of peas
2. Put the rest of stock and all the vegetables together and simmer till quite tender
3. Press all through a sieve
4. Add the remainder of the stock, let it come to the boiling point
5. Just before serving, if the soup is not very thick, add the butter and flour well mixed together
6. Boil the teacup of peas by themselves, put them in the tureen and pour the soup over them
7. Serve with a dish of toasted bread

title: Green Pea Timboles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can peas
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 teaspoon sugar
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- pepper
- 2 eggs
- milk

## Directions

1. Pass the peas through a colander
2. Mix with the butter, sugar, salt, pepper, eggs, and milk to soften
3. Pour into buttered timbole moulds
4. Bake in hot oven until firm
5. Turn out and serve with white sauce

title: Green Peas
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- peas
- slightly salted boiling water
- butter (a lump the size of an egg)
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Shell and wash; put them in slightly salted boiling water, and cook them in this for twenty-five minutes.
2. Drain well, turn into a hot dish, put a lump of butter the size of an egg upon them and a little pepper and salt.

title: Green Sandwiches
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- chopped parsley
- finely cut white loaf
- butter
- sprig of parsley
- onion-juice

## Directions

1. Butter slices
2. Sprinkle with parsley
3. Pile sandwiches crosswise on plates
4. Decorate with a sprig of parsley in centre of pile
5. The parsley may be tossed in a very little onion-juice if relished

title: Green Tomato and Cucumber Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 colander sliced green tomatoes
- 1 quart onions
- 1 colander pared and sliced cucumbers
- 2 handfuls salt
- celery seed
- allspice
- ½ ounce celery seed
- ½ ounce allspice
- 1 teaspoon tumeric
- 1 pound brown sugar
- 2 tablespoons mustard
- 1 gallon vinegar

## Directions

1. Mix 1 colander of sliced green tomatoes, 1 quart of onions, 1 colander pared and sliced cucumbers
2. Add 2 handfuls salt
3. Stand 24 hours
4. Drain
5. Add celery seed, allspice each ½ ounce, 1 teaspoon tumeric, 1 pound brown sugar, 2 tablespoons mustard, 1 gallon vinegar

title: Green Tomato Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 quarts green tomatoes
- 1 head cabbage
- 1 head cauliflower
- 1 bunch celery
- 6 large cucumbers
- 6 onions
- 6 teaspoons mustard
- 1 teaspoon tumeric powder
- 1 cup flour
- 2 cups sugar
- 2 quarts vinegar

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients
2. Cook together

title: Green Tomato Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck green tomatoes
- 1 cup salt
- 2 quarts water
- 1 pint vinegar
- 2 quarts vinegar
- 2½ pounds brown sugar
- 2 tablespoons mustard seed
- 2 tablespoons allspice
- 2 tablespoons ginger
- 2 tablespoons mustard
- 2 tablespoons cloves
- 2 large tablespoons cinnamon

## Directions

1. Slice 1 peck green tomatoes
2. Sprinkle 1 cup salt
3. Leave over night
4. Drain well
5. Add 2 quarts water and 1 pint vinegar
6. Boil 15 minutes
7. Drain again
8. Add 2 quarts vinegar, 2½ pounds brown sugar, 2 tablespoons each of mustard seed, allspice, ginger, mustard, cloves, and 2 large tablespoons cinnamon
9. Mix and boil 15 minutes

title: Green Tomato Pickle 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck green tomatoes sliced
- 6 onions sliced
- 1 cup salt
- 2 quarts vinegar
- 2 pounds sugar
- 2 tablespoons cloves
- 2 tablespoons cinnamon
- 2 tablespoons mustard seed
- 2 tablespoons ginger
- 6 green peppers chopped fine

## Directions

1. Slice green tomatoes and onions
2. Sprinkle with salt, let stand over night
3. Drain in the morning
4. Add vinegar, sugar, cloves, cinnamon, mustard seed, ginger, and green peppers
5. Boil 2 hours and put in stone jars

title: Green Tomato Pickle 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck green tomatoes sliced
- 6 large onions sliced
- 1 cup salt
- 2 gallons vinegar
- 2 pounds sugar
- 2 ounces white mustard seed
- 2 tablespoons cinnamon
- 2 tablespoons ginger
- 2 tablespoons cloves
- 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper

## Directions

1. Slice green tomatoes and onions
2. Sprinkle on salt and let remain over night
3. In the morning drain through a colander
4. Take vinegar, sugar, mustard seed, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, and cayenne pepper
5. Boil all gently 15 minutes and pour over tomatoes and onions

title: Green Tomato Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart onions
- 1 quart green tomatoes
- 1 quart cucumbers
