- 1 head cauliflower
- 3 red peppers
- 3 heads celery chopped fine
- 1 cup salt
- 3/4 cup mustard
- 1/8 cup tumeric powder
- 1/2 ounce butter
- 1 egg
- 1 cup coffee sugar
- 3 quarts vinegar

## Directions

1. Mix onions, green tomatoes, cucumbers, cauliflower, red peppers, and celery chopped fine together
2. Add 1 cup salt, let stand over night
3. In the morning cook in the brine
4. Make dressing with 3/4 cup mustard, 1/8 cup tumeric powder, 1/2 ounce butter, 1 egg, 1 cup coffee sugar, 3 quarts vinegar; cook and stir in other

title: Green Tomato Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 20 green tomatoes
- 10 onions
- 4 large apples
- 4 cups sugar
- 1 teaspoon cassia
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 7 cups vinegar

## Directions

1. Cook for 3 hours

title: Green Tomato Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 gallons green tomatoes sliced without peeling
- 12 good-sized onions sliced
- 2 quarts vinegar
- 2 quarts brown sugar
- 2 tablespoons salt
- ground mustard
- ground black pepper
- 1 tablespoon cloves
- 1 tablespoon allspice

## Directions

1. Slice green tomatoes without peeling
2. Slice 12 good-sized onions
3. Mix all together with vinegar, brown sugar, salt, ground mustard, ground black pepper, cloves, and allspice
4. Stew until tender, stirring often lest they scorch
5. Put in glass jars

title: Green Tomato Spiced Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- 14 pounds green tomatoes
- 6 large onions
- 1 cupful salt
- 2 quarts water
- 1 quart vinegar
- 2 quarts fresh vinegar
- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 ounce cloves
- 1 ounce whole ginger
- 1 ounce allspice
- 1 ounce mustard
- 1 ounce cinnamon
- 1 saltspoon cayenne pepper

## Directions

1. Slice green tomatoes and onions
2. Sprinkle with salt and allow to stand over night
3. In the morning drain
4. Add 2 quarts water and 1 quart vinegar; boil 15 minutes, then drain again, throwing away the water and vinegar
5. Add 2 quarts fresh vinegar, 2 pounds sugar, 1 ounce each of cloves, whole ginger, allspice, mustard and cinnamon, 1 saltspoon cayenne pepper
6. Tie the spice in a muslin bag
7. Boil for 15 minutes
8. Pour in earthenware or glass jars and tie down when cold

title: Green-Pea Pancakes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of green peas
- pepper
- salt
- butter
- 2 beaten eggs
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1/2 teaspoonful of baking powder
- 1/2 cupful of flour

## Directions

1. Boil the peas expressly for this dish, mashed while hot, and rubbed through a colander.
2. Season with pepper, salt, and butter to taste; let them get cold; then add two beaten eggs and a cupful of milk.
3. Sift half a teaspoonful of baking powder twice through half a cupful of flour, and beat in lightly at the last.
4. Mix well and bake as you would griddle-cakes.
5. Eat hot.

title: Grilled Chicken Bones
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- wings, second joints, and drumsticks of cold cooked chicken
- melted butter
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Take the wings, second joints, and drumsticks of cold cooked chicken; dip them in melted butter, sprinkle them with salt and pepper, and broil them until they are very hot and well browned.

title: Guilemme
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart stock
- 3/4 cup carrot cut in thin strips 1½ inches long
- 3/4 cup turnip cut in thin strips 1½ inches long
- 2 tablespoons cooked peas and string beans cut in strips

## Directions

1. Cook carrot and turnip until tender
2. Add the stock, add peas and beans

title: Gumbo Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 slice bacon
- 1 large onion, sliced
- 2 quarts fresh tomatoes, peeled and cut up
- 1 quart okra, cut thin
- 1 teaspoonful chopped parsley
- 3 quarts hot broth
- 1 scant tablespoonful salt
- 1/2 teaspoonful pepper

## Directions

1. Try out the fat of bacon and drain it off
2. Fry the slices of onion brown in the bacon fat
3. Put tomatoes, okra, and chopped parsley together in a stew kettle with hot broth
4. Let it cook slowly for three hours
5. Season with salt and pepper

title: Habitant Sandwiches
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- buttered slices from roll loaf
- large apples
- cheese
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Prepare buttered slices from roll loaf
2. Pare large apples and slice through so each slice may fit on bread
3. Remove the seeds and core
4. Place on lower slice
5. Sprinkle a trifle of cheese over the apple, or spread with a rich mayonnaise

title: Hair Invigorator
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Bay rum, two pints
- Alcohol, one pint
- Castor oil, one ounce
- Carb. ammonia, half an ounce
- Tincture of cantharides, one ounce

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients well
2. This compound will promote the growth of the hair and prevent it from falling out

title: Hair Tonic
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Tincture of cantharides, one-half ounce
- Glycerine, one-half ounce
- Lime water, three ounces
- Distilled water, one ounce
- Eau de cologne, one-half ounce

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Bottle for use

title: Hair Wash
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Borax, one penny worth
- Olive oil, half a pint
- Boiling water, one pint

## Directions

1. Pour the boiling water over the borax and oil
2. Let it cool
3. Put the mixture into a bottle
4. Shake before using and apply with a flannel

title: Ham and Chutney
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup finely minced lean ham
- 1 or 2 tablespoonfuls chutney
- buttered slices of homemade bread

## Directions

1. Mix ham and chutney together
2. Spread on buttered slices of homemade bread

title: Ham and Egg Sandwich
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons finely chopped ham
- 4 hard-boiled eggs
- 1 teaspoon finely chopped parsley
- 3/4 teaspoon dry mustard
- a pinch of salt
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- buttered bread

## Directions

1. Put ham, eggs, parsley, dry mustard, salt, and melted butter into a mortar and pound them until a smooth paste
2. Spread mixture on buttered bread, cover with another slice, and cut into neat shapes

title: Ham and Veal Pie
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 or 2 lbs. veal
- 3 or 4 slices lean cooked ham
- Yolks of 2 hard-boiled eggs, sliced
- 1 pt. made gravy
- Seasoning of salt, pepper, blade of mace, a little nutmeg, and a strip of lemon peel minced
- A layer of good forcemeat
- puff paste
- yolk of egg
- Two ounces of lean ham or bacon
- six ounces breadcrumbs
- four ounces of beef suet
- two eggs
- a strip of lemon rind, minced
- half teaspoonful of minced parsley
- quarter teaspoonful mixed herbs

## Directions

1. Stew the veal very slowly for about half an hour, cut into small square pieces about two inches long; place at the bottom of the dish; season.
2. Layer with ham, then forcemeat; put the slices of egg on the top of the veal; fill the dish thus, the top layer being ham.
3. Put in half of the gravy and cover with puff paste with good centre ornament of leaves.
4. Brush the crust over with yolk of egg before baking.
5. Bake from one and a half to two hours.
6. Pour in the remainder of the gravy through a funnel.
7. For forcemeat: Chop well and mix before adding eggs.

title: Ham Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled ham
- eggs
- flour
- butter

## Directions

1. Take the odds and ends of boiled ham, chop fine
2. Add eggs and a little flour, mix and make in flat cakes
3. Fry in a little butter until brown

title: Ham Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- odds and ends of boiled ham
- eggs
- flour
- butter

## Directions

1. Take the odds and ends of boiled ham and chop fine
2. Add eggs and a little flour
3. Mix and make in flat cakes
4. Fry in a little butter until brown

title: Ham Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- mustard
- butter
- salt
- sugar
- pepper
- sweet milk
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Beat 2 eggs light with 1 tablespoon mustard, 1 tablespoon butter, 1 teaspoon salt, 1 tablespoon sugar, 1 teaspoon pepper
2. Stir in 1 cup sweet milk
3. Put on stove 3 1/2 cup vinegar and let scald
4. Cook the egg mixture and then pour in vinegar

title: Ham Sandwiches
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 tablespoonful mixed mustard
- 1 tablespoonful salad oil
- A little red pepper
- A pinch of salt
- Yolk of 1 egg
- chopped ham

## Directions

1. Rub the butter to a cream
2. Add mustard, salad oil, red or white pepper, salt, and yolk of an egg
3. Mix thoroughly
4. Stir in as much chopped ham as will make it consistent
5. Spread between thin slices of bread
6. Omit salad oil and substitute melted butter, if preferred

title: Ham Sandwiches, Plain
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- thin slices of bread
- butter
- thin slices of cold, boiled ham
- mustard

## Directions

1. Trim the crusts from thin slices of bread
2. Butter them
3. Lay between every two some thin slices of cold, boiled ham
4. Spread the meat with a little mustard, if liked

title: Ham Toast
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup boiled ham
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls milk
- 1 tablespoonful butter
- Pepper
- Buttered toast

## Directions

1. Put milk and butter in a saucepan, let them come to a boil
2. Add the ham, pepper and eggs beaten light
3. Stir constantly till it thickens
4. Serve on squares of buttered toast

title: Hamburg Steak
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 pounds raw meat from the round or poorer portions
- 2 cups bread crumbs soaked in milk
- 1 onion, minced
- 2 eggs
- salt and pepper to taste
- warm water
- butter

## Directions

1. Chop meat very finely
2. Add bread crumbs soaked in milk
3. Add minced onion
4. Season to taste
5. Add eggs
6. Make into a roll
7. Put in a baking pan
8. Pour over it warm water in which a piece of butter has been melted
9. Bake, basting frequently
10. Alternatively, may be made into small cakes and fried

title: Hamburg Steak (As Made in Hamburg)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- thin slices of beef from a round (uncooked)
- thyme or savory
- pepper
- salt
- pounded onions
- veal kidney suet
- flour
- butter or dripping
- boiling water

## Directions

1. Procure some thin slices of beef from a round (uncooked).
2. Pound a little to tender.
3. Divide into portions the size of your hand.
4. On each portion strew a little thyme, or savory, a little pepper, a dust of salt and some pounded onions.
5. Form the bits of beef into rolls with a bit of kidney suet in the inside.
6. Tie with twine, or if possible darn little silver skewers into the flap of each steak to keep rolled.
7. Dust in flour and place in a frying-pan with some butter or nice dripping; roll the steak so that each side may get brown.
8. Carefully pour in a cupful of boiling water, cover the frying-pan tight and set on some part of range where the steaks may cook very slowly.
9. Turn out in ten minutes or longer on a very hot dish and pour gravy over them.
10. A little more gravy may be supplied by browning some flour after lifting the steaks and thinning with boiling water.

title: Hamburg Steak (No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds beef
- 0.5 teaspoon pepper
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 0.5 cup boiling water
- 1 small onion, chopped fine
- 1 egg
- 0.5 cup flour
- 0.5 cup drippings

## Directions

1. Chop meat fine
2. Add seasonings
3. Beat egg and mix with meat
4. Shape in round cakes about 1 inch thick
5. Dredge with flour
6. Fry in dripping until browned
7. Add 0.5 cup boiling water
8. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes

title: Hamburg Steak (No. 3)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound beef, chopped fine or minced
- 1 egg
- 1 large onion
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- pepper
- salt
- sage

## Directions

1. Make in little patties
2. Fry a nice brown

title: Hamilton Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 30 ripe tomatoes
- 12 large apples
- 10 large onions
- 3 green peppers
- 12 tablespoons sugar
- 4 tablespoons salt
- 1 pint vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop fine
2. Cook 1 hour

title: Handy Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup sugar
- butter the size of an egg
- 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 2 small teaspoons baking powder
- flour to make a stiff batter
- vanilla for flavoring
- chocolate for icing

## Directions

1. Mix egg, sugar, butter, sweet milk, baking powder and flour to make a stiff batter
2. Flavor with vanilla
3. Bake in 1 large tin or in 2 small ones
4. Ice with chocolate

title: Hard Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup powdered sugar
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice
- 3/8 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Cream butter
2. add sugar gradually and flavoring
3. The beaten yolk or white of egg may be added; beat mixture well
4. Form on serving dish and put in cool place until used

title: Haricot Bean Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts of stock
- 1 pint of haricot beans
- pepper
- salt
- cold water
- fried bread

## Directions

1. Soak the beans all night in cold water, drain them and boil in cold water, slightly salted, till quite tender, about one and a half hours
2. Press them through a sieve with a spoon, and add them (leaving out the husks) to the stock, which should be warm
3. Add pepper and salt to taste
4. Boil up once more, and serve with a dish of fried bread cut into small squares

title: Hash
body:
## Ingredients

- any kind of left-over meat
- 1 large onion
- cold potatoes
- salt
- pepper
- butter or dripping

## Directions

1. Mince meat fine
2. Add large onion
3. Add as many cold potatoes as the meat and onions together
4. Add salt and pepper to taste
5. Fry in either butter or dripping

title: Hashed Roast Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups roast beef
- 1 large onion
- 3 tablespoons flour
- butter size of an egg
- 1 cup water
- pepper and salt

## Directions

1. Cut beef fine with knife
2. Cut onion fine
3. Put butter and flour in pan and brown
4. Put in cut beef and onion
5. Stir well
6. Add cup of water, a little more if too thick
7. Season with pepper and salt to taste
8. Let boil 15 minutes

title: Hasty Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 dessertspoon butter
- 2 small teaspoons baking powder
- fruit of any kind

## Directions

1. Combine ingredients with flavoring.
2. Steam with fruit of any kind, either put in the bottom or put on after.
3. Use with cream and sugar.

title: Heisser-Kraut Salat (German)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Half a hard crisp cabbage
- Butter
- Vinegar
- Water
- Boiled pickled pigs' knuckle

## Directions

1. Slice as fine as possible half a hard crisp cabbage. Should be in shreds; put in frying-pan with butter and cook slightly, turning carefully.
2. Pour over it vinegar and water and cover closely until cooked.
3. Serve hot with boiled pickled pigs' knuckle that has been carefully and slowly cooked until almost jellied.

title: Hermit Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 large cup sugar
- 3/4 cup shortening
- 1/4 cup sour milk
- 3/4 teaspoon soda
- 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon
- 2 cups oatmeal
- 1 cup chopped raisins

## Directions

1. Drop in tins and bake.

title: Hermit Cookies 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 1 large cup raisins stoned and chopped
- 1 teaspoon mixed spice
- 3/4 nutmeg
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- flour to roll out

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients and roll out and bake.

title: Hermits
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1 large cup butter or lard
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon mixed spice
- 1 nutmeg
- 1 cup currants
- 1 cup raisins chopped
- 1 cup nuts
- 5 teaspoons sour milk
- 3.5 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Beat sugar, butter and eggs together
2. Add other ingredients, flour and soda last
3. Drop in a long tin and bake in a moderate oven

title: Hermits (Variation)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1.5 cups brown sugar
- 1 cup butter or half lard
- 2 cups raisins
- 1 cup currants
- 1 cup walnuts
- 1 small teaspoon soda
- 2.5 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Mix eggs, brown sugar, butter, raisins, currants, walnuts, soda, flour and cinnamon
2. Drop mixture in teaspoonfuls in buttered pan and bake, or roll out thin like tea cakes

title: Hickory Nut Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs, leaving out white of 1
- 1 cup sugar, flavor if desired
- butter size of an egg
- 1½ cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup nut meats
- a little sweet milk

## Directions

1. Beat eggs
2. Add sugar and butter; beat together well
3. Add flour, in which sift baking powder
4. Add enough sweet milk to make rather thin batter
5. Lastly add part of nuts chopped
6. Bake in layers
7. Put together with remaining white of egg beaten with granulated sugar till stiff, and cover with halved nuts

title: Hickory-Nut Candy
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup nut meats
- 1/4 cup water
- 2 cups sugar
- A pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Boil sugar and water without stirring until thick enough to spin a thread
2. Set off to cool
3. Stir until white, and add nut meats
4. Turn into a flat tin and when cold cut in squares

title: Hickson Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 large cucumbers
- 3 large onions
- 1 green pepper
- salt
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop onions
2. Sprinkle with salt
3. Let stand 24 hours
4. Drain
5. Cover with vinegar

title: Highlander's Delight
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. veal
- 3 lbs. of bones from neck or knuckle of calf (well cracked)
- 1 onion minced
- 1 turnip
- 1 carrot grated
- 4 qts. cold water
- Bunch sweet herbs chopped
- 1/4 cup barley
- Salt and pepper
- 1 tablespoonful oatmeal

## Directions

1. Put meat, cut into dice, bones, chopped vegetables, and herbs on in the water and boil very slowly six hours.
2. Season and set away in a cold place until next day.
3. Take off the fat two hours before dinner, strain out the soup into a kettle and add the barley, which has been already soaked in warm water two hours, and cooked fifteen minutes in enough boiling water to cover it well.
4. Put in with it the water in which it has been cooked, and simmer all together for half an hour.
5. The oatmeal should have been soaked several hours in a little warm water.
6. Stir it into the soup, and let all boil gently together for one hour before pouring out.

title: Home-Made Yeast
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup flour
- 1 cup salt
- 1 cup sugar
- 4 quarts of water
- three large handfuls of hops
- White Swan Yeast Cake
- 12 large potatoes

## Directions

1. Put 1 cup flour, 1 cup salt, 1 cup sugar in a dish and mix well together
2. Put 4 quarts of water in a pot and when boiling put in three large handfuls of hops
3. Boil thirty minutes, pour on flour, sugar and salt
4. When cool, put in White Swan Yeast Cake to start with
5. Boil 12 large potatoes, mash fine, and add to mixture
6. Cover tight, put in a warm place till it ferments
7. Shake well before using

title: Home-Made Yeast
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 medium-sized potatoes
- 1/4 cup hops
- 1 quart boiling water
- 1/4 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 2 level tablespoons salt
- 1 White Swan Yeast Cake

## Directions

1. Boil the potatoes, drain away the water, and mash the potatoes until free from lumps.
2. Pour the boiling water, which may contain the water drained from the potatoes, over the hops and simmer 15 minutes.
3. Measure into a three-quart bowl, or crock, the flour, sugar and salt, and mix them thoroughly.
4. Strain the hop water, and add at once to the crock, stirring rapidly all the time.
5. Add the mashed potatoes and give the whole a thorough beating.
6. Cool to 70° or 80° F., and add one White Swan Yeast Cake or one dry yeast cake soaked in 1/4 cup of warm water for half an hour.
7. Keep at a temperature of 70° F. for 3 or 4 hours, stirring down as often as it comes to the top.
8. Bottle and keep in a cool place. Do not cork it tightly at first.

title: Hominy
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint hominy
- 2 and one-half pints boiling water
- 1 half pint sweet milk
- salt

## Directions

1. Soak one pint of hominy in two and one-half pints of boiling water over night, in a tin vessel with a tight cover
2. In the morning add one-half pint of sweet milk, and a little salt
3. Place on a brisk fire in a kettle of boiling water, the tin vessel containing the hominy
4. Let boil one-half hour

title: Honey Caramels
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup extracted honey of best flavor
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 3 tablespoons sweet cream or milk
- 1 teaspoon extract of vanilla

## Directions

1. Boil honey, sugar, and cream or milk to soft crack, or until it hardens when dropped into cold water but not too brittle, just so it will form into a soft ball when taken in the fingers
2. Pour into a greased dish, stirring in vanilla just as removed from the stove

title: Honey Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup honey
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 tablespoon ginger
- cinnamon
- a little allspice

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together and bake.

title: Honey Fruit-Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups honey
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 2 eggs well beaten
- 3 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 cups raisins
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Bake

title: Honey Ginger-Snaps
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint honey
- 3/4 pound butter
- 2 teaspoons ginger
- flour

## Directions

1. Boil honey, butter and ginger together a few minutes
2. When nearly cold, put in flour until it is stiff
3. Roll out thin and bake quickly

title: Honey Nut-Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 cups sugar
- 2 cups honey
- 4 cups milk or water
- 1 pound almonds
- 1 pound English walnuts
- 3 cents' worth candied lemon peel
- 3 cents' worth candied orange peel
- 5 cents' worth citron
- 2 large tablespoons soda
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon

## Directions

1. Combine sugar, honey and milk or water
2. Cut candied lemon peel, orange peel and citron fine
3. Add almonds and walnuts
4. Add soda and cinnamon
5. Mix together

title: Honey Nut-Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 cups sugar
- 2 cups honey
- 4 cups milk or water
- 1 pound almonds
- 1 pound English walnuts
- 3 cents' worth candied lemon peel
- 3 cents' worth candied orange peel
- 5 cents' worth citron
- 2 large tablespoons soda
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 2 teaspoons ground cloves
- flour

## Directions

1. Put the milk, sugar and honey on the stove to boil 15 minutes
2. Skim off the scum, and take from the stove
3. Put in the nuts, spices and candied fruit (cut fine)
4. Stir in as much flour as can be done with a spoon
5. Set away to cool, then mix in the soda (don't make the dough too stiff)
6. Cover up and let stand over night
7. Work in flour enough to make a stiff dough
8. Bake when you get ready
9. Roll out a little thicker than a common cookie, cut in any shape you like

title: Honey Pop-Corn Balls
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint extracted honey
- freshly popped corn

## Directions

1. Put honey into an iron frying-pan
2. Boil until very thick
3. Stir in freshly popped corn
4. When cool mould into balls

title: Honey Short-Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 cup shortening
- 1 1/2 cups sweet milk
- butter
- pound of the best flavored honey

## Directions

1. Mix flour, baking powder, salt, shortening, and sweet milk
2. Roll quickly, and bake in a hot oven
3. When done, split the cake and spread the lower half thinly with butter, and the upper half with pound of the best flavored honey
4. Let it stand a few minutes, and the honey will melt gradually, and the flavor will permeate all through the cake
5. To be eaten with milk

title: Honey Taffy
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint white sugar
- 4 tablespoons honey
- a little water

## Directions

1. Boil till brittle and pull

title: Honey Tea-Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup honey
- 1/2 cup sour cream
- 2 eggs
- 1/2 cup butter
- 2 cups flour
- scant 1/2 teaspoon soda
- 1 tablespoon cream tartar

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Bake 30 minutes in a moderate oven

title: Honey-Cake or Cookies without Sugar or Molasses
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups honey
- 1 cup butter
- 4 eggs
- 1 cup buttermilk
- 1 good quart flour
- 1 level teaspoon soda or saleratus

## Directions

1. Mix honey, butter and eggs well together
2. Add buttermilk and mix
3. Stir in flour and soda, adding a little more flour if too thin to make proper consistency
4. Add flavoring if desired
5. Bake in a rather slow oven, as it burns very easily
6. To make cookies, use a little more flour so they will roll out well without sticking to the board

title: Honey-Drop Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup honey
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter or lard
- 1/2 cup sour milk
- 1 egg
- 1/2 tablespoon soda
- 4 cups sifted flour

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Bake

title: Honey-Gems
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts flour
- 3 tablespoons melted lard
- 3/4 pint honey
- 1/4 pint molasses
- four heaping teaspoons brown sugar
- 13/4 level tablespoons soda
- 1 level teaspoon salt
- 1 pint water
- 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract

## Directions

1. Mix flour, melted lard, honey, molasses, brown sugar, soda, salt, water and vanilla extract together

title: Honey-Jumbles
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts flour
- 3 tablespoons melted lard
- 1 pint honey
- 3/4 pint molasses
- level tablespoons soda
- 1 level teaspoon salt
- 3/4 pint water
- 3/4 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix flour, melted lard, honey, molasses, soda, salt, water and vanilla together

title: Honeycomb Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 1 cup beef suet chopped or 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 teaspoon soda
- a little salt
- spice to taste
- 3 cups flour

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Steam 3 hours.
3. Serve with hard sauce made by stirring together a cup of brown sugar and 1/2 cup butter flavored with vanilla.

title: Horseradish Sauce
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One-half teaspoon mustard
- Two teaspoons granulated sugar
- Salt and pepper to taste
- One-quarter cup vinegar
- One-quarter cup grated horseradish
- Three-quarters cup whipped cream

## Directions

1. Mix mustard and sugar, vinegar, etc.; add radish; add three-quarters cup whipped cream.

title: Hot Almond Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one-quarter pound ground almonds
- one pound sugar
- one-quarter pound suet
- two eggs
- one-quarter pound flour
- one teacupful water
- two ounces currants
- two ounces raisins
- one ounce preserved cherries
- a little angelica
- a little ground mace
- one-quarter nutmeg, grated
- one-quarter teaspoonful ground ginger
- a few drops almond extract

## Directions

1. Chop the suet fine
2. Add all the other ingredients and work them together for ten minutes, so that all is well mixed
3. Boil for three hours or more

title: Hot Baking Powder Biscuits
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Two cups flour sifted well
- Four teaspoons baking-powder
- One scant teaspoon salt
- One tablespoon lard
- One tablespoon butter
- Three-quarters cup milk (or water, or both)

## Directions

1. Mix to a soft dough; drop on pan, or roll out.

title: Hot Biscuits
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 tablespoon lard
- pinch of salt
- sweet milk

## Directions

1. Mix flour, 3 teaspoons baking powder, 1 tablespoon lard, and pinch of salt well
2. Add sweet milk enough to make a soft dough
3. Bake in a hot oven

title: Hot Cabbage Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup vinegar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon mustard
- 1 tablespoon brown sugar
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 3/2 head of cabbage
- pepper and salt

## Directions

1. Bring vinegar and butter to a boil
2. Mix mustard, brown sugar, egg, and sweet milk thoroughly, and stir these in with vinegar and butter until it boils
3. Chop 3/2 head of cabbage, season with pepper and salt, put it into the dressing and let it come to a boil

title: Hot Chocolate Sauce for Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one-quarter cake unsweetened chocolate
- three-quarters of a cup of powdered sugar
- one-half cup of boiling water

## Directions

1. Melt chocolate with powdered sugar and boiling water, stirring all the time
2. Cook in a double boiler to the consistency of molasses
3. Serve hot

title: Hot Corn Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can corn
- 1 egg
- 1 cupful sweet milk
- 5 sodas rolled
- salt and pepper to taste
- a little butter

## Directions

1. Mix corn, egg, milk, rolled sodas, salt, pepper and butter
2. Bake in oven until brown

title: Hot Cross Buns
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups milk
- 1 cup soft yeast or 1/2 cake compressed yeast dissolved in 1 cup water
- 1/2 cup melted butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 nutmeg
- 1 saltspoonful salt
- flour to make soft dough

## Directions

1. Mix milk, yeast and add flour to make a thick batter.
2. Set as a sponge over night.
3. In the morning add melted butter, sugar, nutmeg, grated, salt.
4. Add sufficient flour to make a soft dough.
5. Form into balls, flatten out with the hand, and mark deeply in the form of a cross with the back of a knife.
6. Lay on buttered tins, and set to rise, and bake when light.
7. Some cooks add a teaspoonful of coriander seeds.

title: Hot Cross Buns
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 White Swan Yeast Cake
- water
- flour
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup butter and lard mixed
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1/2 cup sugar

## Directions

1. Soak 1/2 White Swan Yeast Cake at noon
2. Stir in a thin batter about 3 o'clock
3. In the evening add a quart of water and flour enough to make a thin batter
4. Set in a warm place to rise over night
5. At 4 in the morning add eggs, butter and lard mixed, salt, and sugar
6. Mix in a stiff dough the same as bread
7. Let rise again, then knead
8. When it rises make into loaves and put in pans
9. Let rise and bake in hot oven

title: Hot Cucumber Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 or 4 large green cucumbers
- 1 onion minced fine
- 2 tablespoons lard
- salt and pepper to taste
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 cup vinegar

## Directions

1. Pare and slice cucumbers
2. put 2 tablespoons lard in a frying pan over the fire
3. when hot put cucumbers and onion in and simmer till tender
4. add salt and pepper to taste, a tablespoon flour, 1 cup sour cream, and cup vinegar
5. serve hot

title: Hot Gingerbread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon nutmeg

## Directions

1. Combine molasses, butter, milk, and flour
2. Add soda, ginger, and salt
3. Add raisins, cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg

title: Hot Gingerbread No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon lard
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3/4 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup dark molasses
- 1 egg yolk
- 1 cup boiling water
- 2 tablespoons ginger
- 1 large teaspoon baking soda
- 2 good cups flour

## Directions

1. Stir lard and butter with brown sugar
2. Add dark molasses and egg yolk
3. Beat well
4. Add boiling water
5. Add ginger and baking soda
6. Add flour

title: Hot Slaw
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- water
- salt
- 1 egg yolk
- 1 teaspoon of sugar
- salt and pepper
- 1 cup vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop and cook in water with a little salt some cabbage
2. When done, drain, leaving a little water to prevent scorching
3. Pour over the cabbage this dressing: the yolk of 1 egg, 1 teaspoon of sugar, salt and pepper, and 1 cup vinegar, well beaten together

title: Hot Supper Dish
body:
## Ingredients

- buttered bread
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup grated cheese
- 1 cup sweet milk

## Directions

1. Line a baking dish with buttered bread
2. Whip 2 eggs, 1 cup grated cheese, 1 cup sweet milk together
3. Pour over bread
4. Bake in a very hot oven

title: Hot Supper-Dish
body:
## Ingredients

- bits of left-over vegetables
- small onion (if liked)
- salt and pepper to taste
- cream
- loaf bread (optional)
- milk with butter (optional)
- 1 egg
- 2 tablespoons water (optional)

## Directions

1. Save all the bits left in the vegetable dishes at noon
2. Mince finely and add a small onion if liked
3. Add salt and pepper to taste
4. Moisten with cream
5. Put in a hot oven and serve as soon as browned
6. If there are not enough vegetables, crumb up a piece of loaf and add
7. If cream is not obtainable, use milk with a few bits of butter scattered over the top of the dish
8. Alternatively, take 1 egg, beat until light, add 2 tablespoons water and pour over the mixture, using the bits of butter as with the milk

title: Hot Supper-Dish
body:
## Ingredients

- vegetable bits
- a small onion
- salt
- pepper
- cream
- loaf bread
- milk
- butter
- egg
- water

## Directions

1. Save all the bits left in the vegetable dishes at noon
2. Mince finely
3. Add a small onion if liked
4. Add salt and pepper to taste
5. Moisten with cream
6. Put in a hot oven and serve as soon as browned
7. If there are not enough vegetables, crumb up a piece of loaf and add
8. If cream is not obtainable, use milk with a few bits of butter scattered over the top of the dish, or take 1 egg, beat until light, add 2 tablespoons water and pour over the mixture, using the bits of butter as with the milk

title: Hot Tartare Sauce
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful butter
- 1 tablespoonful flour
- Water to make sauce
- Yolk of 1 egg
- 1 teaspoonful of vinegar
- 1 teaspoonful chopped cucumber pickles

## Directions

1. Melt butter in saucepan; stir in flour, enough boiling water to make it not too thick; let stand to cool five minutes, then drop in yolk of egg and beat up and add a little more butter and water if too thick; then add vinegar and one teaspoonful of chopped pickled cucumber.

title: Hot Water Layer Or Loaf Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- heaping teaspoon butter
- 3/4 cup boiling water
- 2 beaten eggs
- 1/4 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Stir sugar, 1 cup flour, and heaping teaspoon butter all together
2. Add 3/4 cup boiling water
3. Add 2 beaten eggs
4. Add 1/4 cup flour and 1 teaspoon baking powder
5. Bake

title: Hot Water Sponge Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 1 egg
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 3/4 cup hot water

## Directions

1. Sift flour and cream tartar together
2. Whip sugar and egg to a cream
3. Add sifted flour
4. Add soda in hot water last
5. Bake in a hot oven

title: Hot-Roll Biscuits
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 tablespoons lard or butter
- a pinch of salt
- 1 cup white sugar
- 1 egg beaten well

## Directions

1. Mix 6 cups flour, 3 teaspoons baking powder, 2 tablespoons lard or butter, a pinch of salt well to make a soft dough
2. Roll out thin
3. Spread with filling of 1 cup white sugar and 1 egg beaten well
4. Roll like a jelly roll
5. Cut in slices 1 inch thick
6. Flour the pans well and bake in a hot oven

title: House of Refuge Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups yellow sugar
- 2 cups sour milk
- 1 3/4 pounds currants
- 1 3/4 pounds raisins
- 1 pound dates
- 5 cents' worth shelled almonds or walnuts
- 3 cents' worth lemon peel
- 2 teaspoons soda
- 3/4 teaspoon cloves
- 1/4 teaspoon allspice
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon vanilla
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- nutmeg grated
- 4 cups flour

## Directions

1. This cake must bake very slowly

title: How to Broil a Porterhouse Steak
body:
## Ingredients

- steak, cut 1 inch thick
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- water

## Directions

1. Have steak cut 1 inch thick
2. Cut off the tail-ends of 2 medium-sized steaks
3. Trim off all excess fat, leaving the portions containing the T bone for broiling
4. Place on broiler and broil over hot coals for about 7 minutes
5. Turn and broil the other side
6. If no broiler is at hand, heat thick frying pan very hot, smear with some of the fat and put steak in, turning the same as when broiler is used
7. Season with salt and pepper
8. When cooked put on hot platter, putting bits of butter over meat
9. Add a very little water to pan, and put in platter, but do not pour it over meat as that toughens it
10. Serve at once

title: Hunters' Beef
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- A round of beef
- 1/4 lb. of saltpetre, powdered
- 1/2 lb. of common salt
- 1 oz. of black pepper
- 1/2 lb. of brown sugar
- 1 oz. of allspice
- A little cayenne
- Beef suet
- 1 pint of water

## Directions

1. Bone and bind the beef tight
2. If large rub into it a quarter of a pound of saltpetre, powdered
3. Let it stand a day
4. Season it with half a pound of common salt, one ounce of black pepper, half a pound of brown sugar and an ounce of allspice
5. Add a little cayenne
6. Let it remain in the pickle a fortnight, turning it every day (and about three times a week add a small quantity of common salt)
7. Wash off the salt and spice and put in a granite or tin dishpan deep enough to cover the beef entirely
8. Lay some beef suet at the bottom and a great deal at the top
9. Put in a pint of water and cover it with a thick crust
10. Bake seven or eight hours
11. When it comes out of the oven pour off the gravy
12. Do not cut it till cold

title: Ice Apples
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 dozen large apples
- sugar
- butter
- nutmeg
- cake icing
- cream

## Directions

1. Pare and core 1 dozen large apples
2. Fill with sugar, a little butter and nutmeg
3. Bake until nearly done
4. Let cool
5. Remove to another plate
6. Ice top on sides with cake icing
7. Brown lightly
8. Serve with cream

title: Ice Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 qt. milk
- 2 cups sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls cornstarch
- vanilla flavoring to taste

## Directions

1. Put milk on to boil.
2. Dissolve cornstarch in two tablespoons of cold milk.
3. Stir into boiling milk.
4. Cook five minutes, strain, add sugar, flavor to taste.
5. When perfectly cold, freeze.

title: Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 egg yolks
- 3 cups milk
- 1/2 cup white sugar
- 3 egg whites
- 4 cups sweet cream
- vanilla flavoring

## Directions

1. Make a custard of the yolks of 3 eggs and 3 cups milk, add 1/2 cup white sugar
2. Let the custard get cold
3. Beat the 3 whites of eggs stiff and beat them into 4 cups sweet cream
4. Add the custard, sweeten to taste, flavor with vanilla and freeze

title: Ice Cream Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup cornstarch
- 1/4 cup butter
- 3 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- 1/4 cup milk
- 1 teaspoonful flavoring
- 1 cup flour
- Whites of 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar together, add milk and flavoring, sift in flour, cornstarch, and baking powder mixed together, lastly add the whites of eggs beaten to a stiff froth.
2. Bake in a square pan and ice with white icing.

title: Ice Cream Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- whites of 3 eggs
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar
- 2 cups sifted flour
- yolks of 3 eggs
- icing sugar
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix whites of 3 eggs, brown sugar, butter, sweet milk, soda, cream tartar, and sifted flour
2. Bake
3. For icing: thicken yolks of 3 eggs with icing sugar and 1 teaspoon vanilla

title: Ice Cream Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs (whites only)
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar (white)
- 1 cup flour
- 1/2 cup cornstarch
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 3/4 cup sweet milk

## Directions

1. Mix butter and sugar together
2. Add milk and flour
3. Add lastly beaten egg whites
4. Flavor
5. Bake

title: Ice Cream No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint milk
- 2 egg yolks
- 6 ounces sugar
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch
- 1 pint whipped cream
- 2 egg whites
- flavoring

## Directions

1. Scald milk with yolks of 2 eggs, 6 ounces sugar, and 1 tablespoon cornstarch until thick
2. When cold, add 1 pint whipped cream and whites of 2 eggs beaten stiff
3. Flavor and freeze

title: Ice Cream No. 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 2 cups granulated sugar
- 1 pint cream
- 1 quart milk
- 1 tablespoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites and yolks separately
2. Beat 2 cups granulated sugar with yolks
3. Mix all well together: beaten eggs, sugar, 1 pint cream, 1 quart milk, and 1 tablespoon vanilla
4. Freeze
5. This makes 1 gallon ice cream

title: Ice Cream Soda
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart boiling water
- 1 pound granulated sugar
- 1 ounce tartaric acid
- 2 eggs
- soda

## Directions

1. Put 1 quart boiling water, 1 pound granulated sugar, 1 ounce tartaric acid together and boil 20 minutes
2. Remove from stove and pour over the beaten whites of 2 eggs
3. Let cool and flavor
4. Put in jar and keep in cool place
5. 2 tablespoons to 3/4 cup of water and a pinch of soda makes a refreshing drink

title: Ice Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 pt. milk
- 1 tablespoonful sugar
- 4 tablespoonfuls sherry
- 1 pt. cream
- white cherries
- plums
- citron
- almonds, pounded
- angelica
- pineapple
- 1/2 glass curagao
- macaroons, crushed
- candied ginger
- red cherries

## Directions

1. Make custard of milk and eggs and flavoring, the night before, as it is better.
2. The fruit must be cut fine, having been soaked the night before in curagao.
3. Whip cream a little, mix cold custard with it, half freeze in freezer.
4. Do this very slowly, then mix in macaroons, then fruit.
5. Let freeze a while longer.
6. When frozen put in shape.

title: Icing for Devil Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- ½ cup butter
- 2 tablespoons chocolate
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. cook till waxy
2. then add vanilla and beat till creamy
3. then spread between layers and on top of cake

title: Icing for Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup icing sugar
- 2 tablespoons thick sweet cream
- 3 or 4 drops rose water
- 1/2 teaspoon cocoa

## Directions

1. Stir till smooth
2. Spread on cake
3. Sprinkle with chopped nuts

title: Icing for Pastry
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- White of 1 egg
- Pounded sugar

## Directions

1. Put the white of an egg on a plate, and with the blade of a knife beat to a stiff froth
2. When the pastry is nearly baked, brush it over with this, and sift over some pounded sugar
3. Put it back into the oven to set the glaze, and in a few minutes it will be done
4. Great care should be taken that the paste does not catch or burn in the oven, which it is very liable to do after the icing is laid on
5. Or make a meringue by adding a tablespoonful of white sugar to the beaten white of one egg
6. Spread over the top, and slightly brown in the oven

title: Icing for Toronto Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup granulated sugar
- white of 1 egg
- 1/2 cup raisins seeded and halved

## Directions

1. Boil sugar till it threads from a fork
2. Beat the white of the egg stiff
3. Beat in the hot syrup
4. Mix in 1/2 cup raisins seeded and halved
5. Spread on and between cake

title: Icing for White Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of 3 eggs
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks of 3 eggs until light
2. beat in powdered sugar until it is hard enough to spread on cake
3. This frosting will harden better in a cool, dark place

title: Imitation Goose
body:
## Ingredients

- sage and onion dressing
- cold meat
- gravy

## Directions

1. Make a good quantity of sage and onion dressing
2. Grease a pie dish
3. Place alternate layers of dressing and small pieces of meat till the dish is full, having dressing for the top layer
4. Have ready enough gravy thickened and flavored to taste, to moisten the whole
5. Bake about 1 hour

title: Imperial Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. sugar
- 1 lb. butter
- 10 eggs
- Juice and rind of 1 lemon
- 1 lb. flour
- 1 lb. almonds
- 1/2 lb. raisins
- 1/4 lb. citron
- 1 teaspoonful nectarine
- 2 tablespoonfuls rose water
- 1 tablespoonful brandy

## Directions

1. Sugar and butter stirred to a cream, then beaten yolks of eggs, grated rind and juice of lemon, then flour and stiff whites of the eggs; have prepared beforehand one pound of almonds blanched and split (or, if you prefer, pounded), raisins stoned and halved and citron cut in thin slips; have these well dredged with two tablespoonfuls of extra flour; one teaspoonful of extract of nectarine in one teaspoonful of water, rose water, brandy.

title: Imperial Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound granulated sugar
- 1/2 pound butter
- 1/2 pound flour
- 3/4 pound blanched almonds (split)
- 1/2 pound raisins split while stoning
- 3/4 pound citron peel
- 1/2 lemon
- 5 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoon extract nectarine in 1 teaspoon water
- 1 tablespoon rose water
- 1 tablespoon brandy

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar and yolks of eggs
2. Grate the rind of lemon and add the juice
3. Add the flour sifted in alternately with the whites of the eggs beaten stiff
4. Add the extracts
5. Dredge the fruit with a little flour
6. Put 1/2 the batter in the pan, then put all the fruit on top of that, then the rest of batter on top of the fruit
7. Bake in a very slow oven about 2 hours

title: India Pickles
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 pound turmeric
- 2 ounces ground ginger
- 0.5 pound mustard
- 2 ounces allspice
- 0.5 pound mustard seed
- 0.5 ounce cayenne
- 1 ounce curry powder
- 4 quarts malt vinegar
- Vegetables

## Directions

1. Boil these ingredients five minutes with vinegar
2. Pour over the vegetables while the mixture is hot
3. Soak vegetables at least eight days in strong salt and water, then dry them
4. Put them into jars, not too closely packed
5. Pour over them the above mixture

title: Indian Bread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt. Indian meal
- 1 qt. milk or water
- 1 pt. Graham flour
- 1 cup wheat flour
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- ½ cup yeast, or 1 cake

## Directions

1. Scald Indian meal with milk or water; boiling milk and water can be used, half and half
2. When cool add: Graham flour, wheat flour, butter (melted), salt, yeast
3. Dissolve yeast cake in a cup half full of warm water
4. Mix at night and let rise
5. In the morning stir down; put in a well-buttered pan, letting it rise first for half an hour
6. Bake slowly

title: Indian Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 apples
- 12 tomatoes
- 9 onions
- 1 quart vinegar
- 2½ cups brown sugar
- 1 teaspoon mustard
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- ½ teaspoon red pepper
- salt to taste

## Directions

1. Peel and core 12 apples
2. Peel 12 tomatoes
3. Peel 9 onions
4. Boil into 1 quart vinegar, 2½ cups brown sugar, 1 teaspoon mustard, 1 teaspoon ginger, 1 teaspoon cloves, ½ teaspoon red pepper
5. Add salt to taste

title: Indian Pickle with Whole Spices
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts best vinegar
- 1 ounce whole ginger
- 1 ounce whole allspice
- 1 ounce tumeric powder
- ½ ounce chillies
- ½ pound mustard
- ½ pound salt
- ½ pound sugar
- cucumbers
- onions
- cauliflower

## Directions

1. Bruise 1 ounce whole ginger
2. Mix 2 quarts best vinegar, 1 ounce whole ginger, 1 ounce whole allspice, 1 ounce tumeric powder, ½ ounce chillies, ½ pound mustard, ½ pound salt, ½ pound sugar
3. Boil all together 15 minutes
4. Put in a crock
5. Add cucumbers, onions, cauliflower, as gathered
6. Stir occasionally
7. In 3 weeks' time after last pickles are added, rescald liquid and pour over when cool

title: Indian Relish
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck green tomatoes
- 2 large onions
- 2 heads cabbage
- salt
- 3 pounds brown sugar
- 1 cup grated horseradish
- 2 tablespoons mustard
- 4 tablespoons celery seed
- 1 tablespoon ground mace
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop all fine, and sprinkle with salt
2. Stand over night and drain
3. Add brown sugar, horseradish, mustard, celery seed, and ground mace
4. Cover with vinegar and boil slowly 1 hour

title: Indian Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart green tomatoes
- 1 quart cabbage
- 3 large onions
- 1/4 ounce tumeric seed
- 1/4 ounce celery seed
- 1/4 ounce small red peppers
- 1/4 ounce white mustard seed
- 1/4 ounce whole cloves
- 1/4 ounce root ginger
- 1/4 ounce allspice
- 1/4 quart strong vinegar
- 1 pound brown sugar

## Directions

1. Chop fine tomatoes, cabbage and onions
2. Put all spices in a bag made of clean muslin
3. Add to vegetables
4. Add vinegar and brown sugar
5. Boil all together for about 3/4 hour

title: Indian Sauce 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 tomatoes
- 12 apples
- 8 large onions
- 2 pounds raisins
- 3/4 gallon vinegar
- 2 pounds brown sugar
- 3/4 pound mustard
- 2 teaspoons allspice
- 2 teaspoons ginger
- 2 teaspoons cloves
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 2 teaspoons tumeric
- 1 cup salt

## Directions

1. Chop fine
2. Boil 1 hour
3. Rub through colander
4. Add vinegar, brown sugar, mustard, allspice, ginger, cloves, cinnamon, tumeric, and salt
5. Boil 3/4 hour and stir occasionally

title: Irish Pot Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds fresh beef
- 4 carrots
- 1 turnip
- 1 dozen potatoes
- 2 onions
- 2 quarts flour
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar
- 1 teaspoon soda
- milk or cold water
- salt
- pepper
- summer savory

## Directions

1. Make dough with 2 quarts flour, 2 teaspoons cream tartar, 1 teaspoon soda, mixed with milk or cold water as for biscuit with no lard
2. Roll about 1 inch thick and cut into 4-inch squares
3. Cut meat into small pieces
4. Put in a layer of beef in bottom of pot
5. Add alternating layers of carrots, turnip, potatoes, dough and meat
6. Add salt, pepper, and a little summer savory
7. Add water until you see it through the vegetables
8. Cook slowly 3 hours

title: Irish Stew
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- three pounds of lean mutton
- two tablespoonfuls of butter or beef dripping
- large sliced onion
- cold water
- four potatoes
- carrot
- tomato
- stalk of celery
- tablespoonful of chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Cut three pounds of mutton, which must be lean, into pieces of uniform size, and not more than an inch square.
2. Heat two tablespoonfuls of butter or beef dripping in a saucepan, brown a large sliced onion in it and put in the meat.
3. Turn it over and over until coated with the fat, and slightly browned, add enough cold water to cover the meat an inch deep, put on a tightly fitting top, and stew two hours, or until the meat is very tender.
4. Have ready in another vessel four potatoes, sliced thin, a carrot cut into dice, a tomato cut into bits, a stalk of celery minced, and a tablespoonful of chopped parsley.

title: Irish Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 pounds of stewing meat
- 1 onion
- 1 carrot
- 1 turnip
- 3 medium-sized potatoes
- salt
- pepper
- parsley

## Directions

1. Season with salt and pepper
2. Cut up meat in small pieces
3. Put on to boil with carrots and turnips, cut in small squares
4. When nearly done, put in potatoes
5. A little parsley will give it a nice flavor

title: Irish Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh bacon
- potatoes
- sage
- pepper
- salt
- flour
- water

## Directions

1. Take a fresh piece of bacon, cut in small pieces, put in a kettle and stew
2. Add potatoes cut in small pieces, a little sage, pepper and salt and flour and water
3. Serve hot

title: Italian Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Three cups of cream
- one cup of milk
- one box of gelatine
- sugar to taste
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Whip cream and milk stiff.
2. Put the sugar with the gelatine when it is hot.
3. Flavor with vanilla.
4. Stir till it thickens, then mould.

title: Jam Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- yolks of 3 eggs
- 1/2 glass jam or jelly
- 4 tablespoons sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in a little hot water
- 2 cups sifted flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- whites of 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Cream together sugar and butter
2. Beat the yolks of eggs
3. Mix in jam or jelly
4. Mix in sour milk and soda dissolved in a little hot water
5. Mix in sifted flour and baking powder
6. Beat the whites of the eggs and add at the last
7. Bake in jelly cake tins

title: Jam Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1/2 cup sour cream
- 1/2 cup jam
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 small cups flour

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Bake

title: Jam Cakes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 3 teaspoonfuls soda dissolved in 3 tablespoonfuls boiling water
- Flour to make stiff dough
- any kind of jelly

## Directions

1. Roll thin
2. cut with cookie-cutter
3. when cooked and while hot spread with any kind of jelly and stick two together

title: Jam Jams
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 cups Graham flour
- 2 3/4 cups white flour
- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1/2 cup buttermilk
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- jam

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Cut out and put jam between

title: Jam Sandwiches
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- thin fingers of nice pastry
- rich jam or jelly

## Directions

1. Bake very thin fingers of nice pastry
2. When cold spread daintily on the top of each finger a very little rich jam or jelly
3. Serve laid in star fashion on a large flat plate

title: Jellied Apples
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 dozen or more tart apples
- sugar
- cinnamon
- 1/4 cup water
- whipped cream or boiled custard

## Directions

1. Pare and slice thin 1 dozen or more tart apples
2. Place in a pudding dish alternate layers of apples and sugar
3. Add a dust of cinnamon
4. Pour over it 1/4 cup of water
5. Lay a buttered plate over the top
6. Cook slowly for 3 hours
7. Set in a cool place
8. When ready turn out in a glass dish
9. Serve with whipped cream or boiled custard

title: Jellied Apples and Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- large apples
- 1 pint water
- large cup sugar
- heaping dessertspoon gelatine
- cold water
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Peel some large apples and core, but do not quarter
2. Boil a pint of water with a large cup of sugar
3. Put in the apples
4. Cook till they are transparent, but do not let them break
5. Arrange these in a deep dish
6. Measure the syrup, and to the pint add a heaping dessertspoon of gelatine dissolved in a little cold water
7. Strain
8. When cool pour a little at a time over the apples till they are covered with jelly
9. Turn out and invert so that they will be right side up on a glass dish
10. Serve with whipped cream

title: Jellied Boned Chicken
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- braised boned chicken
- gelatine
- cold water
- jelly
- truffles
- ham
- capers
- gherkins
- lettuce
- Mayonnaise sauce
- Bearnaise sauce
- Tartare sauce

## Directions

1. Strain the water in which the chicken was braised, and let it cool.
2. Remove the grease and clarify the liquor and season it highly.
3. If veal has been used and the liquor jellies, it may be used as it is.
4. If veal has not been used, add gelatine soaked in cold water, observing the proportion of one box of gelatine to one and a half quarts of liquor.
5. Mask a mould with jelly.
6. When the jelly is set, put in the chicken, and add enough liquid jelly to entirely cover it.
7. Alternatively, on the bottom of the mould, make a decoration of either truffles, ham, capers, gherkins, or any combination suitable.
8. Fix it with a thin layer of jelly.
9. When hardened, add enough more to make a layer of jelly one-quarter of an inch thick.
10. When that is hardened lay in the chicken, and surround it with the liquid jelly.
11. Garnish the dish on which the jellied chicken is served with lettuce, and serve with it a Mayonnaise, Bearnaise, or Tartare sauce.

title: Jellied Cabbage
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 head white cabbage
- juice of 1 lemon
- 1 cup sugar
- ¾ cup vinegar
- a little salt
- 1 package gelatine

## Directions

1. Chop cabbage
2. Mix with lemon juice, sugar, vinegar and salt
3. Dissolve gelatine in water
4. Mix with cabbage
5. Put in a mould when jellied
6. Serve with any salad dressing

title: Jellied Chicken
body:
## Ingredients

- a fowl
- butter
- pepper and salt to taste
- 1/2 ounce of gelatine

## Directions

1. Boil a fowl until it will slip easily from the bones
2. Let the water be reduced to about 1 pint in boiling
3. Pick the meat from the bones and place in a wet mould
4. Skim the fat from the liquor
5. Add a little butter, pepper and salt to the taste, and 1/2 ounce of gelatine
6. When this dissolves pour it hot over the chicken
7. Season the liquor pretty high, for the chicken absorbs

title: Jellied Chicken
body:
## Ingredients

- fowl
- butter
- pepper
- salt
- 1/2 ounce gelatine

## Directions

1. Boil a fowl until it will slip easily from the bones; let the water be reduced to about 1 pint in boiling
2. Pick the meat from the bones, place in a wet mould
3. Skim the fat from the liquor, add a little butter, pepper and salt to the taste, and 1/2 ounce of gelatine
4. When this dissolves pour it hot over the chicken
5. Season the liquor pretty high, for the chicken absorbs

title: Jellied Veal
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- A shank of veal
- Water
- Salt and pepper
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Cover with water and cook a shank of veal slowly until the meat comes easily from the bones
2. Season with salt and pepper
3. Meanwhile hard-boil two eggs and chill in cold water
4. Moisten a mould, cut the eggs in slices and lay in the bottom
5. Take out the bones and gristle and pour the remainder on the eggs
6. Put in a cool place, or on ice, and it will jelly quickly

title: Jellied Venison
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- good sized piece of boiling venison
- 1 small onion
- cayenne
- a few cloves
- 1 dessertspoonful ground cinnamon
- 1 wineglass good port
- gelatine

## Directions

1. Soak the venison in salted water one-half hour.
2. Put on to boil with onion, cayenne pepper, a few cloves, and ground cinnamon.
3. When done take the venison out carefully so as not to break; put in mould.
4. Take the liquor or stock, add a wineglass of good port, strain all and pour over venison.
5. Add a little gelatine if liquor is not sufficient to harden.

title: Jellied Walnuts
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon gelatine
- 1/2 cup cold water
- 1/2 cup boiling water
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 3 1/2 cup orange juice
- 3 tablespoons lemon juice
- English walnuts

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in cold water 10 minutes
2. make a syrup of cold water until slightly yellow, pour syrup over gelatine to dissolve it
3. add lemon juice
4. Cover bottom of shallow pan with half of the mixture
5. When firm, place on it, 1 inch apart, halves of English walnuts, cover with remaining mixture
6. Chill, cut in squares for serving

title: Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 cup cold water
- 2 tablespoons flour
- juice and grated rind of one lemon

## Directions

1. Combine 1 cup sugar, 1 egg, 1 cup cold water, and 2 tablespoons flour
2. Add juice and grated rind of one lemon

title: Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- fruit
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Wash fruit
2. Remove stems and decayed part
3. Cook with enough water to cover until tender
4. Drain
5. Add 1 cup sugar for each cup juice
6. Heat sugar first
7. Boil until it jells on cool saucer

title: Jelly Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs well beaten
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup water
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 cup butter
- lemon filling

## Directions

1. Mix eggs, sugar, water, flour, baking powder, salt, and butter
2. Bake
3. Lemon filling is nice for this cake

title: Jelly Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup cream
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar
- 2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and sugar until light
2. Add the cream and soda and cream tartar sifted in the flour by taking good measure
3. Bake (this will make three good cakes)

title: Jelly Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 3 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup milk
- 3 eggs
- vanilla
- 1 tablespoon molasses
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1/4 teaspoon allspice
- 1/2 nutmeg
- 1 cup chopped raisins
- jelly
- white icing

## Directions

1. To half the cake add molasses, cinnamon, cloves, allspice, and nutmeg
2. Bake in jelly tins, two layers light and two layers dark
3. Place the layers alternately, having a light one on top
4. Spread jelly between the layers and over all spread white icing

title: Jelly Making
body:
## Ingredients

- large fruits
- water
- granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Cut large fruits in pieces
2. Place in a granite or aluminum kettle with scarcely enough water to cover
3. Cover tightly and boil slowly until soft
4. Turn into jelly bag which has been soaking in hot water
5. Drain in a place free from draughts
6. Do not squeeze the fruit
7. Measure the juice and to each pint allow a pound of granulated sugar
8. Place juice on stove and sugar in a pan in the oven to heat
9. Stir sugar occasionally
10. Boil juice steadily and not too rapidly for 20 minutes
11. Turn the sugar into the juice and boil all together for 3 minutes
12. Pour into hot glasses

title: Jelly Omelet
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- jelly
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Make a plain omelet
2. Just before folding together, spread with some kind of jelly
3. Turn out on a warm platter
4. Dust it with powdered sugar

title: Jelly or Layer Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Whites of 4 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 2 cups milk
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- 2 cups flour
- 1½ cups sugar
- ½ cup butter
- 4 yolks
- ½ cup milk
- 2½ cups flour
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat the whites stiff and add last (after the flour)
2. flavor with a few drops of lemon or vanilla
3. By adding fruit will make a very good fruit cake

title: Jelly Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one-quarter ounce gelatine
- yolks of five eggs
- one lemon
- sherry
- six ounces sugar
- one-quarter pint milk

## Directions

1. Dissolve gelatine in a little water
2. Beat the yolks of eggs
3. Rub sugar into them with a spoon
4. Add half a pint of milk and the gelatine
5. Stir over fire until thick like custard
6. Take off and add the juice of a lemon and a wineglass of sherry and whites of eggs which have been well beaten
7. Mix well together
8. Put in a mould and let stand until next day
9. Should be eaten with cream

title: Jelly Roll
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 tablespoon hot water
- a pinch of salt
- jelly

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs until light
2. Add the sugar and salt, and stir until dissolved
3. Sift the flour and baking powder, add to the above and beat until light
4. Put in a flat pan, bake 10 or 15 minutes
5. Take out on a napkin, spread under side with jelly, and roll up

title: Jelly Roll
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- ⅜ cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 tablespoon hot water
- a pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs until light
2. Add the sugar and salt, and stir until dissolved
3. Sift the flour and baking powder, add to the above and beat until light
4. Put in a flat pan and bake 10 or 15 minutes

title: Jennie Murphy's Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1 cup lard
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1/2 a nutmeg

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients together and bake.

title: Jersey Lily Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- Whites of 4 eggs beaten to a stiff froth
- 1 cup white sugar
- 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 1/2 cup butter beaten to a cream with the sugar
- 1 3/4 cups sifted flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- chopped raisins
- 1/2 cup chopped nuts
- vanilla flavoring

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites to a stiff froth
2. Cream butter with sugar
3. Add egg whites and sugar to butter and sugar mixture
4. Add milk and sifted flour with baking powder
5. Add vanilla flavoring
6. Put 1/3 of the batter in a long tin
7. Add a thin layer of chopped raisins and chopped nuts
8. Top with remaining batter

title: Jersey Rock Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 pounds flour
- 1/2 pound butter
- 10 ounces sugar
- 4 eggs
- a few drops of essence of lemon
- currants

## Directions

1. Mix flour, butter, sugar, eggs, essence of lemon and currants well together
2. Drop on baking tin

title: Jim Jam
body:
## Ingredients

- 15 large cucumbers (green)
- 15 large green tomatoes
- 2 heads cabbage
- 2 heads celery
- 1 pint horseradish
- salt
- 3.5 gallon vinegar
- 3 pounds brown sugar
- 1 small tin mustard
- 1 tablespoon black pepper
- 2 tablespoons tumeric
- 3/4 teaspoon cayenne

## Directions

1. Chop up fine as mincemeat and as you chop, sprinkle with salt
2. When it is all chopped, drain off the water
3. Add vinegar, brown sugar, mustard, black pepper, tumeric, and cayenne
4. Boil 25 minutes; stir to prevent burning
5. Seal tight

title: Jockey Club Bouquet
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Extract of rose, one pint
- Extract of tuberose, one pint
- Extract of cassia, half a pint
- Extract of jasmine, four ounces
- Tincture of civet, three ounces

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients
2. Filter the mixture

title: John Bull's Own Plum Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. suet
- 1 lb. moist sugar
- 1 lb. currants
- 1 lb. raisins
- 1 lb. sultana raisins
- 1 lb. mixed candied peel
- 1/2 lb. breadcrumbs
- 1/2 lb. flour
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- 1 teaspoonful mixed spice
- 8 eggs
- 1/2 pt. brandy

## Directions

1. Mix all in the following order. Flour, salt, spice, sugar, raisins, peel, breadcrumbs, sultanas, and currants
2. Beat egg and strain them for ten minutes, add brandy to them and pour over the mass, stir until all are thoroughly mixed
3. Butter four small bowls and fill, scald cloth and flour it, tie down and boil five and one-half hours (or more), if one large pudding boil thirteen hours

title: Johnnie Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter or dripping
- 3/4 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 1 1/2 cups cornmeal
- a pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together

title: Johnnie Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cornmeal
- 2 cups flour
- 1 cup sugar (brown)
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together

title: Jubilee Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- butter size of an egg
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 tablespoons strawberries

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Steam 1 hour.

title: Jugged Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds thin beef or stewing steak
- 2 onions
- 1 medium-sized carrot
- 1 teaspoon mixed herbs
- 1 small onion stuck with dozen cloves
- Yorkshire relish
- 1 tablespoon flour
- pepper and salt
- water or stock

## Directions

1. Put beef cut into convenient sized pieces into a brown stewing jar
2. Add onions cut in slices
3. Add carrot cut in cubes
4. Add mixed herbs
5. Add small onion stuck with cloves
6. Add a little Yorkshire relish
7. Dust all with flour
8. Season with pepper and salt to taste
9. Do not quite cover with water or stock
10. Put on the lid and set jar in the oven
11. Let it cook for 2 hours
12. Serve with boiled potatoes

title: Jugged Hare
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 full-grown rabbit or hare
- 1 sliced onion
- hot dripping
- pepper
- salt
- flour
- chopped fat salt pork
- onion
- parsley
- paprica
- fresh tomato
- 1 cupful cold, weak stock
- 1 stalk celery
- browned flour
- 1 tablespoonful currant jelly
- 1 tablespoonful lemon-juice
- 1 glass sherry
- fried hominy

## Directions

1. Skin, clean, and joint a full-grown rabbit, or hare.
2. Cut the back into two pieces and sever every joint.
3. Fry a sliced onion to a pale brown in hot dripping, put in the meat, peppered, salted, and floured, and cook for ten minutes, fast, turning often.
4. Put into the bottom of an agate-iron sauce-pan a layer of chopped fat salt pork, sprinkle with onion, parsley, and paprica.
5. Upon this lay the pieces of hare and cover with another layer of chopped pork and onion.
6. Add a few bits of fresh tomato if desired.
7. Pour in a cupful of cold, weak stock in which a stalk of celery has been boiled, then remove.
8. Fit on a tight top, set in a vessel of cold water, and bring slowly to a boil.
9. Keep this up for three hours, or until the meat is tender.
10. Dish the pieces of rabbit, thicken the gravy with browned flour.
11. Add a tablespoonful of currant jelly and one of lemon-juice, simmer one minute, pour in a glass of sherry and turn all upon the meat.
12. Garnish with triangles of fried hominy, serving a bit with each portion of hare.

title: Jumbles
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 1/4 cups flour
- 1 tablespoon water
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 pound dates
- 1 pound nuts
- 1 pound raisins

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients together
2. Drop on buttered tins

title: Jumbo Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups bread dough
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 4 eggs
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in water
- 1 pound raisins well flavored

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add beaten yolks of eggs, then spices
3. Mix with bread dough
4. Add raisins and well-beaten whites of eggs, then soda
5. Bake in a slow oven 1 1/2 hours

title: Junket
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 3/4 junket tablet
- 1 tablespoon cold water
- cream or fruit syrup for serving

## Directions

1. Put the junket tablet to soak in the cold water
2. Heat the sugar and milk to blood heat, but no hotter
3. Crush and dissolve the tablet in the water
4. Stir the whole into the milk
5. Pour at once into the serving dish
6. Let stand in a warm room until it sets
7. Move carefully to a cold place to chill before serving with cream or fruit syrup

title: Kartofeel Salat (German)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart cold boiled potatoes, diced
- 2 onions, sliced
- 1 tablespoonful minced parsley
- Salad dressing of oil, vinegar, salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Mix in salad bowl, dressing with vinegar, oil and seasoning of salt and pepper.

title: Kebobbed Oysters
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 50 oysters
- 2 tablespoonfuls chopped parsley
- 2 tablespoonfuls chopped celery
- 2 eggs
- 1 pint bread-crumbs
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- oyster liquid

## Directions

1. Drain oysters
2. Beat two eggs and add to them a tablespoonful of oyster liquid
3. Put on a board a pint of bread-crumbs
4. Have at your left side an ordinary baking-dish
5. Lift the oysters by the muscular part
6. Dip them in egg, then in bread-crumbs
7. Put them at once in the bottom of the baking-dish
8. Sprinkle over half a teaspoonful of salt, a dash of pepper, a sprinkling of parsley and celery
9. Dip and put in another layer of oysters, etc., until all are used
10. Cut small pieces of butter over the top
11. Bake in a quick oven for fifteen or twenty minutes
12. Serve in the dish in which they were baked

title: Kedgerel
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cooked and flaked fish
- 1 cup cooked rice
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1-16 teaspoon pepper
- 2 teaspoons lemon juice
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- 1 tablespoon mixed parsley

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients
2. Pack into buttered bowl
3. Surround with hot water
4. Cover
5. Poach
6. Unmould
7. Garnish with parsley

title: Kelly Island Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup milk
- 4 eggs
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 grated lemon
- 1 grated sour apple
- 1 cup sugar

## Directions

1. Mix sugar, butter, milk, eggs and baking powder
2. Bake in layer cake tins
3. For filling: stir together grated lemon, grated sour apple and sugar
4. Boil 4 minutes
5. Use as filling between layers

title: Kidgrie, or Dry Curry
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 fowl
- 2 teaspoonfuls curry powder or paste
- Butter and lard
- 1 teacup hot water
- 4 onions

## Directions

1. Cut a fowl into pieces the size of a walnut, put into a stewpan with a little lard and stir until nearly cooked
2. Cut onions into thin slices, place them in another stewpan with a little lard or butter, grill until nicely browned
3. When browned, add a little more butter or lard, with curry; stir a few minutes
4. Add the contents of the two saucepans together and stir until the meat is sufficiently cooked
5. After adding a teacup of water, allow to stand a short time before serving

title: Kidney Beans
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh or dried kidney beans
- salted boiling water
- pepper
- salt
- butter

## Directions

1. If fresh, cook them as you would Lima beans
2. If dried, soak over night, and put over the fire in the morning in salted boiling water, and cook gently one hour, or until soft, but not broken
3. Drain, stir in pepper, salt, and a lump of butter, and serve

title: Kidney Beans a la Lyonnaise
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- kidney beans
- salt
- clarified dripping
- half a small onion
- chopped parsley
- pepper

## Directions

1. Soak over night and boil tender, but not until they break
2. Drain perfectly dry, throw in a little salt, and leave over an empty pot in the colander at the side of the range to 'dry off'
3. Have ready in a frying-pan a great spoonful of clarified dripping with half a small onion, grated, and a little chopped parsley
4. Add salt and pepper to taste, and when hissing hot put in the beans
5. Shake over the fire about two minutes, until the contents of the pan are well mixed, and as hot as may be without scorching, then serve

title: Kidney Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys
- 1 oz. butter
- 1 oz. flour
- 1 oz. ground rice
- pepper
- salt
- 3 qts. cold water
- 1 tablespoonful Worcester sauce
- 1 tablespoonful mushroom sauce

## Directions

1. Cut the kidneys in thin slices, sprinkle with the ounce of flour
2. Melt the butter, put in the kidney and brown
3. Pour in the water, stir till it boils, skim carefully and allow to simmer slowly for three hours
4. Put the one-half ounce of rice in a bowl with the sauces
5. When mixed pour into the soup
6. Stir well till it boils, then cook slowly for ten minutes and serve without the meat

title: Kidney Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 oz. kidney
- 1 qt. second stock
- 1 tablespoonful mushroom catsup
- 1 tablespoonful Harvey sauce
- 1 oz. butter
- 1 oz. flour of rice
- Pepper and salt

## Directions

1. Wash and pepper, and roll kidney into it, then put in pan with butter and brown quickly
2. Add part of the stock and let it come to the boil and cook a few minutes
3. Put in saucepan with the rest of the stock, and leave to simmer two hours

title: Kidneys With Bacon
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Lamb kidneys
- Thin slices of fat breakfast bacon
- Toast
- 1 teaspoonful of Worcestershire sauce

## Directions

1. Split lamb kidneys in half and fasten open with toothpicks
2. Cook in a frying-pan thin slices of fat breakfast bacon until clear, but not crisped
3. Take up and keep hot while you cook the kidneys in the bacon-fat, turning them frequently
4. Six minutes should make them tender
5. Arrange upon thin slices of toast in a dish, garnish with the bacon
6. Add a teaspoonful of Worcestershire sauce to the gravy and pour over the kidneys

title: King Edward Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1 large tablespoon molasses
- 1 large cup seeded raisins
- 1/2 cup very sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 small cups flour
- walnuts chopped fine

## Directions

1. Mix butter, brown sugar, eggs, cinnamon, nutmeg, molasses, raisins, sour milk, soda and flour
2. Make as a layer cake
3. Put chopped walnuts between cake in layers and in the icing

title: King Edward Cake No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs well beaten
- 1/2 cup stoned raisins
- 1/2 cup currants
- 1/2 cup melted butter
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 heaping teaspoon soda stirred in the cream
- 1 cup or more flour

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients together
2. Make as a layer cake

title: Kiss Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of 3 eggs
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 1/2 tablespoons cornstarch
- a little cold milk
- 2 cups boiling milk
- whites of 3 eggs
- 1 cup sugar

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks of 3 eggs with 1/2 cup sugar until light.
2. Add 1 1/2 tablespoons cornstarch, wet with a little cold milk.
3. Stir in 2 cups boiling milk until thick, then let cool.
4. Beat the whites of 3 eggs with 1 cup sugar.
5. Spread over the top and brown in oven.

title: Kiss-Me-Quick Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 ounces fresh butter
- 2 ounces sifted sugar
- 2 ounces flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 2 well-beaten eggs
- 2 tablespoons raspberry jam

## Directions

1. Beat butter to a cream.
2. Add sifted sugar.
3. Gradually stir in flour and baking powder.
4. Add well-beaten eggs and raspberry jam.
5. Beat the whole thoroughly together.
6. Put in a buttered mould and steam 2 hours.

title: Kisses
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- whites of 3 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoonful cornstarch
- 2 cups cocoanut

## Directions

1. Beat whites of eggs stiff
2. Remove the lid of the kettle, set the bowl in the kettle and stir fifteen minutes
3. Add 2 cups of cocoanut
4. Drop on buttered paper
5. Bake in slow oven

title: Kisses
body:
## Ingredients

- Whites of 2 eggs
- 1 cup powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Beat whites of 2 eggs to a stiff froth
2. Add 1 cup powdered sugar
3. Beat this together 15 minutes
4. Drop in teaspoonfuls on brown paper
5. Put on a dripping pan turned bottom side up in the oven
6. Bake until a crust forms on them

title: Kisses (Version 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- Whites of 3 eggs
- 1 pound icing sugar
- 1 pound grated cocoanut

## Directions

1. Beat whites of 3 eggs until stiff
2. Add 1 pound icing sugar and 1 pound grated cocoanut
3. Beat all together until stiff
4. Drop in a buttered pan and cook until brown

title: Klondike Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1/2 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients together and bake

title: Klondike Cake No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1 tablespoon brown sugar
- 2 teaspoons dripping
- little nutmeg
- 3 tablespoons currants
- 1 egg beaten in 1/2 cup cold water
- pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Mix flour, baking powder, brown sugar, dripping, nutmeg and salt very lightly
2. Add currants
3. Add egg beaten in cold water

title: Ladies' Fingers
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 3/4 cup sweet milk
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat the butter, sugar and egg until very light
2. Add vanilla and milk
3. Add flour sifted with baking powder

title: Lafayette Gingerbread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. fresh butter
- 1/2 lb. brown sugar
- 1 pt. molasses
- 1/2 pt. milk
- 4 tablespoonfuls ginger
- 1 heaping tablespoonful mixed cinnamon, mace and nutmeg (ground)
- 1 glass brandy
- 1 1/2 lbs. flour
- 6 eggs
- Juice and rind of 2 oranges
- 1 level teaspoonful soda
- 1 small level saltspoonful tartaric acid

## Directions

1. Stir butter and sugar to cream with a spaddle.
2. Add molasses mixed with half a pint of warm milk; ginger; a heaped tablespoonful of mixed powdered cinnamon and powdered mace and nutmeg, and a glass of brandy.
3. Sift in flour.
4. Beat eggs till very light, then mix them alternately with the flour into the pan of butter, sugar, molasses, etc.
5. At the last mix in the yellow rind (grated fine) the oranges and the juice.
6. Stir the whole very hard.
