3. If it grows too thick add two tablespoonfuls of vinegar.
4. If it is to be used immediately add one-half cup of whipped cream.

title: Mayonnaise
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Yolks of two eggs
- one-quarter teaspoon salt
- dash of cayenne
- one cup of cold salad oil
- one tablespoon vinegar
- one tablespoon lemon juice

## Directions

1. Let oil and egg be thoroughly chilled before beginning
2. Have the yolk entirely free from any white of egg
3. Add oil drop by drop
4. Success depends on adding oil slowly at first, afterwards it can be added in large quantities
5. When it has become a little thick alternate with a few drops of lemon juice
6. If it curdles add it to another yolk
7. If mustard is liked add a quarter of a teaspoon

title: Mayonnaise
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Yolk of 1 egg
- 1 cup olive oil
- 1/2 teaspoonful salt
- 1/2 teaspoonful lemon juice
- Dash of cayenne
- 1/2 teaspoonful mustard

## Directions

1. Combine ingredients as directed in basic mayonnaise instructions

title: Mayonnaise
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt. cream
- Yolks of 3 eggs
- 1/4 teaspoonful salt
- 1 teaspoonful mustard
- 1/4 teaspoonful pepper
- 3 1/2 tablespoonfuls white wine vinegar

## Directions

1. Mix beaten yolks with other ingredients
2. Pour the cream in last
3. Put on the stove, stir all the time until it is well scalded
4. Pour into a jug
5. Nice to eat with sliced tomatoes, salmon or lettuce

title: Mayonnaise of Fish
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One pound of fish, cooked
- Three hard-boiled eggs
- Two tablespoonfuls of best oil
- Six tablespoonfuls of vinegar
- Two teaspoonfuls of sugar
- One teaspoonful of salt
- One-half teaspoonful mustard
- One teaspoonful pepper
- Two heads blanched lettuce

## Directions

1. Rub the yolks of the eggs smooth with the oil, add the sugar, salt, mustard and pepper, and when these are well mixed, the vinegar, a few drops at a time
2. Set it by, covered, while you cut the fish into strips about an inch long, and shred the lettuce
3. Mix these in a salad bowl, pour over the dressing and garnish with rings of the whites of the eggs
4. Serve as soon as it is ready or the lettuce will become limp

title: Mayonnaise of Sweetbreads
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- A pair of sweetbreads
- Good veal stock
- Pepper, salt, mace
- A very small piece of garlic
- A half a pint or a little more of stock
- A quarter of an ounce of leaf gelatine
- Mayonnaise
- Aspic or savory jelly
- Beet-root
- Hard-boiled egg

## Directions

1. Blanch the sweetbreads
2. Boil them for a few minutes in some good veal stock
3. Put them to get cold and cut into small round pieces
4. Place them in a stewpan with pepper, salt, mace, a very small piece of garlic, a half a pint or a little more of the stock they were first cooked in, and a quarter of an ounce of leaf gelatine
5. Simmer very steadily for fifteen minutes or so
6. Place the pieces separately in a shallow dish
7. Pour the gravy over them
8. When they have set quite firmly cover thickly with mayonnaise
9. When quite cold, ornament according to taste with aspic or savory jelly, with beet-root, hard-boiled egg cut into fancy shapes and placed over the dish

title: Mclaren Cheese
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound cheese
- 6 tablespoons cream
- 1 teaspoon mustard
- butter size of egg

## Directions

1. Grind cheese
2. Soften butter
3. Blend all together

title: Measure Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1¾ cups flour
- 1 cup butter
- 1¾ cups sugar
- 1 cup of eggs, 3
- flavoring

## Directions

1. Beat flour and butter together to a cream with the hands
2. Beat sugar and eggs together with a few drops of flavoring

title: Meat Balls
body:
## Ingredients

- cold meat
- salt and pepper
- allspice and nutmeg
- bread
- cold milk
- 1 egg to every three persons
- a lump of butter as large as a walnut

## Directions

1. bone and chop it fine
2. season with salt and pepper, also allspice and nutmeg if liked
3. soak about 1/8 as much bread in cold milk
4. press out and mix with the meat
5. allow one egg to every three persons, and a lump of butter as large as a walnut
6. mix thoroughly
7. roll into balls and fry in hot fat

title: Meat Balls 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 or 6 boiled potatoes
- some cold meat
- 1 egg
- 1 small onion
- pepper and salt

## Directions

1. put through a mincer
2. thoroughly mix potatoes and meat
3. add 1 egg, 1 small onion, pepper and salt
4. Form into balls and cook in a good hot oven

title: Meat Balls From Left-Over Meats
body:
## Ingredients

- cold meat of any kind
- cooked potatoes
- a little onion
- dry-bread
- hot water
- butter or drippings

## Directions

1. Chop cold meat of any kind with the same bulk of cooked potatoes
2. add a little onion if liked
3. take dry-bread, moisten with hot water
4. use enough bread to make the meat and potatoes adhere
5. fry in cakes in butter or drippings

title: Meat Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups meat chopped fine
- 1 small onion
- pepper and salt
- white sauce
- beaten egg
- cracker crumbs

## Directions

1. mix to a good paste with white sauce
2. take tablespoon
3. roll in beaten egg
4. then roll in cracker crumbs and fry in hot fat

title: Meat Croquettes 2
body:
## Ingredients

- left-over boiled or roasted beef or pork
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup stale bread crumbs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Chop up left-over boiled or roasted beef or pork
2. use 3 eggs, 1 cup stale bread crumbs, salt and pepper to taste
3. fry till light brown

title: Meat Croquettes 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cold chopped lean meat of any kind
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 2 cups cold mashed potatoes
- 1 small onion
- pepper and salt
- 2 eggs well beaten
- a little butter

## Directions

1. mix well together and make in cakes
2. fry in a little butter until well browned
3. turn until the other side is brown

title: Meat Loaf (Served Hot)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups finely chopped meat (cold)
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 2 eggs
- 1 small onion (chopped)
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- gravy

## Directions

1. Salt and pepper, mix thoroughly
2. Place in well-buttered basin
3. Cover with buttered paper
4. Set in a large basin of hot water
5. Bake 1 hour
6. Turn on a hot platter and serve with gravy

title: Meat Patties from Left-Overs
body:
## Ingredients

- left-over meat (pork or beef)
- 1 slice bread
- salt
- pepper
- onion
- 1 egg
- sage or other herb

## Directions

1. Put left-over meat through the meat chopper
2. To 1 quart of the minced meat add 1 slice bread (also minced)
3. Add salt, pepper and onion to taste
4. Add 1 egg
5. Add a little sage or other herb if desired
6. Mix all well together
7. Form into small patties or balls
8. Fry a golden brown

title: Meat Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- left-over meat
- salt and pepper
- flour
- meat gravy
- 1 heaping teaspoon baking powder
- 1 saltspoon salt
- 1 pint flour
- 1 tablespoon lard
- 1 scant cup milk

## Directions

1. Take left-over meat and place in baking dish
2. Add salt and pepper and dredge with flour
3. Pour over this meat gravy and heat
4. While this is heating, make a rich biscuit dough by sifting 1 heaping teaspoon baking powder and 1 saltspoon salt into 1 pint flour
5. Rub in 1 tablespoon lard
6. Wet with 1 scant cup milk
7. Drop this by the spoonful on the hot meat from the oven and spread to cover the pie
8. Bake 3/4 hour

title: Meat Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound lean meat, bacon or ham
- 1 chopped parboiled onion
- 3/4 teaspoon pepper
- suet paste
- water
- salt
- potatoes
- gravy

## Directions

1. Prepare suet paste, roll it to an oblong square, wet the edges with water
2. Spread the beef, sprinkled over with onion and pepper over the paste
3. Roll it up, keeping it back from the edges, and pressing them well together
4. Dip a pudding-cloth in boiling water, flour it well, roll the pudding in it
5. Tie the ends of the pudding not too close, as it swells a little
6. Have ready a large pan of boiling water with teaspoon of salt in it
7. Place pudding in this and boil 2 hours
8. Place a plate in the bottom of saucepan to prevent pudding from sticking
9. Serve with potatoes and nice gravy

title: Meat Souffle
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 1/4 tablespoons flour
- onion juice
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 teaspoon pepper
- 1 1/2 cups chopped meat (chicken, lamb, tongue or beef)
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Stir in 1 1/2 cups chopped meat (chicken, lamb, tongue or beef)
2. While cooking, add beaten yolks of 2 eggs
3. Cook 1 minute and set away to cool
4. When cool add beaten whites (stiff)
5. Bake 20 minutes in buttered pudding dish

title: Meringues
body:
## Ingredients

- whites of 2 eggs
- 3/4 pound granulated sugar
- pinch of salt
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice
- butter
- Devonshire or whipped cream
- strawberries or raspberries, or glace cherries, chopped pistachio nuts or cocoanut

## Directions

1. Whip the whites of eggs until very stiff
2. add granulated sugar, pinch of salt, lemon juice
3. mould with dessert spoon on buttered paper
4. dry in a slow oven
5. When dry, scrape the inside part out and fill with Devonshire or whipped cream
6. When strawberries or raspberries are in season, garnish with these; when not in season, use glace cherries, chopped pistachio nuts or cocoanut

title: Mexican Candy
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 cups granulated sugar
- 1 cup golden syrup
- 1 cup water
- 4 egg whites
- 1 cup chopped walnuts
- flavoring

## Directions

1. Put sugar, water and syrup on to boil and stir until it melts
2. Beat the egg whites
3. After the mixture has boiled a few minutes, pour 1 cup over the egg whites
4. Let the remainder boil until it hairs
5. Add nuts and pour over the eggs
6. Beat until stiff
7. When partially cool, beat in the flavoring
8. Pour on buttered plates and cut in squares as used

title: Michigan Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 cups granulated sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup sour milk
- 4 cups sifted flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- ¾ cup currants
- 1 tablespoon syrup
- ¾ teaspoon allspice or cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat eggs, butter and sugar together until light
2. Add milk and flour
3. Put baking powder and soda in flour
4. Beat all for five minutes
5. Divide in three parts
6. In one put ¾ cup currants, 1 tablespoon syrup, and ¾ teaspoon allspice or cinnamon for centre layer

title: Michigan Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- ¾ cup black molasses
- ½ cup brown sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1½ cups flour
- 1 cup hot water
- 1½ cups white sugar
- water
- ¾ cup raisins
- egg white

## Directions

1. Bake in two layers
2. For filling: boil 1½ cups white sugar and a little water till it hairs
3. Chop ¾ cup raisins fine
4. Beat the white while syrup boils
5. Put the raisins in the syrup and stir well before putting in the egg
6. Spread between and on top of the cake

title: Milk Buns
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups new milk
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1 heaping tablespoon lard
- 1/2 White Swan Yeast Cake or 1/4 cup hop yeast
- flour
- 1 egg
- salt

## Directions

1. Let milk come to a boil
2. Stir in sugar and lard
3. When lukewarm put in White Swan Yeast Cake or hop yeast
4. Add enough flour to make a batter as thick as for sponge cake
5. Let rise till morning and keep very warm
6. In morning put in egg and a little salt
7. Mix as stiff as soft bread
8. Let rise again till real light
9. When very light take out on bakeboard and roll out 3/8 inch thick
10. Cut in round cakes
11. Butter and turn over double
12. Pinch ends
13. Let rise 1 hour
14. Bake in quick oven

title: Milk Muffins
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cups flour
- 1½ teaspoonfuls baking powder
- A pinch of salt
- Enough milk to make a very light batter

## Directions

1. Beat till it becomes a cream.
2. Butter the tins well and drop the mixture into pans.
3. Fill half full and bake fifteen minutes in a very hot oven.

title: Milk Porridge
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- 1 scant tablespoonful sifted flour
- cold milk

## Directions

1. Thicken milk with a scant tablespoonful of sifted flour
2. Let it boil five minutes, stirring it constantly
3. Add a little cold milk
4. Give it one boil up, and it is ready for use

title: Milk Potato Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One pint of milk
- One tablespoonful of flour
- One tablespoonful of butter
- Half a teaspoonful of salt
- A little pepper
- Quarter of a teaspoonful of onion juice
- Two large potatoes

## Directions

1. Heat one pint of milk
2. Thicken it with one tablespoonful of flour and one tablespoonful of butter
3. Add half a teaspoonful of salt, a little pepper, and quarter of a teaspoonful of onion juice
4. Add two large potatoes; mash and strain

title: Milk Punch
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 oranges
- 6 lemons
- 4 qts. water
- 1 qt. rum
- 1 pt. brandy
- 2 lbs. sugar
- 1 qt. new milk

## Directions

1. Pare oranges and lemons as thin as possible.
2. Steep the peels in rum and brandy in a close crock for twenty-four hours.
3. Squeeze the fruit on sugar; add water and boiling hot new milk; then stir the rum and brandy into the above and run it through a jelly bag until perfectly clear.
4. Bottle and cork at once. It will keep good for some weeks.

title: Milk Punch (Second Recipe)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 or 12 lemons
- 2 bottles rum
- 1 bottle brandy
- 1 pt. lime juice
- 1 grated nutmeg
- 1 bottle fresh milk
- 2 lbs. sugar
- one and one-half bottles water

## Directions

1. Steep rinds cut from lemons in brandy for three days with a grated nutmeg; shake frequently.
2. Dissolve sugar in one and one-half bottles water, add rum, lime juice and the above lemon brandy.
3. Bring one bottle of fresh milk to a boil, and that instant pour it into the other ingredients, stirring constantly.
4. Let stand twenty-four hours and strain through double flannel; cork well. Will keep any time.

title: Milk Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 potatoes
- 2 onions
- 2 ounces butter
- pepper
- ¾ ounce salt
- 1 pint milk
- 3 tablespoons tapioca
- 2 quarts water

## Directions

1. Put two quarts of water in a saucepan
2. Peel and cut potatoes in quarters, cut up onions
3. When the water boils put in potatoes and onions
4. Add the butter, salt and pepper to taste
5. Allow it to boil to a mash, then strain through a colander, working the vegetables through also
6. Return the pulp and soup to the stewpan, add one pint of milk to it and boil
7. When boiling, sprinkle in by degrees three tablespoons of tapioca, stirring all the time
8. Let boil for fifteen minutes gently

title: Milk Soups
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup vegetable water or other liquid
- 2 tablespoons flour
- ½ cup vegetable pulp or chopped fish
- 1 tablespoon fat

## Directions

1. Put the vegetable water, fat and ¾ of the milk over the fire to heat
2. Mix the flour smoothly with the remaining milk
3. Stir it into the scalding liquid and stir constantly until it thickens
4. Stir in the vegetable pulp, season to taste with salt and pepper
5. Serve hot

title: Milk Sponge
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 cups milk
- 1/2 cup cornstarch
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- pinch salt
- flavoring
- whites of 2 small eggs

## Directions

1. Put 2 cups milk to heat in a double boiler
2. Mix the cornstarch, sugar, salt and remaining milk, and stir them into the scalding milk
3. Stir constantly until it thickens, then cover closely and cook 15 minutes, stirring occasionally
4. Beat the egg whites stiff
5. add the flavoring to the milk mixture, and then stir in the egg whites
6. Mix thoroughly but quickly, and stir as little as possible
7. Pour at once into a wet mould and set away to chill thoroughly before turning it out to serve
8. Serve with a custard sauce made with the egg yolks, or with a red syrup from canned fruit such as cherries or raspberries

title: Milk Toast
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 qt. milk
- 1 tablespoonful butter
- 1 teaspoonful flour
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- Slices toasted bread

## Directions

1. Put milk over the fire, put into it cold butter
2. Stir a heaping teaspoonful of flour into half a gill of milk
3. As soon as the milk on the fire boils, stir in the flour, add salt
4. Let all boil up once, remove from the fire, and dip in thin slices of toasted bread
5. When all are used up, pour what is left of the scalded milk over the toast
6. Cover, and send to the table hot

title: Milk Toast
body:
## Ingredients

- slices of bread
- butter
- rich boiling milk
- salt

## Directions

1. Cut slices of bread thin and toast quickly to a light brown. Butter while hot and pile them in a deep dish. Cover them with rich boiling milk. Let it stand a few minutes and serve. A little salt may be added if necessary.

title: Mince Meat
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 lbs. raw beef, chopped
- 6 lbs. suet, chopped
- 1 pk. sour apples
- 6 lbs. brown sugar
- 4 lbs. seeded raisins
- 2 lbs. currants
- 1/2 lb. citron
- 1 tablespoonful salt
- 6 lemons, juice
- Pulp and peel of 2 lemons
- Spices to taste

## Directions

1. Can be kept a year

title: Mince Meat (with Beef)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. boiled beef (chopped)
- 2 lbs. beef suet
- 4 lbs. apples
- 2 lbs. raisins
- 2 lbs. currants
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- 2 oranges, large
- 2 lbs. powdered sugar
- 1 qt. whisky
- 1 wineglass rose water
- 2 grated nutmegs
- 1/2 oz. cinnamon
- 1/2 oz. each cloves and mace
- 1/2 lb. citron, sliced

## Directions

1. Chop beef, suet, oranges, apples
2. Add spices, then liquids
3. Cook 3 or 4 hours, slowly
4. Keep in jars tightly covered and set in a dry, cool place

title: Mince Meat (without Beef)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. chopped suet
- 2 lbs. seeded raisins
- 2 lbs. currants
- 2 lbs. apples
- 2 1/2 lbs. sugar
- 2 nutmegs grated
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- 4 lemons boiled (with seeds removed)
- Grated yellow rind of 2 raw lemons
- 1/2 lb. citron
- 1/2 lb. orange
- 1/2 pt. sherry
- 1 teaspoonful each powdered mace and ginger
- 1/2 pt. brandy

## Directions

1. Mix all together
2. Stir in well half sherry and brandy
3. Cook several hours

title: Mince Meat for Pies
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. beef
- 3 lbs. suet
- 3 lbs. raisins
- 3 lbs. currants
- 1/2 pk. apples
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup beef liquor
- 1 pt. brandy
- 1 tablespoonful salt
- 2 lbs. sugar
- 1 dessertspoonful each cinnamon, cloves, ginger, allspice

## Directions

1. Chop beef, suet, apples, raisins, add spices and mix

title: Mince Meat in 1812
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. chopped suet
- 1 lb. chopped beef
- 1 qt. apple cider
- 1 pt. molasses
- 1 pt. preserved grapes
- 1 lb. brown sugar
- 1 teacupful brandy
- 2 lbs. sultana raisins
- 2 lbs. currants
- 1/2 lb. citron or lemon peel
- Allspice, cinnamon, and cloves to taste

## Directions

1. Simmer for half a day on the back of the stove till thoroughly cooked
2. Put in a cool place in an earthen jar
3. If a very moist mince meat is preferred, add cider to each pie when baking; have crust very short

title: Mince Meat on Toast
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups minced meat
- 2 teaspoons butter
- 2 teaspoons flour
- 2 cups stock or milk
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- pepper
- 1 teaspoon Worcestershire or onion juice
- 6 slices toast
- parsley

## Directions

1. Make a white or brown sauce
2. Reheat meat in it
3. Serve on toast
4. Garnish with parsley

title: Minced Lamb, With Poached Eggs
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Remains of cold roast lamb
- one good cup of gravy
- pepper
- salt
- seasoning of mint
- poached eggs
- buttered toast
- a little brown flour

## Directions

1. Trim the meat and mince it finely, well seasoned with pepper, salt, and a little mint
2. Put the gravy into a saucepan (make it from the bones if you have no other), and let it get hot
3. then stir in the mince and let all become very hot, but do not let it boil, thicken with a little brown flour, and pile on a flat dish
4. Have ready a few slices of buttered toast, cut into neat squares, lay a poached egg on each, place these around or upon the mince, and serve

title: Minced Vegetables
body:
## Ingredients

- several kinds of left-over vegetables
- salt and pepper
- 1 tablespoon butter or dripping

## Directions

1. Chop fine and mix several kinds of left-over vegetables
2. Season with salt and pepper
3. Put a tablespoon of butter or dripping in a spider
4. Add the mince, cover and cook slowly until hot

title: Mincemeat
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 large lemons
- 3 large apples
- 1 pound stoned raisins
- 1 pound currants
- 1 pound suet
- 2 pounds brown sugar
- 1 ounce sliced candied citron
- 1 ounce sliced candied orange peel
- 1 ounce sliced candied lemon peel
- 1 teacup brandy
- 2 tablespoons orange marmalade

## Directions

1. Bake apples and remove cores
2. Add citron, orange peel, and lemon peel to the lemons, lemon juice, and sugar
3. Put in the remaining ingredients one by one and mix everything very thoroughly together
4. Put the mincemeat into a stone jar with a closely fitting lid
5. In a fortnight it will be ready for use

title: Mincemeat (Version 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds beef tenderloin
- 2 pounds suet
- 3 pounds brown sugar
- 3 pounds seeded raisins
- 3 pounds currants
- 1 ounce mace
- 1 ounce nutmegs
- 1 ounce cinnamon
- 1 ounce cloves
- 15 large apples
- 2 pounds citron
- grated rind and juice of 4 lemons
- grated rind and juice of 4 oranges
- 1 quart brandy
- 1 pint Madeira wine
- 1 tablespoon salt

## Directions

1. Boil the beef until well done, when cold chop it fine
2. Chop suet and apples and add to the beef
3. Mix the sugar and spices and add to them the wine, brandy, lemon and orange juice
4. Mix the raisins, currants, citron, lemon and orange rinds
5. Combine gradually the three sets of ingredients, after having added the salt to the liquid part, using a small portion of each until all are used
6. Pack in stone jars, cover closely, and keep in a dry, cool closet

title: Mincemeat (Version 3)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts meat
- 4 quarts chopped apples
- 25 cents' worth raisins
- 25 cents' worth currants
- 1 quart sealer raspberries
- 3/4 cup vinegar
- salt
- pepper
- ground cloves
- allspice
- cinnamon
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients

title: Mincemeat (Version 4)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds sugar
- 2 pounds meat
- 2 pounds apples
- 3 pounds raisins
- 2 pounds currants
- 1 1/2 pounds suet
- 1/2 pound lemon peel
- 1/4 pound citron peel
- 1 pint brandy
- juice and grated rind of 3 lemons
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 2 nutmegs
- 1 teaspoon ground cloves
- salt and pepper to taste
- 1 pint cider

## Directions

1. Chop meat, apples, and suet fine
2. Mix together all ingredients

title: Mincemeat (Version 5)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds meat
- 4 1/2 pounds apples
- 3/4 pound suet
- 3 pounds raisins
- 1 pound figs
- 4 tablespoons cinnamon
- 2 tablespoons cloves
- 3 tablespoons salt
- 3 pounds sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 3 nutmegs
- 1 cup stock
- 1 cup sweet pickle vinegar

## Directions

1. Boil raisins and figs
2. Chop meat, apples and suet fine
3. Put on stove with sugar, salt, etc.
4. Add cup stock (liquor in which raisins and figs were boiled)
5. Add 1 cup sweet pickle vinegar
6. Cook till all is boiling hot
7. Put in sealers or crock and cover tight

title: Minnie Ha Ha Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 cup milk or water
- piece butter size of an egg
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar mixed in flour
- 1 teaspoon soda mixed in milk
- a little salt
- 1 3/4 cups sugar
- 1 cup raisins
- white of an egg

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup sugar, 1 egg, 1 cup milk or water, piece butter size of an egg, 2 cups flour with 2 teaspoons cream tartar mixed in flour, 1 teaspoon soda mixed in milk, and a little salt
2. Bake cake
3. For icing: Beat 1 3/4 cups sugar, 1 cup raisins, and white of an egg to a stiff froth
4. Spread icing on cake

title: Minster Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- ½ cup butter
- ¾ cup sour milk
- 1½ cups flour
- ¾ cup boiling water
- 1 tablespoon grated chocolate
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 egg
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Bake 30 minutes in pan

title: Mixed Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 dozen large cucumbers
- 6 large onions
- salt
- 13.5 cups sugar
- 1 tablespoon turmeric
- 2 tablespoons mustard seed
- red pepper to taste
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Peel and slice cucumbers across
2. Slice onions
3. Salt and let stand over night
4. Drain off the brine
5. Add 13.5 cups sugar, 1 tablespoon turmeric, and 2 tablespoons mustard seed
6. Cover with vinegar
7. Let simmer 15 minutes

title: Mixed Pickles (Alternative)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck vegetables (onions, cucumbers and cauliflower)
- 1 cup salt
- vinegar
- 1 pound whole mixed spice
- 2 tablespoons turmeric powder
- 3 cups white sugar

## Directions

1. Soak vegetables in brine made with 1 cup salt over night
2. In morning wash in cold water
3. Put in kettle and almost cover with vinegar
4. Add 1 pound whole mixed spice, 2 tablespoons turmeric powder, and 3 cups white sugar
5. Bring to boiling point
6. Bottle

title: Mocha Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 2 eggs beaten lightly
- a little salt
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 3/4 cup scalded milk
- 1 teaspoon butter melted in the milk
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 1/4 cup butter creamed
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 2 teaspoons cocoa
- 2 teaspoons strong coffee

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup sugar, 2 eggs beaten lightly, a little salt, 1 teaspoon vanilla, 1 cup flour, and 1 teaspoon baking powder
2. Last of all add 3/4 cup scalded milk with 1 teaspoon butter melted in the milk
3. Bake
4. For filling: Cream 1 cup powdered sugar, 1/4 cup butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla, 2 teaspoons cocoa, and 2 teaspoons strong coffee all together
5. Spread filling between layers

title: Mocha Cakes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- Whites 4 eggs
- 2 cups powdered sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 1 tablespoonful water and vanilla
- 1 lb. almonds, chopped, or peanuts

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar, beating all the time, slowly add the milk, then the flour and baking powder sifted together, gently fold in well-beaten whites.
2. Bake in a long pan or in two square layer-cake tins.
3. Beat sugar, butter, water with vanilla; if not soft enough add more water.
4. When cake is cold cut in pieces about an inch square, which hold on a two-pronged fork, ice on five sides and dip in a bowl of finely rolled peanuts or chopped parched almonds, previously prepared.

title: Mocha Frosting
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 tablespoons hot strong coffee
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 teaspoon cocoa

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup powdered sugar, 1 tablespoon butter, 2 tablespoons hot strong coffee, 1 teaspoon vanilla, and 1 teaspoon cocoa together

title: Mocho Icing for Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup blanched almonds, chopped fine
- 5 tablespoons icing sugar
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon hot water
- 1/2 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix 1/2 cup blanched almonds chopped fine, 5 tablespoons icing sugar, 2 tablespoons butter, 1 tablespoon hot water, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla together

title: Mocho Icing for Cake (Variation 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup icing sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 tablespoon boiling water
- blanched almonds
- flavor to taste

## Directions

1. Beat 1 cup icing sugar, 1/2 cup butter, and 1 tablespoon boiling water to a cream
2. Flavor to taste
3. Spread on cake
4. Blanch almonds by covering in warm water for a while, then take peel off
5. Brown in oven and roll while warm
6. Sprinkle on icing
7. This will cover an ordinary-sized cake in a pan

title: Mock Baked Beans
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 cups beans
- 3 nice sized onions
- butter size of a walnut
- heaping teaspoon salt
- water

## Directions

1. Wash and soak beans over night
2. put into a crock
3. slice 3 nice sized onions and place on top of beans
4. add butter size of a walnut, heaping teaspoon salt
5. cover with water and add more from time to time as required to keep them covered
6. Place on top of the stove uncovered all day, and do not allow to boil
7. Serve as baked beans

title: Mock Bisque Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 can tomatoes
- 1 quart milk
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch
- 2 tablespoons butter
- pinch of soda
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Cook tomatoes until soft enough to strain
2. Scald milk in double boiler
3. Add cornstarch and butter
4. Boil 5 minutes
5. Add pinch of soda
6. When ready to serve, add strained tomatoes with salt and pepper to taste

title: Mock Cherries
body:
## Ingredients

- equal parts of cranberries and raisins
- water
- sugar to taste

## Directions

1. Take equal parts of cranberries and raisins
2. Cover with water and cook until tender
3. Add sugar to taste

title: Mock Cherry Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cranberries chopped fine
- 3½ cup raisins seeded and chopped fine
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup water
- 1 teaspoon flour
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. Bake with cover

title: Mock Cherry Pie No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cranberries
- 1 cup water
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 teaspoon almond essence
- flour

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. Sprinkle with flour
3. Bake in pie crust

title: Mock Cherry Pie No. 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cut cranberries
- 1½ cups chopped raisins
- 1 scant cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon flour
- ½ cup water
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix all together
2. Bake between 2 pie crusts

title: Mock Christmas Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pint milk
- stale bread
- 1 cup currants
- butter the size of egg
- 1/2 cup brown sugar
- pinch of salt
- 2 tablespoons molasses or table syrup
- 1 teaspoon baking soda
- spice to taste

## Directions

1. Boil 1/2 pint milk and pour over some stale bread
2. Add 1 cup currants, butter the size of egg, 1/2 cup brown sugar, pinch of salt, 2 tablespoons molasses or table syrup, 1 teaspoon baking soda, and spice to taste
3. Steam for 2 hours
4. Serve with or without sauce

title: Mock Clam Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of marrowfat beans
- Water enough to cover them
- 1 small onion
- 1 gallon of cold water
- A little summer savory
- 2 ounces of butter
- 1 cup of cream or rich milk
- Salt and pepper
- 2 slices of toast
- 4 hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Cook marrowfat beans over night in water enough to cover them
2. In the morning drain and put them on the fire with a small onion and a gallon of cold water
3. Boil until tender and strain
4. Add to the stock a little summer savory, two ounces of butter and a cup of cream or rich milk, season with salt and pepper
5. When the soup comes to a boil, cut two slices of toast into dice, and four hard-boiled eggs in slices
6. Put these in the tureen and pour the soup over and serve

title: Mock Cream Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup sugar
- butter size of an egg
- 1 heaping tablespoon flour
- 1 beaten egg
- 2 cups milk

## Directions

1. Cream together 3/4 cup sugar, butter size of an egg, and 1 heaping tablespoon flour
2. Add 1 beaten egg and 2 cups milk, and flavor to taste
3. Turn into an under crust and bake till firm

title: Mock Duck
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 round of well-pounded beefsteak
- pepper
- salt
- bread crumbs dressing as prepared for goose or duck
- flour

## Directions

1. Dust beefsteak with pepper and salt
2. Spread on it a thick layer of bread crumbs dressing as prepared for goose or duck
3. Roll up and tie with cord
4. Dust with flour
5. Roast in a covered meat pan till cooked, about 1.5 hours

title: Mock Duck (No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- dressing as for turkey
- 1 round of steak
- butter

## Directions

1. Prepare dressing as for turkey
2. Pound a round of steak and spread dressing over it
3. Lap over the ends
4. Roll steak tightly and tie closely
5. Spread butter over steak after tying
6. Lay on a rack in bake pan
7. Bake as a turkey or duck, basting often
8. Bake for 3.5 hours in a brisk oven
9. Pour gravy over it and serve hot

title: Mock Fried Oysters
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh veal
- salt and pepper
- beaten egg
- crackers
- hot butter or lard

## Directions

1. Cut fresh veal in small pieces 3 or 4 inches square
2. Dry with a towel and season to taste
3. Have a beaten egg and crackers rolled fine on 2 different dishes
4. Dip pieces of cutlet in the egg, then in the rolled crackers
5. Drop in hot butter or lard to cover and fry
6. Make a gravy after meat is removed

title: Mock Mince Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 1/2 cup cracker crumbs
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 1/2 cup molasses
- 1/6 cup lemon juice or vinegar
- 1/2 cup raisins
- 3/4 cup butter or 3 1/2 cup suet
- 1 egg
- spice to taste

## Directions

1. Mix in order given
2. Bake between crusts or cook, add eggs at last and serve in baked crusts

title: Mock Oysters
body:
## Ingredients

- Pulp of 1 can corn
- sifted crumbs to hold mixture together
- egg
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- seasoning

## Directions

1. Add enough sifted crumbs to hold mixture together
2. Moisten with egg, add baking powder, and seasoning
3. Drop by spoonfuls into hot fat

title: Mock Pound Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound sugar
- 6 ounces butter
- 4 eggs
- 1 small cup milk
- 3/4 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cream tartar
- 1 pound flour
- flavoring to suit taste

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar together
2. Add eggs
3. Add milk
4. Mix soda and cream tartar with flour
5. Combine all ingredients with flavoring to suit taste
6. Bake in moderate oven

title: Mock Roast Duck
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 pounds finely chopped beef or Hamburg steak
- 2 eggs
- 2 cups bread crumbs
- 2 cups milk
- 1 onion
- 2 tablespoons finely chopped fat pork
- salt
- pepper
- sage

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients to taste
2. Roast like duck

title: Mock Turtle Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 calf's head and 2 feet
- 2 veal cutlets
- 1 pt. browned flour
- 5 onions
- 1 lemon
- A little savory, thyme and marjoram
- 5 eggs boiled hard
- A few spices
- 2 wineglasses port or sherry

## Directions

1. Boil calf's head and two feet in plenty of water until the bones will draw out.
2. Boil two veal cutlets in the same water until tender for forcemeat balls.
3. To the liquor put brown flour, onions cut in thin slices and fried in butter with salt, pepper, and spices.
4. Before skimming the soup put in savory, marjoram and thyme.
5. Chop with the veal for balls a very little spice.
6. Take the pieces of cheek which boil off the head and cut in little squares and add to soup.
7. Boil four or five eggs hard.
8. Chop the whites and put yolks whole in the soup.
9. When you serve the soup put in wine to taste, port or sherry, say two wineglasses, and slices of lemon, or squeeze and stir the juice in.

title: Mock Turtle Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 soup bone
- 1 quart turtle beans
- 1 large spoonful of powdered cloves
- salt
- pepper
- nearly 6 quarts of water
- hard-boiled eggs
- lemon

## Directions

1. Soak the beans over night
2. Put them on with a soup bone in nearly 6 quarts of water and cook 5 or 6 hours
3. When half done, add the cloves, salt and pepper
4. When done, strain through a colander, pressing the pulp of the beans through to make the soup the desired thickness
5. Serve with a few slices of hard-boiled eggs and lemon sliced very thin

title: Mock Venison
body:
## Ingredients

- leg of mutton
- strips of salt pork
- pepper
- cloves
- currant jelly

## Directions

1. Lard a leg of mutton with strips of salt pork inserted in deep slits in the meat, which has been previously rolled in pepper and cloves.
2. Bake 2 hours, or according to size of roast.
3. About an hour before serving, spread over it currant jelly, return to the oven and let it brown.

title: Molasses Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 scant cup butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sour milk
- 4 cups sifted flour
- 1 tablespoonful ginger
- 2 tablespoonfuls soda

## Directions

1. Dissolve soda in a little cold water.
2. Bake in moderate oven.

title: Molasses Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 2 cups molasses
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 tablespoon spice
- 1 egg
- Flour to make a stiff batter

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup butter, 2 cups molasses, 1 cup sour milk, 1 teaspoon soda, 1 tablespoon spice, and 1 egg
2. Add flour to make a stiff batter
3. Bake

title: Molasses Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 3 cups flour
- 4 eggs
- 2 pounds raisins chopped fine
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup butter, 1 cup brown sugar, 1 cup molasses, 1 cup sweet milk, 3 cups flour, 4 eggs, 2 pounds raisins chopped fine, and nutmeg
2. Bake in a slow oven

title: Molasses Candy
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 qt. molasses
- 1 cup brown sugar
- Butter size of 1/2 egg
- 1/2 teaspoonful soda

## Directions

1. Put molasses, brown sugar, butter the size of half an egg, into a six-quart kettle
2. Let boil over a slack fire until it begins to look thick, stirring it often to prevent burning
3. Test it by taking some out and dropping a few drops in a cup of cold water
4. If it hardens quickly and breaks short between the teeth it is boiled enough
5. Now put in baking soda, and stir it well; then pour it out into well-buttered flat tins
6. When partly cooled, take up the candy with your hands well buttered, then pull and double, and so on, until the candy is a whitish yellow
7. It may be cut in strips and rolled or twisted
8. If flavoring is desired, drop the flavoring on the top as it begins to cool, and when it is pulled, the whole will be flavored

title: Molasses Candy
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup molasses
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup water
- 3 teaspoons vinegar
- 3/4 teaspoon cream tartar to 3 cups sugar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- speck soda

## Directions

1. Bring molasses, sugar, water, and vinegar to a boil
2. Add cream tartar
3. Cook to hard ball stage
4. Add butter and soda
5. Pour out on buttered plate
6. Pull

title: Molasses Candy 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon vinegar
- a little butter
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Boil 15 minutes
2. Pull

title: Molasses Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1/2 cup shortening
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon milk
- salt
- flour to make stiff

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients together and bake.

title: Molasses Cookies 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup shortening
- 1 egg
- 6 tablespoons boiling water
- 2 teaspoons soda
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- salt according to shortening used
- ginger to taste
- flour to make a soft dough

## Directions

1. Add flour to make a soft dough and bake in oven as hot as may be without scorching.

title: Molasses Cookies 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups molasses
- 1 cup yellow sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 large teaspoon baking soda
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- salt
- flour to mix as soft as can be rolled

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients together.

title: Molasses Creams
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups molasses
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup lard
- 1/2 cup sour cream
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 teaspoons ginger
- flour
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 3 tablespoons water
- 1 teaspoon butter
- a few drops vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix 2 cups molasses, 1 cup brown sugar, 1 cup lard, 1/2 cup sour cream, 1 teaspoon soda, and 2 teaspoons ginger
2. Stir thick and roll out a sheet long enough to fill a pan
3. Bake quickly
4. For icing: Mix 1 cup brown sugar, 3 tablespoons water, 1 teaspoon butter, and a few drops vanilla
5. Ice the whole sheet and cut in squares

title: Molasses Drop Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup butter
- 2 1/4 cups flour
- 2 tablespoons milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup chopped raisins or currants
- 1 teaspoon soda
- mixed spice

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup molasses, 1/2 cup sugar, 1/4 cup butter, 2 1/4 cups flour, 2 tablespoons milk, 2 eggs, 1 cup chopped raisins or currants, 1 teaspoon soda, and mixed spice
2. Drop and bake

title: Molasses Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3/4 cup brown sugar
- yolk 1 egg
- 1/4 cup molasses
- 1/4 cup cold water
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 1/2 cups flour in which has been sifted 1 teaspoon soda
- white of egg
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 3 tablespoons water
- chopped raisins or chopped nuts

## Directions

1. Mix 1 tablespoon butter, 3/4 cup brown sugar, yolk 1 egg, 1/4 cup molasses, 1/4 cup cold water, 1 teaspoon vanilla, and 1 1/2 cups flour in which has been sifted 1 teaspoon soda
2. Bake in two layers in a moderate oven
3. For icing: Beat white of egg to a stiff froth
4. Take 1 cup granulated sugar, add 3 tablespoons water, and boil till it threads
5. Pour into the beaten white of the egg and stir till it is cool enough to spread
6. Put between layers and on top
7. Chopped raisins or chopped nuts may be added to icing if desired

title: Molasses Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup molasses
- scant 1/2 cup butter
- 1/2 cup sour milk
- 2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup seeded and chopped raisins

## Directions

1. Save whites of 2 eggs for frosting
2. Put 1 cup sugar on the stove to boil
3. Beat the whites of eggs and stir with the raisins in the syrup for filling

title: Molasses Layer Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1/4 cup molasses
- 1/4 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 2 cups flour
- 3 eggs
- 1 cupful granulated sugar
- whites of 2 eggs
- 1 cup of chopped raisins

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup brown sugar, 1/4 cup butter, 1/4 cup molasses, 1/4 cup sour milk, 1 teaspoon soda, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, 2 cups flour, and 3 eggs, saving whites of 2 for filling
2. Bake in 2 layers
3. For filling: Put 1 cupful granulated sugar on to boil and let boil to a thick syrup
4. Add the beaten whites of 2 eggs with 1 cup of chopped raisins
5. Stir until right thickness to spread on cake
6. Put between layers as well as on top

title: Molasses Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup Barbados molasses
- 2 cups flour
- a little salt
- spices to suit taste

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Steam 3 hours.
3. Serve with sauce.

title: Mother Christie's Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup currants
- 1 quart flour
- 1 1/2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Use more flour if necessary to make it stiff.
2. Roll thin and bake in a pretty hot oven.

title: Mother's Favorite Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts raw cabbage
- 2 quarts boiled beets
- 2 cups grated horseradish
- 4 cups brown sugar
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 2 teaspoons black pepper
- cayenne pepper
- cold vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop cabbage fine
2. Chop boiled beets fine
3. It is best to put the cabbage, beets and horseradish through a food chopper
4. Combine cabbage, beets, horseradish, 4 cups brown sugar, 2 tablespoons salt, 2 teaspoons black pepper, and a little cayenne pepper
5. Cover with cold vinegar
6. Put in jars, airtight

title: Moulded Salmon
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of cold salmon
- 2 eggs beaten light
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter (melted but not hot)
- 1 tablespoonful of fine bread crumbs
- Seasoning of salt
- Pepper and minced parsley

## Directions

1. Chop the fish fine
2. Rub it in a mortar or bowl with the back of a silver spoon, adding the butter until it is a smooth paste
3. Beat the breadcrumbs into the eggs
4. Season before working all together
5. Put it into a buttered pudding-mould
6. Steam or boil for half an hour

title: Moulded Salmon
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can of salmon
- 2 well-beaten eggs
- 5 soda crackers rolled
- butter the size of an egg melted
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Carefully remove all bones and skin from salmon
2. Add beaten eggs, rolled crackers, melted butter, salt and pepper
3. Put in a well-greased mould
4. Steam for 2 hours
5. Serve with drawn butter

title: Mountain Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1/4 cup milk
- 2 eggs
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon lemon extract

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup butter, 1/4 cup milk, 2 eggs, 2 cups flour, 2 teaspoons baking powder, and 1 teaspoon lemon extract
2. Bake

title: Mountain Dew Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 crackers rolled
- 1 pint milk
- yolks of 2 eggs
- a small piece butter
- whites of 2 eggs
- 1 cup sugar

## Directions

1. Bake 1/4 hour
2. Take the whites of the eggs, beat to a stiff froth, add 1 cup sugar and put it on the top and bake 15 minutes

title: Mrs. Nelson's Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 large potatoes
- 2 onions
- 1 bunch celery
- 10c. worth of nuts
- dressing

## Directions

1. Boil potatoes and cut into dice
2. Chop onions
3. Chop celery
4. Mix together
5. Add dressing

title: Muffins
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- butter size of an egg
- 1 cup milk
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar
- 1 teaspoon soda
- salt
- flour to make quite a stiff batter
- a little nutmeg

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients

title: Muffins
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cups flour
- A little salt
- 3 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- Yolks of 2 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- Butter size of walnut

## Directions

1. Sift flour, salt and baking powder together.
2. Yolks of eggs well beaten, add milk, and melted butter.
3. Then stir in flour; beat up whites of eggs and stir in, have tins well buttered.
4. Bake in quick oven twenty minutes to one-half hour.

title: Muffins
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- A little salt
- 1 cake compressed yeast
- ½ pt. milk
- A little brown sugar
- Enough flour to make a thick batter

## Directions

1. Warm the milk and butter, dissolve the yeast in a little milk, beat the eggs well, add enough flour to make a thick batter.
2. Leave it to rise some hours.
3. Put into well-buttered rings.
4. Rise another hour.
5. Bake twenty minutes in a good oven.

title: Muffins
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup scalded milk
- 1 cup boiling water
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- 1 cake yeast
- 1 egg
- 4 cups flour

## Directions

1. Add butter, sugar and salt to the scalded milk and water.
2. When lukewarm add the yeast, and when that is dissolved add the egg and flour and beat all well together.
3. Place the crock of this mixture in a warm room for over night.
4. The next day fill buttered rings two-thirds full of this batter, and set them aside till risen to the top of the rings.
5. Bake half an hour.

title: Muffins
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt. flour
- 1/2 pt. milk
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls melted butter
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Mix the dry ingredients and sift them well.
2. Beat the eggs light and add the milk to them.
3. Add this to the dry ingredients and add the melted butter.
4. Beat the batter vigorously for a few seconds.
5. Put on buttered muffin pans and bake in a hot oven about twenty minutes.

title: Muffins
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 3.5 teaspoons baking powder
- 6 teaspoons salt
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 3/4 cup milk
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 1 egg

## Directions

1. Mix and sift dry ingredients
2. Add the milk gradually and the egg well

title: Muffins
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons cream of tartar
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 egg
- 3 teaspoons of melted butter
- a little salt
- 2 cups sweet milk

## Directions

1. Mix flour, cream of tartar, and soda with egg, melted butter, salt and sweet milk
2. Bake in gem pans

title: Muffins
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sweet milk
- 2 cups flour
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- butter size of an egg
- 1 teaspoon cream tartar
- 1/2 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Mix well and add flour enough to drop from spoon

title: Muffins, Plain
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups flour
- 1 cup water
- 1 1/2 cups sweet milk
- 3 teaspoonfuls butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls sugar
- 3 teaspoonfuls baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix the sugar and shortening to a cream
2. Add the liquid
3. Sift the flour and baking powder into it
4. Beat well
5. Heat gem irons hot, grease, fill nearly full, and bake in hot oven twenty minutes

title: Mulled Jelly
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful currant or grape jelly
- white of 1 egg
- 1 teaspoonful sugar
- 1 teacupful boiling water
- 1 slice dry toast or 2 crackers

## Directions

1. Take one tablespoonful of currant or grape jelly
2. Beat with it the white of one egg and a teaspoonful of sugar
3. Pour on it a teacupful of boiling water
4. Break in a slice of dry toast or two crackers

title: Mulligatawny Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One quart of chicken, veal, or calf's-head broth
- One small onion, minced
- A pinch of mace
- Half a cupful of soaked rice
- Juice of a lemon
- One generous tablespoonful of brown roux
- One teaspoonful of curry powder
- Salt to taste
- One teacupful of strained tomato-juice

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients in a pot and simmer until rice is cooked through

title: Muscat Sherbet
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoonful gelatine
- juice of 4 lemons
- grated rind 1 lemon
- 1 cup sherry
- 2 eggs (whites)
- 2 tablespoonfuls powdered sugar
- green coloring

## Directions

1. Dissolve one cupful of sugar in one pint of boiling water.
2. Take from the fire and add gelatine which has been soaked until soft in half a cupful of water.
3. Add the juice of lemons and the grated rind.
4. Let stand for half an hour, then strain.
5. Add sherry and three cupfuls of cold water and color green.
6. Turn into the freezer.
7. When half frozen, add meringue made by beating together the whites of eggs and powdered sugar until stiff and glassy.
8. Finish the freezing, pack and set away until serving time.

title: Mushroom Chops
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 doz. French chops
- Salt and pepper
- 3 cepes (large mushrooms)
- Cracker dust
- 1 egg, beaten
- Fat for frying

## Directions

1. Flatten and trim the chops, divide each cepe into four strips
2. Make a hole with the point of a knife in the thickest part of each chop and thrust through it a slice of the mushroom
3. Pepper and salt
4. Dip in raw beaten egg
5. Coat with cracker-crumbs and set in a cold place for one hour
6. Fry them in deep fat to a fine brown

title: Mushroom Farce
body:
## Ingredients

- large mushrooms
- bread crumbs
- seasoning
- butter
- toast
- cream

## Directions

1. Select the largest mushrooms
2. Chop remainder and mix with crumbs and seasoning
3. Stuff the large ones with this mixture
4. Saute in butter
5. Place piece of toast under it in pan
6. Add some cream and cook

title: Mushroom Sandwiches
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- beef tongue, minced
- boiled mushrooms
- French mustard
- buttered bread

## Directions

1. Mince beef tongue and boiled mushrooms together
2. Add French mustard
3. Spread between buttered bread

title: Mushroom Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One-half pound fresh mushrooms
- One quart good chicken stock
- One teaspoon salt
- Two tablespoons butter
- Three tablespoons flour
- One-half pint cream
- A dash of white pepper

## Directions

1. Remove the stock from mushrooms and mash mushrooms, chop them fine with a silver knife
2. Put on fire, melt one quart good chicken stock, cover and simmer gently for thirty minutes
3. Add one teaspoon salt and simmer ten minutes longer
4. Put two tablespoons butter in a saucepan, add (dry) three tablespoons flour; cook one minute
5. Add one-half pint cream to your mushrooms, and add by degrees to your butter and flour, with care to keep good thickness, smooth
6. Stir till it comes to a boiling point; add a dash of white pepper
7. For luncheon serve in cups

title: Mushrooms (Boiled)
body:
## Ingredients

- mushrooms
- melted butter
- buttered toast
- seasonings

## Directions

1. Wash, remove stems
2. dip caps in melted butter
3. place on broiler
4. broil 5 minutes
5. serve on pieces of buttered toast
6. sprinkle with seasonings

title: Mushrooms a la Sabine
body:
## Ingredients

- mushrooms
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- melted butter
- stock
- grated cheese
- toast

## Directions

1. Sprinkle with salt, pepper
2. roll in flour
3. saute in melted butter 3 minutes
4. add stock, cook 5 minutes
5. sprinkle with grated cheese
6. Serve on toast

title: Mushrooms Baked in Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- mushrooms
- butter
- cream

## Directions

1. Put in shallow buttered pan, cap side up
2. season with butter, add cream
3. bake 10 minutes in hot oven

title: Mustard Catsup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pk. tomatoes
- 1 lb. brown sugar
- ½ lb. mustard
- 3 red peppers
- 1 pt. cider vinegar
- ½ lb. salt
- 1 oz. ginger
- ½ oz. cloves
- ½ oz. mace
- ½ teaspoonful cayenne
- cornstarch

## Directions

1. Put tomatoes in oven until hot, and squeeze through a strainer
2. Add other ingredients
3. Put spices, which must be whole, in a bag
4. Add a tablespoonful of cornstarch to mustard, which makes it thicken
5. Cook for an hour, counting from time it begins to boil

title: Mustard Catsup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 gallon tomato juice
- 1 pound cooking sugar
- 1/2 pound mustard
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon pepper
- salt to taste

## Directions

1. Boil 30 minutes

title: Mustard Cauliflowers
body:
## Ingredients

- large cauliflowers
- salt water
- vinegar
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1/4 pound mustard
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 teaspoon turmeric

## Directions

1. Cut large vegetables into small pieces and put into a jar
2. Pour over them boiling salt water, let stand until cold
3. Pour into a bag, drain all night
4. Pour boiling vinegar over them, let stand until cold
5. Pour off vinegar, put on stove, add 1 tablespoon salt
6. To each quart of vinegar take 1/4 pound mustard, 1 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, and mix to a smooth paste in cold vinegar
7. Pour into the boiling vinegar and cook five minutes
8. Add 1 teaspoon turmeric
9. Bottle before cold

title: Mustard Cream Dressing for Cabbage
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 teaspoon mustard
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1 1/2 cups sweet cream
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch
- 3 1/2 cup vinegar

## Directions

1. Cook in a double boiler and stir until thick
2. When cold, or when you want to use it, add 3 1/2 cup vinegar, and serve on chopped cabbage

title: Mustard Cucumber Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 gallon cider vinegar
- 3/4 cup cloves
- 4 tablespoons salt
- 3/4 cup mustard
- 2 tablespoons tumeric
- 2 tablespoons curry powder
- 1 cup brown sugar
- flour to thicken
- cucumbers, soaked in brine over night

## Directions

1. Mix vinegar, cloves, salt, mustard, tumeric, curry powder, and brown sugar
2. Thicken with flour
3. Bring to a boil
4. Add cucumbers which have been soaked in brine over night
5. Cook 5 minutes

title: Mustard Dressing
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 large tablespoon mustard
- 1 large tablespoon cornstarch
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 cup vinegar
- 1 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Combine mustard, cornstarch, sugar, and egg.
2. Add vinegar and salt.

title: Mustard Pickle Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 teaspoons mustard
- 1 small teaspoon turmeric
- 1 teaspoon celery seed
- 1.5 cups brown sugar
- 1 quart vinegar
- 2 quarts of pickles

## Directions

1. Mix flour, mustard, turmeric, celery seed, brown sugar, and vinegar together to a smooth paste
2. Stir in pickles
3. Let boil for 10 minutes
4. Bottle while hot

title: Mustard Pickles
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 gallons white wine vinegar
- 1 pound mustard
- 4 ounces ginger, bruised
- 1 ounce garlic
- 2 ounces allspice
- 2 pounds salt
- 0.5 ounce chillies, bruised
- 2 onions, cut in pieces
- 2 ounces turmeric

## Directions

1. Mix the mustard and turmeric well with some of the vinegar before putting on to boil
2. Boil for a quarter of an hour, the onions and garlic only three minutes
3. When done put in a crock
4. When cold put in the vegetables

title: Mustard Pickles
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 gal. white wine vinegar
- 4 oz. ginger, bruised
- 2 oz. allspice
- 1/2 oz. chillies, bruised
- 2 oz. turmeric
- 1 lb. mustard
- 1 oz. garlic
- 2 lbs. salt
- 2 onions, cut in pieces

## Directions

1. Boil for a quarter of an hour, the onions and garlic only three minutes.
2. The mustard and turmeric should be mixed well with some of the vinegar before it is put on to boil.

title: Mustard Pickles
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 qts. little onions
- 3 qts. cucumbers
- 3 heads celery
- 3 heads cauliflower
- 4 green peppers (chopped)
- 3 qts. vinegar
- 2 cups sugar
- ½ cup flour
- 2 cups mustard
- ½ oz. turmeric
- curry powder

## Directions

1. Cut all up and put in brine twenty-four hours
2. Put on the stove and let come to a boil in the brine
3. Remove and drain perfectly dry
4. To boiling vinegar add sugar, flour, mustard, turmeric, with a little curry powder mixed in
5. Pour over vegetables

title: Mustard Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 gallon vinegar
- 3/8 ounce mustard seed
- 3 cups sugar
- 3/8 ounce celery seed
- 3/4 cup flour
- 1/8 pound mustard
- 1 quart cucumbers (whole)
- 1 quart onions
- 1 cauliflower broken up
- 1 bunch celery broken up
- 1 quart cucumbers chopped
- 1 quart onions chopped
- 1 cauliflower chopped
- 1 bunch celery chopped
- salt water

## Directions

1. Make paste of 3/4 cup flour and 1/8 pound mustard
2. Mix with cucumbers, onions, cauliflower, and celery
3. Scald in salt water
4. Let cook up good before sealing

title: Mustard Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 quarts cucumbers
- 1/2 peck pickling onions
- 4 heads cauliflower
- 4 green peppers
- 7 cups brown sugar
- 1 gallon cider vinegar
- 3.5 pound mustard
- 1 cup flour
- 1 ounce curry powder
- 1 ounce turmeric

## Directions

1. Mix 3.5 pound mustard, 1 cup flour, 1 ounce curry powder, and 1 ounce turmeric with cold vinegar
2. Stir into the boiling vinegar
3. When it thickens put in the vegetables
4. Cook slowly 1/2 hour

title: Mustard Pickles (Fourth Alternative)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts green tomatoes
- 1 quart small onions
- 2 quarts cucumbers
- 2 quarts cider vinegar
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 2 tablespoons mustard
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 0.5 ounce red pepper
- 1 ounce turmeric powder
- salt

## Directions

1. Cut tomatoes and cucumbers up in pieces
2. Sprinkle with salt and let stand over night
3. Scald in the morning in their own pickle and drain
4. Pare onions and scald with the rest
5. While draining, let the vinegar come to a boil
6. Pour over tomatoes, cucumbers and onions
7. Let stand till next morning
8. Drain off vinegar
9. Stir to a paste sugar, mustard, turmeric and flour with a little vinegar
10. Stir well and add to vinegar
11. When hot add pickles
12. Stir and scald on top of stove
13. On no account allow it to boil

title: Mustard Pickles (Second Alternative)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart cucumbers
- 2 quarts onions
- 1 quart green tomatoes
- 2 heads cauliflower
- 6 green peppers
- 1 pound mustard
- 4 cups brown sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 1 cup salt
- 1 gallon water
- 1 gallon vinegar

## Directions

1. Soak pickles in water made with 1 cup salt to 1 gallon water over night
2. Scald in 1 gallon vinegar
3. Let boil
4. Make a paste of the mustard and flour with vinegar
5. Stir into the boiling vinegar to thicken

title: Mustard Pickles (Third Alternative)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups vinegar
- 1 teaspoon turmeric powder
- 1 tablespoon mustard
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup sugar
- pepper
- cayenne or ginger
- small green cucumbers

## Directions

1. Combine 2 cups vinegar, 1 teaspoon turmeric powder, 1 tablespoon mustard, 1 tablespoon flour, 1 cup sugar, a little pepper, and cayenne or ginger
2. Thicken over fire
3. Have ready small green cucumbers
4. Put in as many as pickle will cover
5. Let boil up a few minutes on back of range
6. This may be made in winter with cucumbers taken from brine and freshened, or from sliced cucumbers

title: Mustard Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 ripe tomatoes
- 12 onions
- 12 apples
- salt
- 3/4 pound best mustard
- 1 quart vinegar
- 2 cups

## Directions

1. Cook well
2. Put through colander
3. Add mustard and vinegar

title: Mustard Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 ripe tomatoes
- 12 onions
- 12 apples
- a little salt
- 3/4 pound best mustard
- 1 quart vinegar
- 2 cups granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Cook tomatoes, onions, and apples well
2. Put through colander
3. Add 3/4 pound best mustard, 1 quart vinegar, and 2 cups granulated sugar
4. Boil 10 minutes

title: Mustard Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup white sugar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup vinegar
- 1 tablespoon mustard
- 3/4 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Mix mustard in vinegar
2. Add eggs, white sugar, butter, and salt
3. Cook in double boiler

title: Mutton Broth
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Neck or shoulder-pieces of mutton
- One quart of cold water per pound of meat
- One stick of celery per quart of stock
- Two tablespoonfuls of rice per quart of stock
- Salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Cut the meat into pieces and remove the fat
2. To each pound of meat add one quart of cold water
3. Simmer for four or five hours
4. Strain it into an earthen bowl
5. When ready to serve, remove the grease, and add to each quart of stock one stick of celery, two tablespoonfuls of rice, salt and pepper to taste
6. Boil until the rice is soft

title: Mutton Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound flank of mutton
- 1 small onion
- 3 slices carrot
- 3 slices turnip
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- pepper
- salt
- hot water

## Directions

1. Cut mutton into small pieces, season and place in earthen dish.
2. Add vegetables, mix butter and flour.
3. Add hot water and pour over meat, cover with boiling water, add salt to taste and cook 5 hours in aladdin pail.

title: Nancy Hank's Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups white sugar
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1/4 cup flour
- 1/4 cup milk and 3 eggs mixed together
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 4 tablespoons chocolate
- 4 tablespoons milk

## Directions

1. Mix 1 1/2 cups white sugar, 1/4 cup butter, 1/4 cup flour
2. Mix 1/4 cup milk and 3 eggs together and add
3. Add 1 1/2 cups flour and 2 teaspoons baking powder
4. Boil 4 tablespoons chocolate with 4 tablespoons milk
5. Cool chocolate mixture before adding to cake
6. Bake

title: Neapolitan Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- ½ cup milk
- ½ cup butter
- 1 cup flour
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- Whites of 5 eggs
- Cochineal to color half
- nuts

## Directions

1. Cream butter, sugar and milk together, then part of flour, whites of eggs with the rest of flour
2. Divide and color one portion
3. Fill bake-pan with alternate layers of white and pink
4. Must not be moved in the oven until cooked

title: New Jersey Cream Cheese
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- prepared rennet
- water
- cloth
- thread
- fine salt
- sweet grass

## Directions

1. Scald the quantity of milk desired; let it cool a little, then add the rennet according to directions on the packages of Prepared Rennet
2. When the curd is formed, take it out on a ladle without breaking it
3. Lay it on a thin cloth held by two persons
4. Dash a ladleful of water over each ladleful of curd, to separate the curd
5. Hang it up to drain the water off, and then put it under a light press for one hour
6. Cut the curd with a thread into small pieces
7. Lay a cloth between each two, and press for an hour
8. Take them out, rub them with fine salt, let them lie on a board for an hour, and wash them in cold water
9. Let them lie to drain, and in a day or two the skin will look dry
10. Put some sweet grass under and over them, and they will soon ripen

title: New Orleans Corn Bread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ pts. cornmeal
- ½ pt. flour
- 1 tablespoonful sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- 1½ pts. milk
- 1 tablespoonful lard

## Directions

1. Sift together cornmeal, flour, sugar, salt and powder
2. Rub in lard, cold
3. Add eggs (beaten), and the milk
4. Mix into a moderately stiff batter
5. Pour from bowl into a shallow cake-pan
6. Bake in rather hot oven thirty minutes

title: New Year's Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup sweet milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 2 cups raisins
- 1/4 pound walnuts
- 2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat sugar and butter together
2. Add the milk
3. Add eggs well beaten
4. Add 1 1/2 cups flour, 2 cups raisins, 1/4 pound walnuts, and 2 teaspoons baking powder
5. Bake in moderate oven

title: Nice Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 2 tablespoons sweet milk
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- flour enough to stiffen
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix soft and flavor with vanilla.

title: No. 1 Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 cups flour
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 egg
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Mix the butter to a cream, then add sugar, etc.
2. Roll thin, cut in cakes.

title: Noodle Dinner
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoons milk
- a pinch of salt
- flour
- boiling broth

## Directions

1. Break eggs, add milk and salt, mix until light
2. Add flour to make stiff
3. Roll very thin, flour well and cut in little strips
4. Drop into boiling broth
5. Cook for thirty minutes
6. Serve with broth

title: Noodle Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- flour
- salt
- boiling water
- cold water
- 3 pints hot stock

## Directions

1. Beat yokes of 2 eggs, add flour and salt, mould stiff
2. Roll thin and cut in strips
3. Put in boiling water ten minutes, then in cold water for three
4. Add 3 pints hot stock

title: Noodles
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups flour
- 4 eggs
- a little salt
- a little milk or water
- chicken broth
- pepper
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Mix flour, eggs and salt all together and make very stiff with flour
2. If 4 eggs does not wet the flour enough, add a little milk (sweet) or water, so as to mix like pie dough, only very stiff
3. Roll in a sheet or two, let lay 1 or 2 hours
4. Cut in long strips 2 inches wide, put 2 or 3 on top of each other and use a very sharp knife to cut in thin strips about 1/8 inch or less wide
5. Have chicken broth boiling hot, drop by handsful in kettle and stir with other hand
6. Let it boil 1/2 hour, add a little pepper and 1 tablespoon butter

title: Noodles With Cheese
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup noodles
- boiling water
- salt
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 1/2 teaspoons salt
- 3/4 teaspoon pepper
- 1 cup hot milk
- 3/4 cup grated cheese
- 1 cup noodle stock

## Directions

1. Cook noodles in boiling salted water 20 minutes or until soft
2. Drain, reserving 1 cup stock
3. For sauce: put butter, flour, salt and pepper into a saucepan
4. Stir over the fire until it froths
5. Add the milk and stir constantly until it thickens and boils
6. Add grated cheese and stir until well mixed
7. Serve with noodles

title: Normandy Salad
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One pint of French peas
- One pint of English walnuts
- Half a head lettuce
- Four nasturtiums
- Salt
- Mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Use the small French peas. Pour them into a colander, rinse in cold water, drain and dry on a towel.
2. Blanch the walnuts by letting them remain in boiling water for a few minutes, then cut into small pieces the size of the peas.
3. Sprinkle them with salt, and mix together, with enough mayonnaise to hold together.
4. Arrange on lettuce leaves, with bright yellow nasturtium here and there between the leaves.
5. Then cover the nuts and peas with the remainder of the mayonnaise.

title: Normandy Salad
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One pint of French peas
- one pint of English walnuts
- half a head lettuce
- four nasturtiums

## Directions

1. Use the small French peas
2. Pour them into a colander, rinse in cold water, drain and dry on a towel
3. Blanch the walnuts by letting

title: Nougat
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of cold water
- blanched almonds
- kernels of hickory, pecan, and hazel nuts
- thin strips of cocoanut
- split and stoned dates
- bits of figs
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon-juice

## Directions

1. Boil together a pound of sugar and half a cupful of cold water until a little of it becomes brittle when dropped in cold water
2. Do not stir it after the sugar melts
3. Butter a shallow tin (a biscuit-pan will answer)
4. Cover the bottom closely with blanched almonds, the kernels of hickory, pecan, and hazel nuts, thin strips of cocoanut, split and stoned dates, bits of figs, etc.
5. When the candy is done add to it a tablespoonful of lemon-juice
6. Pour it over your nuts and fruits
7. Mark it into strips or squares when cool

title: Novelty Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 quarts cabbage chopped fine
- 4 quarts green tomatoes seeded and chopped
- 10 onions chopped fine
- 1 teacup salt
- 4 green peppers
- 2 pounds sugar
- 3/4 ounce turmeric powder
- 3/4 ounce celery seed
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Mix cabbage, green tomatoes, onions, and salt
2. Let stand 3/4 hour
3. Drain well
4. Put in a kettle with 4 green peppers, 2 pounds sugar, 3/4 ounce turmeric powder, and 3/4 ounce celery seed
5. Cover with vinegar and boil 1 hour

title: Nun's Toast
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 or 5 hard-boiled eggs
- Butter size of egg
- 1 onion, chopped
- 1 teaspoonful flour
- 1 cup milk
- Hot buttered toast
- Pepper and salt

## Directions

1. Cut eggs into slices
2. Put butter into a sauce-pan, and when it begins to bubble add a fine chopped onion
3. Let the onion cook a little without taking color, then stir in flour
4. Add milk, and stir until it becomes smooth
5. Put in the slices of eggs and let them get hot
6. Pour over neatly trimmed slices of hot buttered toast
7. Season to taste with pepper and salt

title: Nut and Potato Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup black walnut meats
- 1 cup mashed and seasoned potatoes
- 1 cup soft bread crumbs
- 2 well-beaten eggs
- salt
- pepper
- onion-juice
- lemon-juice
- 3 tablespoons beef-stock

## Directions

1. Coarsely chop black walnut meats to measure 1 cup
2. Mix with 1 cup of mashed and seasoned potatoes and 1 cup of soft bread crumbs
3. Stir in 2 well-beaten eggs
4. Add a high seasoning of salt, pepper and onion-juice, a few drops of lemon-juice and 3 tablespoons of beef-stock
5. When cold, mould into croquettes
6. Dip each into beaten egg
7. Roll in fine crumbs
8. Fry in deep, smoking-hot fat

title: Nut and Spice Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup butter (scant)
- 1/4 cup molasses
- 1 small teaspoon soda
- 1/4 cup cold water
- 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1/4 teaspoon cloves
- flour

## Directions

1. Cream eggs, sugar and butter
2. Mix milk and baking powder in flour
3. Add chopped nuts
4. For filling: Chop 1 cup raisins and 1 cup sugar with a few chopped walnuts
5. Beat white of 1 egg
6. Moisten sugar with a little water and boil until it strings
7. Add nuts and raisins
8. Add beaten white of egg last
9. Beat until creamy and spread between layers and on top

title: Nut and Spice Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter (scant)
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 small teaspoon soda
- 1/2 cup cold water
- 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1/2 teaspoon cloves
- flour
- 1 cup raisins chopped
- 1 cup sugar
- a few chopped walnuts
- white of 1 egg
- water

## Directions

1. Put 1 small teaspoon soda in 1/2 cup molasses, stir till light
2. Make enough flour to make a little stiffer than an ordinary layer cake
3. For filling, moisten 1 cup sugar with a few chopped walnuts and a little water and boil until it strings
4. Add nuts and raisins
5. Add lastly beaten white of egg
6. Beat until

title: Nut Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 scant cups flour
- 4 heaping teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup white sugar
- 1½ cups sweet milk
- generous pinch salt
- 1 cup chopped walnuts

## Directions

1. Sift flour and powder 3 times
2. Mix well with sugar, nuts and salt
3. Add milk, stirring all together quickly
4. Put in a well-greased pan and let rise 20 minutes
5. Bake in a moderate oven ¾ hr
6. This bread is very nice with a cup of chopped raisins in place of walnuts, or with ¾ cup of each

title: Nut Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound walnuts
- 1/2 pound dates
- 3/4 cup brown sugar
- 2 cups sweet milk
- 4 cups flour
- 4 teaspoons cream tartar
- 2 teaspoons soda
- salt

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. Let rise 1/2 hour
3. Cook 3/4 hour in oven hot enough to brown

title: Nut Bread 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups white flour
- 2 cups Graham flour
- 1 egg
- 1 cup brown sugar
- buttermilk to make a stiff batter, or about 1 1/2 cups
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup chopped walnuts
- a pinch salt

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. When well mixed, set on the back of the stove for twenty minutes
3. Bake for about half an hour

title: Nut Bread 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 1/2 cups sweet milk
- a large pinch salt
- 4 cups flour
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- 10 cents' worth chopped nuts

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. Let rise 20 minutes
3. Bake in a moderate oven 3/4 hour

title: Nut Bread 4
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups flour
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 1 1/2 teaspoons soda
- 3 teaspoons cream tartar
- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 1 egg
- a few chopped raisins
- 1 1/2 cups chopped walnuts
- 1 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Knead with spoon
2. Let rise 1/2 hour
3. Bake in moderate oven 3/4 hour

title: Nut Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup milk
- 3 eggs
- 3 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup nuts

## Directions

1. Mix 2 cups sugar, 1 cup butter, 1 cup milk, 3 eggs, 3 cups flour, 2 teaspoons baking powder, and 1 cup nuts
2. Bake

title: Nut Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1/4 cup cream
- 1/4 cup white sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 3/4 cup chopped nuts
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- a little salt
- flavoring

## Directions

1. Mix 2 eggs, 1/4 cup cream, 1/4 cup white sugar, 1 cup flour, 3/4 cup chopped nuts, 2 teaspoons baking powder, a little salt, and flavoring
2. Bake

title: Nut Cheese Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- ground nuts, almonds, brazils and walnuts
- beaten yolks of 2 eggs
- a little cream
- puff or good short pastry shells

## Directions

1. Mix ground nuts, almonds, brazils and walnuts with the beaten yolks of 2 eggs and a little cream
2. Sweeten slightly
3. Pour into shells of puff or good short pastry
4. Bake in a quick oven

title: Nut Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup granulated sugar
- 1/2 cup maple syrup
- 3/4 cup melted butter
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in warm water
- 1 3/4 cups flour
- cinnamon
- cloves
- nutmeg
- 3/4 cup nut meats
- 3/4 cup chopped raisins

## Directions

1. Drop 1 teaspoon of mixture in a place on a buttered tin and bake in quick oven.

title: Nut Drop Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1½ cups granulated sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 pound dates chopped
- 1 pound almond nuts chopped, not too fine
- 1 small dessertspoon soda dissolved in a little warm water
- 2¾ teaspoons cream tartar
- 3 cups flour

## Directions

1. Drop on a buttered pan in pieces larger than a walnut
2. Do not allow them to touch in pan or they will spread out rather than rise high
3. Batter should be quite stiff
4. It is best to try one to see, as often more flour is needed than is mentioned in recipe

title: Nut Drop Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup chopped raisins
- 1 cup chopped walnuts
- 1 3/4 cups flour
- 2 eggs
- 3/2 teaspoon soda
- cassia, nutmeg and cloves

## Directions

1. Cream the butter and sugar
2. Stir in the well-beaten eggs
3. Mix the raisins, walnuts and spices with the flour and add with the soda dissolved in warm water
4. Beat thoroughly
5. Drop a teaspoon on baking pan
6. Bake

title: Nut Icing
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup chopped nuts
- 1 cup cream
- 1 cup sugar

## Directions

1. Boil chopped nuts, cream, and sugar together a few minutes
2. Beat till cold

title: Nut Icing (Variation 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 cents chopped dates
- 10 cents chopped walnuts
- 2 cups white sugar
- 3/4 cup milk

## Directions

1. Mix 10 cents chopped dates, 10 cents chopped walnuts, 2 cups white sugar, and 3/4 cup milk together

title: Nut Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup white sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1/2 cup weak milk
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 large cup chopped nuts

## Directions

1. Cream eggs, sugar and butter
2. Add milk and baking powder mixed in flour
3. Add the chopped nuts

title: Nut Macaroons
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup chopped nut meats
- 1 cup sugar
- 3 whites
- 3/4 cup fine cracker crumbs
- vanilla or almond flavoring

## Directions

1. Beat eggs very light
2. Add sugar gradually
3. Fold in nuts and vanilla and crumbs
4. If eggs are large, add more crumbs
5. Drop on unbuttered paper
6. Bake in a moderate oven

title: Nut Molasses Candy
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- molasses
- nuts
- peanuts

## Directions

1. When making molasses candy, add any kind of nuts you fancy
2. Put them in after the syrup has thickened, and is ready to take from the fire
3. Pour out on buttered tins
4. Mark it off in squares before it gets too cool
5. Peanuts should be fresh roasted and then tossed in a sieve, to free them of their inner skins

title: Nut Salad
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Equal parts of English walnuts
- celery
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Cut English walnuts in pieces or chop fine
2. Mix with celery
3. Serve with mayonnaise

title: Nut Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup chopped celery
- 2 cups chopped apples
- 1 pound English walnuts
- sweet salad dressing

## Directions

1. Chop celery
2. Chop apples
3. Chop English walnuts
4. Mix together
5. Add sweet salad dressing
6. This may be varied by using canned peas instead of celery

title: Nut Waffles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup nuts (walnuts preferred)
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Melt the butter and cream the sugar with it. Add the beaten egg. Mix baking powder and flour and sift. Lastly, mix in chopped nuts. Drop a very small quantity on pan and bake in a moderate oven.

title: Oak Hill
body:
## Ingredients

- cold boiled potatoes
- six hard-boiled eggs
- seasonings
- 2 cups thin white sauce
- buttered crumbs

## Directions

1. Cut up cold boiled potatoes and six hard-boiled eggs into slices
2. Arrange alternate layers with seasonings in buttered baking dish
3. Pour over it 2 cups thin white sauce
4. Cover with buttered crumbs
5. Bake until browned

title: Oatmeal Bread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ pt. oatmeal
- 2½ pts. flour
- ½ teaspoonful salt
- 1½ pts. salted water
- 3 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- ⅔ pts. milk
