5. Cover with liquor in which they are cooked, spice to taste

title: Pickled Peaches
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- peaches
- cloves
- cinnamon
- vinegar
- 4 or 6 pounds sugar to each gallon vinegar
- cinnamon stick
- mace

## Directions

1. Rub fruit with coarse cloth.
2. Stick one clove and one bit cinnamon into each peach.
3. Pack closely in a stone crock.
4. Boil vinegar enough to cover fruit with sugar.
5. Add cloves, cinnamon stick and a small quantity of mace tied in a thin muslin bag.
6. When all are boiled for five or seven minutes, pour over the peaches and cover closely.
7. Boil again the two days following and pour over fruit while boiling hot.
8. Cover close and keep in a cool cellar.

title: Pickled Pears
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 basket pears
- Juice of 6 lemons and rind of 4
- ½ lb. ginger root, well pounded
- ½ lb. sugar to each pound of fruit
- cloves

## Directions

1. Peel pears, leaving the stem
2. Put on with as little water as possible and let them stew a short time
3. Take them out, leaving the juice in the kettle
4. Add sugar, lemon rind and juice, and if desired any spice can be added in a muslin bag
5. Let all boil together for ten minutes
6. Add the pears with a clove or two stuck in each pear
7. Boil till the pears are tender

title: Pickled Pears
body:
## Ingredients

- pears
- 4 pounds granulated sugar to each 8 pounds pears
- 2 cups best vinegar
- 1 cup water
- 1 tablespoon whole cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon whole cloves

## Directions

1. Peel pears
2. Put all together in granite kettle and let stand for an hour
3. Place on fire and bring slowly to boil
4. Cook slowly, and when pears are tender remove carefully and place on plates to cool
5. Boil the liquid to a syrup
6. Fill jars with fruit and cover with the boiling syrup and seal while hot

title: Pickled Plums
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 pounds plums
- 4 pounds sugar
- 2 ounces stick cinnamon
- 2 ounces cloves
- 1 quart vinegar
- a little mace

## Directions

1. Put in the jar, first a layer of plums, then add a layer of spices, alternately
2. Scald the vinegar and sugar together
3. Pour it over the plums
4. Repeat 3 times for plums (only once for cut fruit, as apples or pears)
5. The fourth time scald all together
6. Put in glass jars and seal for winter use

title: Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart large onions
- 1 quart small onions
- 1 quart cucumbers
- 1 quart small cucumbers
- 1 large cauliflower
- 3 green peppers
- 3 cups of sugar
- 2 quarts vinegar
- 1 pound white mustard seed
- 3/4 ounce turmeric (powdered)
- 1 ounce celery seed
- 3/4 cup of flour
- 2 ounces mustard

## Directions

1. Chop large onions and cucumbers
2. Leave small onions and small cucumbers whole
3. Put all vegetables in separate dishes and let stand over night
4. In morning add sugar and vinegar
5. Add white mustard seed, turmeric and celery seed
6. Put all in kettle and scald
7. Make a paste of flour and mustard with a little vinegar
8. Turn in slowly, stir briskly and let boil up and seal

title: Pickles 2
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers (100 pickles)
- 1 cup salt
- 1 cup mustard
- 2 cups sugar
- green peppers
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Wash and wipe pickles dry
2. Take salt, mustard, sugar and some green peppers
3. Mix all together
4. Put the vinegar in this mixture
5. Pour it over the pickles cold
6. Use enough vinegar to cover pickles

title: Pie Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup brown sugar
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 1/2 cup sour milk
- 1 cup currants
- butter size of egg
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon all kinds spices
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- pie crust
- jam or jelly
- pink icing

## Directions

1. Line dish with pie crust
2. Spread bottom with jam or jelly
3. Pour in the cake
4. Bake and ice with pink icing

title: Pie Crust
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Three cups flour
- Two teaspoonfuls baking powder
- One teaspoonful of salt
- Two cups of lard
- One cup water

## Directions

1. Sift flour with baking powder and salt
2. Mix in lard and water

title: Pie Crust
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One-half pound flour
- one-half pound butter
- one-quarter pint cold water
- yolk of one egg
- juice of one-half lemon
- salt

## Directions

1. Sift the flour thoroughly, then add a pinch of salt and two ounces of butter.
2. Mix the yolk of egg and lemon juice with the water and mix the flour into a paste with this, stirring with a silver fork.
3. Turn it on a board, roll it out one-half inch thick, put three ounces of butter on, fold it over and roll out three times.
4. Line the patty tins thinly with this and put in a cool place till wanted.
5. Roll out the remainder of the paste, put the last three ounces of butter on it, and roll out five times.
6. Let it stand one-half an hour.
7. Fill the patty tins with mincemeat, roll the paste out as thin as possible, wet the edges of the paste in pans and cover each pie with three folds of paste.
8. Bake in a quick oven for about twenty minutes.

title: Pie Crust
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour cream
- 3 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon salt
- ¾ teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Sift soda well with flour
2. Roll and bake immediately after mixing

title: Pie Plant Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup stewed pie plant
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon flour
- Yolk of 1 egg
- White for frosting
- Lemon flavoring
- 1 crust

## Directions

1. Bake with 1 crust

title: Pigeon Pie
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- pigeon
- hot dripping
- onion
- butter
- fat salt pork
- hard-boiled eggs
- giblets
- flour
- water
- pepper
- salt
- pie crust

## Directions

1. Clean, wash, and joint
2. Wipe dry, pepper, salt, and saute them in hot dripping in which an onion has been fried
3. Butter a deep dish and lay in the meat alternately with layers of fat salt pork, chopped fine, hard-boiled eggs, and the giblets of the birds boiled and minced
4. Dredge flour over the pigeons as they go in
5. When the dish is full pour in a cupful of water in which the giblets were cooked, seasoned with pepper and salt
6. Cover the pie with a good crust, cut a slit in the middle
7. Bake one hour in a moderate oven

title: Pigeon Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- puff paste
- veal cutlet
- tender steak
- salt
- cayenne pepper
- mace
- pigeons
- butter
- pepper
- hard-boiled eggs
- veal broth

## Directions

1. Make a fine puff paste, lay a border of it around a large dish
2. Cover the bottom with a veal cutlet, or a very tender steak free from fat and bone
3. Season with salt, cayenne pepper and mace
4. Prepare as many pigeons as can be put in one layer of the dish
5. Put in each pigeon a small lump of butter, and season with pepper and salt
6. Lay them in the dish breast downwards
7. Cut in slices a dozen hard-boiled eggs and lay in with the birds
8. Put in more butter, some veal broth, and cover the whole with crust
9. Bake slowly for an hour and a half

title: Pilaf II
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown stock
- 3 tablespoons butter
- seasonings
- 1/2 cup rice (washed)
- 3/4 cup tomatoes, sliced and strained

## Directions

1. Add tomato to stock
2. Heat to boiling point
3. Add rice and steam until soft
4. Stir in butter and seasoning

title: Pinafore Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups white sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 3 cups flour
- 1/8 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cream tartar
- whites of 6 eggs
- strawberry extract
- lemon extract
- 1 pint milk
- yolks of 4 eggs
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Cream 2 cups white sugar with 1 cup butter
2. Add 1 cup sweet milk
3. Sift together 3 cups flour, 1/8 teaspoon soda, and 1 teaspoon cream tartar
4. Combine ingredients
5. Divide into two halves - flavor one half with strawberry extract and the other with lemon extract
6. For filling: combine 1 pint milk, yolks of 4 eggs, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, flavor with vanilla, sweeten to taste

title: Pineapple and Rhubarb Canned
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups pineapple
- 1 cup rhubarb
- 2 parts sugar and 1 part water

## Directions

1. Cut pineapple and rhubarb in dice
2. Put in sterilized jar
3. Pour over them a heavy syrup made of 2 parts sugar and 1 water
4. Place in water and let cook for some time

title: Pineapple and Tapioca Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup pearl tapioca
- one cup sugar
- one teaspoonful vanilla
- one pint grated or finely chopped pineapple
- plain or whipped cream

## Directions

1. Soak tapioca over night
2. Boil in the morning until clear
3. Add one cup sugar, one teaspoonful vanilla, one pint grated or finely chopped pineapple
4. Set away to cool
5. Serve with plain or whipped cream

title: Pineapple Bavarian Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tin pineapple
- 1/2 ounce gelatine
- 1 pint whipped cream

## Directions

1. heat pineapple
2. add gelatine to set it
3. cool
4. add whipped cream
5. Put in moulds and set in ice

title: Pineapple Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 1 1/4 cups flour
- 1 1/8 teaspoons baking powder
- 1/8 teaspoon vanilla
- 1/4 grated pineapple
- 1 grated lemon
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1/8 teaspoon cornstarch

## Directions

1. Mix eggs, butter, sugar, sweet milk, flour, baking powder, and vanilla
2. Bake in layers
3. For the jelly take 1/4 grated pineapple, 1 grated lemon, 3/4 cup milk, 1/8 teaspoon cornstarch
4. Let it come to a boil, or until it thickens

title: Pineapple Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of cream
- a large cup of sugar
- one-half box gelatine
- 1 cup of milk
- a tiny pinch of salt
- 1 pineapple (or 1 can of pineapple)

## Directions

1. Whip one pint of cream to a stiff froth.
2. Add a large cup of sugar.
3. Add one-half box gelatine soaked in a cup of milk for one hour.
4. Add a tiny pinch of salt.
5. Scrape one pineapple with a silver fork until it is in fine shreds, and add it to the cream (or one can of pineapple).
6. Set mould on ice to stiffen.

title: Pineapple Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1/2 pt. milk
- 1/2 oz. gelatine
- 3 oz. sugar
- 1/2 pt. double cream
- pineapple

## Directions

1. Take the pineapple and trim well, cut in half, cut one-half in dice, the other half pound in a mortar and pass through a hair sieve.
2. Whip the cream, add the juice of pine, also the dice of pine.
3. Dissolve the gelatine in a gill of the pineapple syrup, add sugar.
4. When cold add cream, and pour it into a decorated mould and set on ice.

title: Pineapple Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One can of pineapple (grated)
- Three ounces of loaf sugar
- Half a pint of water
- Three-quarters of an ounce of gelatine
- One and a half pints of cream

## Directions

1. Drain syrup from pineapple
2. Put in half a pint of water and sugar in sauce-pan
3. When dissolved add fruit
4. Boil ten minutes
5. Add gelatine and boil ten minutes longer
6. When entirely cold add the cream, well whipped
7. Pour in moulds

title: Pineapple Ice
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint pineapple juice
- juice 2 lemons
- 1 3/4 pints water
- 2 cups sugar

## Directions

1. Mix together pineapple juice and lemon juice
2. Add water and sugar boiled together 10 minutes
3. Strain and freeze
4. When frozen remove the dasher
5. Pack mixture in a mould, return to ice and salt; let stand 1 hour

title: Pineapple Jelly
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 package gelatine
- 4 lemons
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup cold water
- 1 cup pineapple juice
- 2½ cups boiling water
- ¾ cup chopped pineapple

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in one cup cold water for one-half hour
2. Add the grated rind of two lemons to this and soak for fifteen minutes
3. Add sugar, juice of four lemons, two and one-half cups boiling water and pineapple juice
4. Let come to a boil and strain into a mould which has been soaked in cold water
5. Drop three-quarters cup chopped pineapple into the mould and set away to cool

title: Pineapple Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup fine white sugar
- Well-beaten yolks of 5 eggs
- 1 small cup sweet cream
- 1 small pineapple grated
- Stiffly beaten whites of the eggs
- 1 crust

## Directions

1. Beat 1/2 cup butter and 1 cup fine white sugar to a cream
2. Add the well-beaten yolks of 5 eggs
3. Add 1 small cup sweet cream
4. Add 1 small pineapple grated
5. Lastly add the stiffly beaten whites of the eggs
6. Bake in 1 crust

title: Pineapple Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- stale cake
- butter
- a large cup preserved pineapple
- 1 cup cold water

## Directions

1. Butter a baking-dish and line it with stale cake, take a large cup preserved pineapple and put in with more cake, in layers, with cake on top
2. Pour over this a cup of cold water, cover with a plate and bake slowly for 2 hours
3. Serve with sauce

title: Pineapple Salad
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups shredded pineapple
- 1 cup chopped celery
- 1 sweet red pepper
- mayonnaise cream dressing
- lettuce hearts
- nut meats

## Directions

1. Add 1 cup chopped celery and 1 sweet red pepper, cut into dice to 2 cups shredded pineapple
2. Use mayonnaise cream dressing
3. Serve very cold on lettuce hearts
4. Garnish with nut meats

title: Pink Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart beets cooked and ground
- 1 quart cabbage ground fine
- 1 cup grated horseradish
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon salt
- pepper to taste
- cold vinegar to cover

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. Cover with cold vinegar

title: Pink Toast
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 3/4 cups stewed tomato strained
- 3/4 teaspoon soda in tomatoes
- 1 cup scalded milk
- slices of unbuttered toast

## Directions

1. Heat butter and add flour and salt. Add stewed tomato strained with soda. Add scalded milk. Pour over slices of unbuttered toast.

title: Piquant Sandwiches
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- butter
- three hard-boiled eggs
- sharp green pickle
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Cut bread very thin, buttering it lightly on the loaf
2. Upon each slice spread a filling made by mixing three hard-boiled eggs, minced extremely fine, with half their bulk of sharp green pickle chopped equally small
3. Season this compound with salt and pepper to taste
4. Work in a little butter
5. Lay another thin slice of bread, buttered side down, over this
6. Cut them into square and triangular sandwiches

title: Pistachio Paste
body:
## Ingredients

- marshmallow
- a few drops of almond
- 1/4 cup pistachio nuts, blanched and chopped
- leaf of green coloring

## Directions

1. To marshmallow add a few drops of almond
2. Add 1/4 cup pistachio nuts blanched and chopped
3. Add leaf of green coloring

title: Pittsburg Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup New Orleans molasses
- 1 cup chopped apples
- 1 cup sour milk
- 2 teaspoons baking soda
- flour enough to make a batter

## Directions

1. Bake in a square pan with a slow fire about 45 minutes
2. When baked, it is moist
3. Frost if you like

title: Plain Apple Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 a bushel of sound, firm greening apples
- cold water
- 1 fresh lemon
- granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Cut apples from core, skin left on
2. Wash clean
3. Put in a granite kettle with water to not quite cover
4. Cook till all are broken up
5. Empty in a jelly bag made with thin cotton
6. Let drip over night
7. Return to the fire
8. Cut up one fresh lemon and tie loosely in a thin cloth
9. Put in the juice and let boil briskly half an hour
10. Skim and take out the lemon
11. Add pound for pound granulated sugar
12. Heat sugar in the oven before adding
13. Let boil 10 or 15 minutes
14. Pour up in glasses

title: Plain Apple Pie
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- water
- top crust
- butter
- paste
- egg yolk
- sugar
- nutmeg
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Fill a pie with apples sliced thin, using enough to make the pie at least an inch thick when done.
2. Add a little water to the apples, and cover with a top crust.
3. Make the top crust richer than the under one by rolling out a part of the same paste, covering it with bits of butter, folding it together, and rolling it again, repeating the operation two or three times.
4. Cut a few slits in the paste to let out the steam while cooking.
5. Brush the top with beaten yolk of egg.
6. When the pie is baked, and while it is still hot, lift off carefully the top crust.
7. Add sugar, nutmeg, and a little butter, and mix them well with the apples.
8. Replace the top crust, and dust it with powdered sugar.

title: Plain Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 0.75 cup milk
- 0.5 cup butter
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat eggs well
2. Add sugar
3. Add the softened butter
4. Stir in part of milk
5. Add half of the flour, through which baking powder has been sifted
6. Add remainder of milk and flour
7. Bake in square tin
8. Cover with chocolate icing if desired or sifted sugar

title: Plain Chicken Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 fowl
- 4 quarts water
- 1 cupful rice
- 2 sticks celery
- 1 sprig parsley
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Place the fowl cut into pieces in a saucepan with four quarts of cold water
2. When it comes to the boiling-point, draw it aside and let it simmer for three hours
3. Add one thick slice of onion, two sticks of celery, one sprig of parsley, and one cupful of rice
4. Simmer for another hour
5. Strain and let the soup stand until the grease can be taken off the top
6. Remove the meat, bones, and vegetables from the strainer and press the rice through the sieve
7. Stir this into the soup
8. Season with salt and pepper and heat again before serving

title: Plain Fruit Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. flour
- 1 lb. butter
- 1½ lbs. brown sugar
- 8 eggs, beaten separately
- 2 teacups milk
- 2 heaping teaspoonfuls baking powder
- 3 lbs. raisins
- 2 lbs. currants
- 1 lb. mixed peel
- 2 heaping teaspoonfuls ground cinnamon
- 4 teaspoonfuls lemon extract
- ½ nutmeg, grated

## Directions

1. Bake between three and four hours

title: Plain Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 3 cups sifted flour
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 pounds raisins chopped fine
- 1 nutmeg

## Directions

1. Bake in a slow oven

title: Plain Fruit Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound well-washed currants
- 1 pound raisins
- 1 cup butter beaten to a cream
- 1 cup white sugar
- 1 cup milk
- 3 cups flour
- 3 eggs
- 3 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Paper a dish and bake 1 hour

title: Plain Ginger Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup suet
- 2 cups flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful salt
- 3 large tablespoonfuls brown sugar
- 3 large tablespoonfuls molasses
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- 1 large teaspoonful ground ginger
- A small grating of nutmeg
- 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 1/4 cup cold water

## Directions

1. Line a melon mould with raisins, pour in the batter, and steam for two and one-half hours.

title: Plain Gingerbread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 2 teaspoons soda
- 2 teaspoons ginger
- 1 cup cold water
- 3 cups flour
- 1/2 cup melted butter

## Directions

1. Beat molasses and soda to a foam
2. Add ginger and cold water
3. Add flour
4. Add melted butter last

title: Plain Pastry for Pies
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 qt. flour
- 1 cupful butter
- 1 cupful cold water
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- Half butter and half lard or cottolene will do

## Directions

1. Sift the salt and flour together, reserving a little flour for the board
2. With a knife, cut the butter into the flour
3. Add the water a little at a time, and mix it in lightly with the knife
4. Turn it on to the board, and roll it twice — that is, after it is rolled out once, fold it together and roll it again
5. If the paste is wanted richer for the top crust, put bits of butter over the paste when rolled; fold and roll it again several times
6. Fold the paste, and put it in the ice-box for an hour before using, keeping it covered
7. In making pastry everything should be cold, the handling light, and the hands used as little as possible
8. Paste will keep several days in a cool place, but should be rolled in a napkin, so it will not dry and form a crust
9. Roll the paste one-eighth inch thick, and a little larger than the tin
10. Dust the pan with flour; place the paste on it, letting it shrink all it will
11. Lift it from the sides to fit into place, and press it as little as possible
12. Cut a narrow strip of paste, and lay around the edge; moisten it so it will stick
13. Brush the top of the bottom crust with white of egg, so the filling will not soak in and make it heavy
14. Put in the filling, and cover with another sheet of pastry
15. Moisten the top of the strip of pastry so the top crust will adhere to it; this gives three layers around the edge
16. Trim and press them lightly together
17. Cut several slits in the top crust to let the steam escape in cooking
18. A thin piece of paste cut into fancy shape can be placed in the centre for ornament if desired

title: Plain Plum Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Three cups of flour
- two cups of suet
- one teaspoonful baking-powder
- one cup of sugar
- one cup of molasses
- Fruit and spice to taste
- milk

## Directions

1. Mix soft with milk
2. Steam three and a half or four hours

title: Plain Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup sugar (scant)
- 3/4 cup lard (scant)
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup rich milk (cream is best)
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup of any desired fruit (apples are nice)
- enough flour to make a nice batter

## Directions

1. Mix eggs, sugar, lard, and salt thoroughly
2. Add milk, baking powder, fruit, and enough flour to make a nice batter

title: Plain Puree of Green Peas
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of peas
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- pepper
- paprica or a dash of cayenne
- 1/2 teaspoonful of sugar
- 3 mint leaves, finely minced
- fried bread

## Directions

1. Boil and rub a quart of peas through a colander, or pass them through a vegetable-press.
2. Heat a tablespoonful of butter in a saucepan with pepper, paprica, or a dash of cayenne, half a teaspoonful of sugar, and three mint leaves, finely minced.
3. Stir in the pulped peas and toss and stir with a silver fork until they are very hot.
4. Pile upon a hot platter and lay triangles of fried bread about the base.

title: Plain Rice Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 3 cups rice, ground
- 2 large tablespoonfuls sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 2 tablespoonfuls melted butter or cream
- 3 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- 2 large cups milk

## Directions

1. Beat eggs, add sugar; melted butter or cream; and milk
2. Mix into a stiff batter with ground rice and flour in proportion of three cups of rice to one of flour
3. Add baking powder last; the sugar may be melted if desired

title: Plain Steamed Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour milk or cream
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 1/2 cup melted butter
- 2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- a little salt

## Directions

1. Mix molasses and butter together
2. Beat till light
3. Stir in milk and salt
4. Then stir in the flour and soda
5. Steam 1 1/2 hours

title: Plain Steamed Pudding 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour milk
- part of a teaspoon soda
- part of a teaspoon salt
- part of a cup sugar
- flour to make stiff batter

## Directions

1. Mix sour milk, soda, salt, sugar, and flour to make stiff batter
2. Steam 2 hours

title: Plain Stirred Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/4 cup butter
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 teaspoon spice
- flour

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients with flour to stiffen

title: Plum Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. raisins
- 2 lbs. currants
- 1 lb. brown sugar
- 1/2 lb. blanched almonds
- 1/2 lb. citron, sliced
- 1/2 teaspoonful soda
- 1/2 lb. lemon peel
- 1 teacup molasses
- 1/2 lb. butter
- 6 eggs
- 1/2 cupful milk
- cloves
- cinnamon
- nutmeg
- flour

## Directions

1. Put soda in last
2. Flour to make it stiff enough not to run
3. Brown the flour on the stove; it must be sifted before using
4. Bake in a very slow oven

title: Plum Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 pounds flour
- 1 pound sugar
- 1 pound butter
- 3/4 pound currants
- 3/4 pound sultanas
- 10 eggs
- 1/2 pound candied peel
- 3/4 pound rice flour
- 3/4 pound split almonds
- a little wine
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix the rice flour with the sugar
2. Mix a teaspoon baking powder with the flour
3. Beat the butter and sugar to a cream
4. Add the wine and eggs
5. Gently stir in the flour
6. Add the rest of the ingredients
7. Bake in tins lined with buttered paper 2 hours

title: Plum Catsup
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds blue plums
- 1 3/8 pounds brown sugar
- 3/4 pound mustard
- 1 pound raisins chopped fine
- 1 ounce garlic
- 1 1/2 dozen ripe tomatoes
- 1 1/4 dozen large apples
- 1 1/4 dozen large onions
- 2 red peppers

## Directions

1. Boil 1 hour
2. Strain through sieve

title: Plum Catsup 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck Damson plums
- 3/4 pound sugar to 1 pound plums
- 1 1/2 teaspoons ground cloves
- 3 dessertspoons ground cinnamon
- 1 quart vinegar
- 1 dessertspoon salt

## Directions

1. Boil the vinegar and plums well
2. Strain through sieve
3. Add the other ingredients
4. Boil till it thickens

title: Plum Conserve
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 quarts stoned plums
- 2 1/2 pounds sugar
- 1/4 pound English walnuts
- 1 pound raisins
- 2 oranges

## Directions

1. Boil about 20 minutes
2. Be careful not to scorch
3. Seal in jelly glasses

title: Plum Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound stoned raisins
- 1 pound currants
- 1 pound stale bread crumbs
- 1 pound brown sugar
- 3/2 teaspoon ground ginger
- 1/4 teaspoon mixed spice
- 1/8 a nutmeg
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 ounces lemon peel
- 2 ounces orange peel
- 2 ounces citron peel
- 2 cups milk
- eggs

## Directions

1. Mix all the dry ingredients together
2. Beat eggs separately and mix into the dry mixture
3. If not soft enough, use 1 or 2 more eggs
4. Grease mold, put in the mixture into the steamer, cover closely, and steam 6 hours the first day and 2 hours before using

title: Plum Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 1/2 pound bread crumbs
- 1/4 pound suet
- 3/4 pound candied peel
- 1/4 pound raisins
- 1/4 pound currants
- 1 1/4 cups sweet milk
- spice to taste

## Directions

1. Boil 6 hours

title: Plum Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups suet
- 4 cups brown sugar
- 4 cups flour, browned in oven
- 4 cups bread crumbs
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 4 cups currants
- 6 cups raisins
- 1/4 pound candied peel
- 8 eggs

## Directions

1. Steam from 5 to 6 hours

title: Plum Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound raisins
- 1 pound currants
- 1 pound suet
- 1 pound bread crumbs
- 7 eggs
- lemon peel to suit taste
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1/4 teaspoon soda
- sour milk
- flour

## Directions

1. Stir 1/4 teaspoon soda in just enough sour milk to moisten it
2. Add flour to make stiff enough
3. Steam 3 hours

title: Plum Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup beef suet
- 1 heaping cup sugar
- 2 cups bread crumbs
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup currants
- 1 cup chopped almonds
- 1/8 cup citron peel
- a teaspoon soda
- 1 pint flour
- 1 cup milk
- 4 eggs
- 1 teaspoon each cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and salt

## Directions

1. Boil 4 hours

title: Plum Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. stoned raisins
- 1 lb. currants
- 1 lb. beef suet
- 1/2 lb. sugar
- 2 oz. lemon peel
- 2 oz. citron peel
- 2 oz. orange peel
- 6 eggs
- 6 oz. flour
- 1/2 lb. breadcrumbs
- Little nutmeg, cinnamon, cloves and a little salt
- A little milk

## Directions

1. Mix all together with eggs and milk
2. Dip cloth in boiling water and flour
3. Put in mixture and tie loosely
4. Boil fast for four hours and a half

title: Plum Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One pound each of suet, bread crumbs, raisins, currants, and sugar
- one glass brandy
- one glass sherry
- eight eggs
- one nutmeg
- a little mace or cinnamon
- one saltspoonful of salt
- milk enough to moisten

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients with milk enough to moisten
2. Boil six hours

title: Plum Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 lbs. muscatel raisins
- 1 1/2 lbs. currants
- 1 lb. sultana raisins
- 2 lbs. moist sugar
- 2 lbs. breadcrumbs
- 2 lbs. chopped suet
- 6 oz. mixed peel
- rind of 2 lemons
- 1 oz. ground nutmeg
- 1 oz. ground cinnamon
- 2 oz. chopped almonds
- 1/2 pt. brandy
- 6 eggs

## Directions

1. Mix all the dry ingredients together and moisten with the brandy and well-beaten eggs.
2. Boil about six hours.

title: Plum Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. breadcrumbs
- 1 lb. raisins
- 1 lb. currants
- 1 lb. chopped suet
- 8 eggs (well beaten)
- 2 apples (chopped fine)
- 1/2 lb. mixed peel
- 1/2 lb. brown sugar
- 1 small teaspoonful salt
- 1 nutmeg
- 1 wineglass brandy
- a little milk or molasses

## Directions

1. Boil six hours, or, if some days before, four, and when wanted two hours

title: Plum Shape
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one quart of plums
- boiling water
- one-half box gelatine
- one cup cold water
- one cup water
- whipped cream
- lemon juice or wine

## Directions

1. Pour boiling water over a quart of plums, let them stand long enough to soften the skins, but not to break them open.
2. Pour off the water and when cool peel and remove the stones, taking care to save all the juice.
3. Soak half a box of gelatine in a cup of cold water.
4. Stew the plums until tender after adding a cup of water.
5. Sweeten to taste.
6. Stir the whole while hot into the gelatine.
7. Serve with whipped cream.
8. Lemon juice or wine may be used with the water, if liked.

title: Poached Apricots
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- slices of sponge cake
- halves of apricots
- whites of two or three eggs
- sugar
- whipped cream
- apricot juice

## Directions

1. Upon some slices of sponge cake place halves of apricots (the round sides uppermost)
2. whip the whites of two or three eggs to a snow frost with sugar
3. Place this around the apricot halves so as to make them resemble poached eggs
4. Add a little of the apricot juice as flavoring
5. Whipped cream, if obtainable, is even better than the meringue

title: Poached Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- boiling water
- butter
- pepper

## Directions

1. Break as many eggs as desired, one at a time.
2. Drop carefully into a spider filled with boiling water.
3. When the whites of the eggs are well set, slip a spoon carefully under and take out.
4. Lay a small piece of butter on each egg, a slight dash of pepper, and serve immediately.

title: Poached Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- milk
- flour

## Directions

1. Poach eggs in milk instead of the usual way.
2. Thicken milk with flour to form a sauce and pour over eggs.

title: Polka Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoonfuls arrow root
- 4 eggs
- 3 oz. fresh butter
- 1 teacup white sugar
- 1 dessertspoonful rose water
- a few drops essence of lemon
- 3 pts. of milk

## Directions

1. Mix arrowroot in a pint of cold milk
2. Beat eggs well and add butter (cut into small bits), rose water, essence of lemon or ratafia, sugar
3. Boil two pints of milk in a double boiler
4. When boiling stir in the other ingredients, without taking the boiler off the stove
5. Let it boil till thick, then pour into a mould to cool
6. Turn it out and serve cold

title: Poor Man's Cake Without Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons melted lard and butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 cups flour
- nutmeg and cinnamon

## Directions

1. Melt the butter and lard together
2. Add the sugar and cream together
3. Add the milk, flour and raisins and seasoning
4. Beat to a stiff batter

title: Poor Man's Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups brown sugar
- 2 cups sour milk
- 1 lemon peel
- 1 pound raisins
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour enough to make a batter which will rise in the centre and not fall over

## Directions

1. Bake in a slow oven 1 hour

title: Poor Man's Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups brown sugar
- 2 cups sour milk
- 1 lemon peel
- 1 pound raisins
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour enough to make a batter

## Directions

1. Mix butter and brown sugar together
2. Add sour milk
3. Add lemon peel and raisins
4. Add flour and soda to make a batter that will soon rise in the centre and not fall over
5. Bake in a slow oven 1 hour

title: Poor Man's Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups brown sugar
- 2 cups sour milk
- 1 lemon peel
- 1 pound raisins
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour

## Directions

1. Mix butter, sugar, sour milk, lemon peel, raisins, and soda
2. Add flour enough to make a batter that will soon rise in the centre, and not fall over
3. Bake in a slow oven 1 hour

title: Poor Man's Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 3 tablespoons yellow sugar
- 1 scant cup molasses
- butter or lard size of an egg
- 2 cups flour
- 1 cup boiling water
- 1 teaspoon baking soda
- 1 cup yellow sugar
- 1 tablespoon molasses
- a little water

## Directions

1. Beat eggs well
2. Mix in 3 tablespoons yellow sugar and 1 scant cup molasses
3. Add butter or lard size of an egg
4. Add 2 cups flour measured before sifting
5. Mix well
6. Add 1 cup boiling water into which has been dissolved 1 teaspoon baking soda
7. Bake in layers
8. For frosting: Mix 1 cup yellow sugar, 1 tablespoon molasses and a little water
9. Boil till it threads

title: Poor Man's Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup flour
- 3/4 teaspoon each soda, cinnamon, ginger, allspice and salt
- 1/4 cup molasses
- 3/2 cup sweet milk
- 3/2 cup raisins

## Directions

1. Sift all together, add 1/4 cup molasses and 3/2 cup each sweet milk and raisins
2. Steam 3 hours and serve warm with cream or sauce

title: Pop Overs
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup milk
- one cup flour
- one egg
- little salt

## Directions

1. Bake in muffin tins twenty minutes

title: Popovers
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One pint of flour
- One pint of sweet milk
- Butter size of an egg
- Two eggs
- Pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Bake in gem-irons, well heated, in hot oven.

title: Popovers
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 2 cups milk
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. eggs beaten separately

title: Pork Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 cup buttermilk or sour milk
- 4 eggs
- 2 heaping teaspoons cream of tartar
- 2 teaspoons soda
- 1 each of cloves, cinnamon, nutmeg and ginger
- 2 cups black strap
- 1 cup nut meats (any kind) if desired
- flour enough to bake in loaf cake
- raisins stoned
- peel cut fine

## Directions

1. Grate the pork and beat to a cream with brown sugar
2. Next add eggs well beaten, and beat well together
3. Then add sour cream, molasses and sour milk, in which dissolve soda
4. Sift cream of tartar with flour and spices, and mix well again
5. Add fruit last, raisins stoned and peel cut fine
6. Bake about 1½ to 2 hours

title: Pork Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound fat salt pork, free from lean or rind, chopped fine
- 1/2 pint boiling water
- 1 pound seeded and chopped raisins
- 1/2 pound citron shaved into shreds
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 teaspoon saleratus
- salt
- sifted flour
- 1 ounce nutmeg finely ground
- 1 ounce cloves finely ground
- 2 ounces cinnamon finely ground

## Directions

1. Chop fat salt pork fine as almost like lard
2. Pour 1/2 pint of boiling water on it
3. Add seeded and chopped raisins and citron shaved into shreds
4. Add sugar, molasses, saleratus rubbed fine and put into the molasses, and a little salt
5. Mix all together
6. Stir in sifted flour to make the consistency of common cake mixture
7. Add nutmeg, cloves, and cinnamon all finely ground
8. Bake slowly, testing with a sliver; when nothing adheres, it is done

title: Pork Chops
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- pork chops
- beaten egg
- cracker-crumbs
- salt
- pepper
- powdered sage
- finely minced onion
- hot fat

## Directions

1. Cut off the skin, trim neatly and dip in beaten egg.
2. Dip in cracker-crumbs seasoned with salt, pepper, powdered sage, and finely minced onion.
3. Set in a cold place for an hour or more.
4. Fry in hot fat, turning often, for at least twenty minutes.
5. Send in dry and hot, and serve with apple sauce.

title: Pork or Xmas Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound raw pork off back
- 1 pound brown sugar
- 1 pound raisins
- 1 pound currants
- 3/4 pound citron peel
- 1/2 pound lemon peel
- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 cup buttermilk or sour milk
- 4 eggs
- 2 heaping teaspoons cream of tartar
- 2 teaspoons soda
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 2 cups black strap
- 1 cup nut meats if desired
- flour enough to bake in loaf cake

## Directions

1. Grate the pork and beat to a cream with brown sugar
2. Add eggs well beaten and beat well together
3. Add sour cream, molasses and sour milk in which dissolve soda
4. Sift cream of tartar with flour and spices
5. Mix all well together
6. Try a little in a gem tin before baking the whole cake
7. Will make 4 or 5 cakes according to size of pans

title: Pork Pot-Pie
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. of pork
- 2 slices peeled lemon
- 4 potatoes
- 1 tablespoonful catsup
- pepper
- salt
- chopped parsley
- celery
- 1 tablespoonful butter
- flour
- biscuit-dough

## Directions

1. Cut pork into pieces an inch long and half an inch wide; cover with cold water, put in slices of peeled lemon, chopped parsley and minced celery, and stew slowly half an hour.
2. Add potatoes, sliced very thin and parboiled for ten minutes in another vessel, and catsup.
3. Season with pepper and salt and dredge in a tablespoonful of flour.
4. Cover closely and cook until the meat is ready to drop to pieces.
5. Stir in a tablespoonful of butter, rolled in flour, boil up and put the pork into a covered deep dish, leaving the gravy in the saucepan.
6. Have ready some strips of biscuit-dough, two inches long and half an inch wide, drop them into the boiling gravy and cook ten minutes.
7. Lay half of them across the meat in one direction, the rest in another, making squares all over it; pour in the gravy gently and send to table.
8. Alternatively, cut the biscuit-dough round with a cake-cutter and bake these rounds in the oven by the time the pork-stew is done. Put meat and gravy upon a deep platter and cover with the hot biscuits laid closely together.

title: Pork Steaks and Tenderloins
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- pork steaks and tenderloins
- pepper
- salt
- powdered sage
- onion-juice
- lemon-juice
- butter

## Directions

1. Broil over a clear fire, turning every two minutes for twenty or twenty-five minutes.
2. Lay upon a hot dish and dust with pepper and salt and powdered sage.
3. Sprinkle with onion-juice and with lemon-juice, and drop bits of butter here and there.
4. Cover closely over hot water for ten minutes before sending to table.

title: Pot Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 2 heaping teaspoons baking powder
- butter size of small egg
- a little salt
- sweet milk

## Directions

1. mix flour, baking powder and salt together
2. rub in butter as for pie crust
3. wet with sweet milk as thick as can be stirred
4. drop in pot in small spoonfuls

title: Pot Pie Dumpling
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sweet milk
- 1 egg
- 1/2 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cream tartar
- flour

## Directions

1. stir in enough flour to make stiff enough to drop from a fork
2. Drop in with meat and gravy, boiling hot
3. let boil slowly 20 minutes

title: Pot Pie Dumpling 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 1 egg
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 3 teaspoons butter
- a little salt
- milk or water

## Directions

1. moisten with milk or water
2. Boil briskly for 20 minutes without moving lid

title: Pot Roast
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds stew beef
- small piece of suet
- water
- 3 medium carrots
- large onion
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Put beef and suet in pot and brown
2. Cover with water and let come to a boil
3. Keep at a slow simmer for four hours
4. While stewing, add 3 medium carrots (put through the chopper) and a large onion
5. Add pepper and salt to flavor
6. Let stew down until there is just enough liquid for gravy

title: Pot Roast (Brisket)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 pound brisket
- 1/2 cup water
- brown flour

## Directions

1. Put brisket in a pot with 1/2 cup water
2. Cover close and cook 4 hours gently
3. Brown it in its own fat
4. Thicken gravy with brown flour
5. Season to suit

title: Pot Roast (Fourth Method)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat
- 2 cups water
- salt
- 1 cup hot water
- 3 onions
- 2 teaspoons flour
- water

## Directions

1. Put meat in pot and add 2 cups water
2. Shake generously with salt
3. Cover tightly and let boil dry
4. Just scorch, not burn
5. Add 1 cup hot water and let boil dry
6. Repeat the same process for 1 hour
7. Add 3 onions cut fine
8. Repeat the same process for another hour
9. Take out meat
10. Mix 2 teaspoons flour in a little water
11. Pour in liquid in pot and add water to make sufficient for gravy

title: Pot Roast (Rib-Roast)
body:
## Ingredients

- rib-roast
- cold water

## Directions

1. Remove the bones from rib-roast and roll up neatly
2. Place in a kettle of cold water on the back of the stove
3. Let simmer slowly for five or six hours
4. When the liquid is boiled down, make gravy from it
5. Put your roast in the oven to cook 1 hour

title: Pot Roast (Second Method)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat
- flour
- dripping
- water

## Directions

1. Rub meat well with flour
2. Have pot hot with a little dripping in it
3. Put in meat and let brown nicely
4. Keep turning till browned all around
5. Put in a little water
6. Cook slowly till tender
7. Take out and make nice brown gravy

title: Pot-Pie Without Meat
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 large potatoes
- 2 quarts water
- salt
- pepper
- 1 tablespoon butter
- good biscuit dough

## Directions

1. Peel and cut potatoes in thick slices
2. Put in 2 quarts water and boil until done
3. Add salt and pepper and 1 tablespoon butter
4. Make good biscuit dough, drop in and let boil 10 minutes without cover

title: Pot-Pourri
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Orris root, four ounces
- Oil of cloves or bruised cloves, three ounces
- Gum benzoin, two ounces
- Calamus root, four ounces
- Angelica root, six ounces
- Oil of cinnamon (true), ten drops
- Oil of bitter almonds, forty drops
- Essence of bergamot, one drachm
- English oil of lavender, forty drops
- Oil of verbena, thirty drops
- Fresh rose-leaves to nearly fill the jar
- Salt

## Directions

1. Gather fresh rose-leaves to nearly fill the jar
2. Sprinkle some salt through them and leave to stand for a few days
3. Pour over them the mixture of oils, roots, and essences
4. It will perfume the air for years

title: Potato Apples
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups hot riced potatoes
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 3/4 cup grated cheese
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons thick cream
- 2 yolks of eggs
- cayenne pepper
- nutmeg
- flour
- egg crumbs
- deep fat for frying
- clove

## Directions

1. Mix in the order given: potatoes, butter, cheese, salt, cream, egg yolks, cayenne pepper and nutmeg
2. Shape in the form of small apples
3. Roll in flour and egg crumbs
4. Fry in deep fat
5. Drain and insert clove at stem and blossom end

title: Potato Balls
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- salt water
- 2 cups potato balls
- 1 cup white sauce
- parsley

## Directions

1. Wash, pare, soak potatoes
2. Cut with French cutter
3. Cook in boiling salt water until tender
4. Drain
5. Add 1 cup white sauce to 2 cups potato balls
6. May be sprinkled with parsley

title: Potato Biscuits
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 tumblers flour
- 2.5 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 tumblers mashed potatoes
- little salt
- butter or lard
- milk

## Directions

1. Mix flour, 2.5 teaspoons baking powder, 2 tumblers mashed potatoes, little salt, butter or lard same as for biscuits
2. Mix with milk
3. Bake in hot oven
4. Eat warm

title: Potato Cakes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 doz potatoes
- a little salt
- 2 cups milk
- 0.25 cup butter (melted)
- 1 cup yeast or 0.5 cake Fleischmann's
- flour to make stiff enough to roll

## Directions

1. Boil and mash potatoes
2. Add milk, salt, melted butter
3. When cool enough add yeast (home made, or one-half cake Fleischmann's)
4. Add flour to make stiff enough to roll out and cut in squares
5. If wanted for tea make up in the morning and leave to rise
6. Bake about like biscuits

title: Potato Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups finely mashed potatoes
- 1 cup cold meat
- 1 small onion
- 1 beaten egg
- salt
- pepper
- powdered sage
- flour
- butter, roast or sausage dripping

## Directions

1. Put 3 cups of finely mashed potatoes into a mixing bowl
2. Add 1 cup of cold meat previously run through the mincer
3. Add 1 small onion cut fine
4. Add one beaten egg
5. Add salt, pepper and powdered sage to taste
6. Mix all thoroughly
7. Form with the hands well floured into small, round cakes about the size of a cake cutter, and about 1 inch thick
8. Fry to a delicate brown on either side in butter, roast or sausage dripping

title: Potato Caramel Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 2 cups granulated sugar
- 4 yolks eggs
- 1/4 cup sweet milk
- 1 cup hot mashed potatoes
- 1/4 cup grated chocolate
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon
- 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1/8 teaspoon cloves
- 4 beaten whites
- 1 cup walnuts

## Directions

1. Beat butter, sugar, and egg yolks to a cream
2. Add sweet milk and hot mashed potatoes
3. Add grated chocolate
4. Add flour and baking powder
5. Add ground cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves
6. Fold in 4 beaten whites
7. Add walnuts
8. Bake slowly

title: Potato Cones
body:
## Ingredients

- cold mashed potatoes
- pepper
- salt
- onion
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 tablespoons milk

## Directions

1. Take cold mashed potatoes
2. Season with pepper, salt and onion chopped fine
3. Beat in 1 tablespoon butter and 2 tablespoons milk
4. Shape carefully into cones
5. Brown fifteen minutes in the oven

title: Potato Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups mashed potatoes
- 1 cup chopped meat
- 1 even tablespoon chopped onions
- 1 even tablespoon chopped parsley
- salt
- flour
- beaten egg
- biscuit crumbs

## Directions

1. Take 2 cups of mashed potatoes (left from dinner) and 1 cup chopped meat (any kind you have left over)
2. Add 1 even tablespoon each chopped onions and parsley and a little salt
3. Mix all together and with the hands mould into oblongs the size of a finger
4. Dust with flour
5. Roll in beaten egg and then in biscuit crumbs
6. Fry, turning frequently, so they will be round when finished
7. Fry a golden brown and serve hot

title: Potato Croquettes 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups hot potatoes
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3/4 teaspoon pepper
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 egg
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Mash 3 cups hot potatoes
2. Mix with 1 tablespoon butter, 3/4 teaspoon pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon salt
3. When slightly cool, add beaten yolk of egg
4. Mould or shape in balls
5. Dip in beaten white of egg and roll in crumbs
6. Fry until a light brown

title: Potato Dumplings
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups finely mashed potatoes
- 1 egg
- 1 cup flour
- 1 cup chopped ham
- salted water
- lard

## Directions

1. Mould 3 cups finely mashed potatoes, 1 egg, 1 cup flour, and 1 cup chopped ham into round balls
2. Boil for 1 hour in salted water
3. Let them cool and cut in thin slices
4. Fry in lard

title: Potato Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup mashed potato
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup milk
- salt
- pepper
- 1 tablespoon butter or good dripping

## Directions

1. Add 3/4 cup milk and seasoning to 1 cup mashed potato
2. Beat in the well-beaten eggs
3. Melt a tablespoon of butter or good dripping in a frying pan
4. When quite hot, turn in the mixture and cook until nicely browned on the bottom
5. Set the pan in a moderately hot oven and cook until puffed and set on top
6. Fold and serve on a hot platter

title: Potato Omelet 2
body:
## Ingredients

- mashed potato
- butter

## Directions

1. Turn mashed potato into hot buttered pan
2. Spread evenly
3. Cook slowly until browned underneath
4. Fold

title: Potato Patties
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups cold mashed potatoes
- 1 cup cold meat
- 1 egg
- salt
- pepper
- sage
- grease

## Directions

1. Take 3 cups cold mashed potatoes and cold meat of any kind
2. Grind 1 cup of the meat and mix with potatoes
3. Beat 1 egg and add with salt, pepper and sage to season
4. Make into little round patties and fry in a little grease

title: Potato Patts
body:
## Ingredients

- mashed potatoes
- pepper
- salt
- milk
- flour
- dripping

## Directions

1. Take mashed potatoes and sprinkle with pepper and salt
2. Add sufficient milk to make a little soft
3. Add flour so as to be able to roll on bakeboard
4. Cut with cake cutter and fry with dripping

title: Potato Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup grated potatoes
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup boiling water
- 1 lemon
- butter size of an egg
- pie crust

## Directions

1. Boil 1 cup grated potatoes, 1 cup sugar, 1 cup boiling water, 1 lemon (juice and rind grated), and butter size of an egg together until thick
2. Put into the pie crust and cover just as any other pie would be covered

title: Potato Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup grated potatoes
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup boiling water
- 1 lemon (juice and rind grated)
- butter size of an egg
- pie crust

## Directions

1. Boil all together until thick
2. Put into the pie crust and cover just as any other pie would be covered

title: Potato Pie 2
body:
## Ingredients

- mashed potato
- cold minced meat
- pepper
- salt
- flour
- water
- butter

## Directions

1. Take a deep pie and cover the bottom with mashed potato
2. Layer with cold minced meat, with pepper and salt to taste
3. Sprinkle with flour and moisten with a little water
4. Repeat till dish is full, the last layer being potatoes with small pieces of butter placed on top
5. Bake till a light brown

title: Potato Pie 2
body:
## Ingredients

- mashed potato
- cold minced meat
- pepper and salt to taste
- flour
- water
- butter

## Directions

1. Take a deep pie and cover the bottom with mashed potato
2. Add a layer of cold minced meat, with pepper and salt to taste
3. Sprinkle with flour and moisten with a little water
4. Repeat till dish is full, the last layer being potatoes with small pieces of butter placed on top
5. Bake till a light brown

title: Potato Pie 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 large bowl left-over potatoes (cut in slices)
- 3½ quantity of lean pork left from a fresh roast or boiled ham (chopped in small pieces)
- salt and pepper
- enough rich sweet milk to make a soft mixture
- a rich crust made similar to short cake, only richer

## Directions

1. Cook the potatoes and meat on the top of the stove, stirring frequently to prevent burning
2. When done, add a rich crust made similar to short cake, only richer
3. Bake in the oven until brown

title: Potato Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- raw potatoes to make 2 quarts (peeled and chopped)
- fresh suet to make 2½ cups (chopped)
- salt
- flour as much as will stick them together

## Directions

1. Salt the potatoes and suet and mix all together with as much flour as will stick them together
2. Put in a pudding bag and boil for 2 hours

title: Potato Puff
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups mashed potatoes
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 2 eggs well beaten
- 1 cup of milk
- salt to taste

## Directions

1. Add 2 tablespoons melted butter to 2 cups mashed potatoes and beat until light
2. Mix in 2 eggs well beaten, a cup of milk and salt to taste
3. Beat together thoroughly
4. Bake in a buttered pudding dish in a quick oven until nicely browned

title: Potato Puff 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups of finely mashed potatoes
- 2 eggs well beaten
- 2 tablespoons butter
- salt
- 2 cups milk

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients
2. Bake in hot oven

title: Potato Puff 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups of mashed potatoes cold
- 3 tablespoons melted butter
- 2 eggs well beaten
- 1 cup sweet milk or cream

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients
2. Pour in deep dish and bake in quick oven

title: Potato Puree
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound potatoes, pared and sliced
- 1 Bermuda onion
- 2 leaves celery
- 1½ pints stock
- 1 gill single cream
- 1 ounce butter
- ½ teaspoon salt
- ½ teaspoon pepper

## Directions

1. Put potato, celery, onion and butter in saucepan over fire, stir for five minutes
2. Add 1 pint stock and boil until potatoes are done
3. Pass through sieve, adding the pint of stock, hot, to prevent clogging sieve
4. Return to saucepan, add cream, pepper and salt, and stir until it boils
5. Serve at once

title: Potato Puree
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound potatoes
- 1 Bermuda onion
- 2 leaves celery
- 1½ pints stock
- 1 gill single cream
- 1 ounce butter
- ½ teaspoon salt
- ½ teaspoon pepper

## Directions

1. Put potato, celery, onion and butter in saucepan over fire, stir for five minutes
2. Add 1 pint stock and boil until potatoes are done, pass through sieve, adding the pint of stock, hot, to prevent clogging sieve
3. Return to saucepan, add cream, pepper and salt, and stir until it boils
4. Serve at once

title: Potato Relish
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups chopped cold boiled potatoes
- salt and pepper
- 4 tablespoons sweet cream
- ¾ cup chopped pickled beets
- 1 hard-boiled egg chopped

## Directions

1. Season potatoes with salt and pepper
2. Mix all together
3. Garnish with slices of hard-boiled eggs

title: Potato Rissoles
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- stiff mashed potatoes
- two teaspoonfuls of breadcrumbs
- a chopped tomato
- parsley or herb seasoning
- beaten egg

## Directions

1. Make a stuffing with two teaspoonfuls of breadcrumbs, a chopped tomato, a little parsley or herb seasoning, and moisten with beaten egg.
2. Shape two rounds of potato, make a little hollow in one, fill with stuffing and press the other over it.
3. Roll in egg and breadcrumbs and then fry.

title: Potato Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- a salad bowl nearly full of hot mashed potatoes
- butter size of an egg
- milk
- 1 small onion chopped fine
- 1 teaspoon of mustard
- vinegar to taste
- salt and pepper
- 2 hard-boiled eggs chopped

## Directions

1. Add butter to mashed potatoes
2. Add milk to make it mix smoothly
3. Add 1 small onion chopped fine, 1 teaspoon of mustard, vinegar enough to taste
4. Season with salt and pepper
5. Add 2 hard-boiled eggs chopped

title: Potato Salad
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One pint sifted hot potatoes
- butter size of an egg
- one-quarter teaspoon mustard
- one-half teaspoon salt
- shake of pepper
- one egg lightly beaten
- vinegar or lemon-juice

## Directions

1. Cream butter, mustard, salt, and pepper together
2. Add lightly beaten egg
3. Mix in sifted hot potatoes
4. Add a little vinegar or lemon-juice

title: Potato Salad
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- five or six potatoes
- fresh onion or cucumber
- one cup vinegar
- two tablespoonfuls sugar
- two eggs
- one teaspoonful dry mustard
- pepper and salt
- cream

## Directions

1. Cut up potatoes in small pieces
2. If you have fresh onion or cucumber mix a few pieces up with them, cut very finely
3. For the dressing take one cup vinegar, two tablespoonfuls sugar, two eggs, one teaspoonful dry mustard, a little pepper and salt
4. Put on the stove and stir all the time till thick
5. If too thick add a little cream when cold
6. Pour over the potatoes an hour or two before using

title: Potato Salad 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup vinegar
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon flour
- 1 teaspoon mustard
- ½ cup sugar
- ½ teaspoon each of salt and pepper
- 4 onions chopped
- enough cold cooked potatoes fine to make about 2 quarts
- 3 eggs boiled and sliced

## Directions

1. Put vinegar, 2 eggs, flour, mustard, sugar, salt and pepper all together on the stove and cook until it boils
2. Chop 4 onions and enough cold cooked potatoes fine to make about 2 quarts
3. Cool the dressing and pour over the potatoes
4. Boil 3 eggs and slice and lay over top of salad

title: Potato Salad 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour cream
- ¾ teaspoon mustard
- small teaspoon sugar
- 1 egg beaten
- 1 tablespoon vinegar
- cold potatoes and onions sliced thin
- a little salt

## Directions

1. Bring 1 cup sour cream to boiling point
2. Add ¾ teaspoon mustard, small teaspoon sugar, 1 egg beaten
3. Remove from range and add 1 tablespoon vinegar
4. Pour over cold potatoes and onions sliced thin, with a little salt

title: Potato Salad 4
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup chopped potatoes
- 1 cup shredded cabbage
- 1 very small onion chopped fine
- 1 bunch celery cut small
- 2 tablespoons vinegar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- pepper to taste
- 2 large tablespoons sour cream

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients
2. Garnish either with small cabbage leaves or celery tops

title: Potato Salad 5
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 medium-sized potatoes cooked
- 2 hard-boiled eggs
- 2 onions
- 1 cucumber peeled and seeded
- 3 stalks of celery

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes
2. Cut all ingredients fine and combine

title: Potato Salad 6
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- green cucumbers sliced
- onions
- salad dressing

## Directions

1. Boil potatoes with jackets on, let cool
2. Peel and slice 2 layers in bottom of dish
3. Add a layer of green cucumbers (sliced), and layer of onions
4. Pour on salad dressing and repeat until dish is full
5. Can be made night before if required

title: Potato Salad 7
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup vinegar
- 1 beaten egg
- 1 tablespoon ginger
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch
- 1 tablespoon mustard
- 1 onion
- pepper
- salt
- 1 cucumber minced
- 1 tablespoon cream

## Directions

1. Put 1 cup vinegar to boil
2. Add 1 beaten egg, 1 tablespoon ginger, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 1 tablespoon mustard, 1 onion, pepper, salt, 1 cucumber minced
3. Let boil
4. When cold, add 1 tablespoon cream

title: Potato Scallop
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes peeled and sliced very thin
- onions thin sliced
- bread crumbs
- pepper
- salt
- sweet milk

## Directions

1. Grease a deep pudding dish and place in the bottom a layer of potatoes, peeled, and sliced very thin
2. Add a layer of thin sliced onions, then a layer of bread crumbs
3. Sprinkle some pepper over this and a little pinch of salt
4. Repeat with layer of potatoes until dish is full, having the potatoes on top
5. Cover with sweet milk and bake in a hot oven for an hour, or until the potatoes can be pierced with a fork

title: Potato Scallop
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- onions
- bread crumbs
- pepper
- salt
- sweet milk

## Directions

1. Grease a deep pudding dish
2. Place in the bottom a layer of potatoes, peeled, and sliced very thin
3. Next, a layer of thin sliced onions
4. Then a layer of bread crumbs
5. Sprinkle some pepper over this and a little pinch of salt
6. Next, layer of potatoes, and repeat until dish is full, having the potatoes on top
7. Cover with sweet milk
8. Bake in a hot oven for an hour, or until the potatoes can be pierced with a fork

title: Potato Scallop (Version 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- butter
- rolled biscuit
- salt
- pepper
- milk
- egg

## Directions

1. Peel and slice thin raw potatoes
2. Butter a dish
3. Put in a layer of potatoes, a layer of rolled biscuit
4. Season with salt, pepper and butter
5. Continue in this way until the dish is filled
6. Just before putting in the oven cover with milk to which has been added a beaten egg
7. Bake slowly 1 hour

title: Potato Scallop (Version 3)
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet milk
- butter
- pepper
- salt
- flour
- potatoes
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Put 1 pint of sweet milk to heat
2. Add a small piece of butter, a little pepper and salt
3. Moisten 3 teaspoons flour in a little milk and add
4. Keep well stirred
5. Have 3 or 4 potatoes peeled, slice them in and cover with bread crumbs
6. Bake until brown (about 1½ hours)

title: Potato Scallop (Version 4)
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked potatoes
- cream sauce
- parsley
- bread crusts
- butter
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Cut cooked potatoes in square or thin slices
2. Put into dish a layer of cream sauce, then potatoes, alternately, ending with a layer of sauce
3. Sprinkle over top a little chipped parsley, then cup buttered crumbs
4. Dry and roll crusts till fine
5. For 1 cup crumbs use 2 tablespoons butter, teaspoon salt and a little pepper
6. Bake about 30 or 40 minutes

title: Potato Scones
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Half a dozen large boiled potatoes
- A little flour
- Salt

## Directions

1. Mash potatoes carefully and salt
2. Knead potato with a little flour
3. Form into scones an inch thick
4. Bake in moderate oven and prick to prevent blistering
5. Split and butter plentifully, and serve at once, piping hot

title: Potato Souffle
body:
## Ingredients

- cold mashed potatoes
- butter
- eggs
- sweet cream or milk

## Directions

1. Take 2 cups cold mashed potatoes
2. Stir in 2 tablespoons melted butter
3. Beat to a fluffy cream
4. Add 2 well-beaten eggs, 1 cup sweet cream or milk
5. Beat all well together
6. Pour into deep pudding dish
7. Bake in a quick oven till nicely browned

title: Potato Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 carrot
- 1 onion
- 2 large potatoes
- Pepper and salt
- A good sized piece of butter
- 1 quart of milk

## Directions

1. Chop carrot, onion and potatoes fine
2. Boil, and put through a colander
3. Add pepper and salt to taste
4. Add a good sized piece of butter, and one quart of milk
5. Let come to a boil and serve

title: Potato Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of milk
- 2 stalks of celery
- 1 small onion
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 cup of mashed potatoes
- A piece of butter the size of an egg
- Salt and pepper
- A little cornstarch

## Directions

1. To one quart of milk add two stalks of celery, one small onion and one bay leaf
2. Put in a double saucepan and let come to the boil
3. Strain, add a cup of mashed potatoes and a piece of butter the size of an egg
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste
5. Thicken with a little cornstarch and serve very hot

title: Potato Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 potatoes
- 1 cup of cream
- 1 egg
- 1 pint of flour
- chopped parsley
- butter
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Pare and slice potatoes
2. Boil them until they can be rubbed through a colander
3. Add cream
4. Rub egg into flour and sprinkle it into the boiling soup
5. Flavor with chopped parsley
6. Add butter, salt and pepper to taste

title: Potato Soup (Version 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 carrot
- 1 onion
- 2 large potatoes
- pepper
- salt
- butter
- 1 quart of milk

## Directions

1. Chop carrot, onion, and potatoes fine
2. Boil and put through a colander
3. Add pepper and salt to taste
4. Add a good-sized piece of butter and milk
5. Let come to a boil and serve

title: Potato Soup (Version 3)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 good-sized potatoes
- pepper
- salt
- butter
- flour
- milk
- onion

## Directions

1. Peel and slice potatoes
2. Put on to cook
3. When done season with pepper, salt and butter
4. Make a thickening of flour and milk
5. Pour on potatoes and boil for a few minutes
6. A little onion may be added if desired

title: Potato Soup (Version 4)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 potatoes
- 4 cups milk
- 1 onion
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 teaspoon pepper
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 2 stalks celery

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes in salted water with the onion
2. When done, mash smooth
3. Scald the milk with the celery
4. Remove the celery
5. Add the butter and flour, creamed together
6. Add the prepared potatoes to the milk
7. Season with salt and pepper
8. Let come to a boil and serve at once

title: Potato Stuffing For Roast Goose
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Eight good-sized potatoes
- salt and pepper to taste
- four onions

## Directions

1. Boil and mash potatoes, salt and pepper to taste.
2. Chop four onions very finely and mix with hot potato.
3. Stuff body of goose as full as possible.

title: Potato Volcano
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- milk
- white pepper
- salt
- butter
- egg yolks
- grated cheese
- cracker crumbs

## Directions

1. Pare and boil sufficient quantity of potatoes till tender
2. Drain and mash and add a little milk, white pepper and salt to suit the taste
3. Beat till smooth
4. Pile on plate or dish and mould the shape of volcano
5. Make a little hollow in top of mound for crater and fill with yolks of two eggs, 4 tablespoons grated cheese and 1/2 cup butter
6. Spread a little butter over the mound and sprinkle with cracker crumbs
7. Brown in a hot oven
8. Serve hot

title: Potato Volcano (Version 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- onions
- pepper
- salt
- butter
- water

## Directions

1. Peel and slice in medium slices as many potatoes as required
2. Add a few onions, peeled and cut up
3. Add pepper and salt and a few bits of butter
4. Put all in a dish, fill up with water and either bake in the oven or set on top of the stove and cover closely

title: Potatoes and Bacon
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- milk
- bacon
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Cream potatoes in the usual way by cutting in cubes and warming in milk sauce
2. When they have simmered about five minutes, add some bacon which has been cut in tiny cubes and fried until nearly brown
3. Bacon should be well drained before it is put with the potatoes
4. Let bake a few minutes and serve
5. Alternatively, place a layer of potatoes, then a layer of grated cheese, and so on until a medium-sized basin is filled
6. Always have a layer of the grated cheese on top
7. Bake in the same way as the former

title: Potatoes and Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- cold boiled potatoes
- butter
- pepper
- salt
- rich milk or cream

## Directions

1. Mince cold boiled potatoes fine
2. Put them into a spider with some melted butter
3. Cover them and let them fry a little
4. Put in another piece of butter, and pepper and salt
5. Pour over them some rich milk or cream
6. Boil up once and serve

title: Potatoes au Gratin
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- cold boiled potatoes
- crumbs
- cheese

## Directions

1. Put in buttered dish with crumbs and cold boiled potatoes cut in cubes
2. Bake
3. Cheese may be added

title: Potatoes Baked In The Half Shell
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 medium-sized potatoes
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons hot milk
- salt
- pepper
- 2 eggs
- grated cheese or finely chopped ham

## Directions

1. Bake 6 medium-sized potatoes
2. Remove from oven and cut slice from top of each
3. Scoop out inside
4. Mash and add 2 tablespoons butter, 3 tablespoons hot milk, salt and pepper to taste
5. Add whites of 2 eggs well beaten
6. Refill skins and brown in a hot oven
7. Grated cheese may be sprinkled over the top or finely chopped ham may be added to the potato mixture

title: Potatoes en Surprise
body:
## Ingredients

- hot sliced potatoes
- butter
- salt
- cream
- cayenne pepper
- egg yolks
- creamed peas

## Directions

1. Mix 2 cups hot sliced potatoes, 2 tablespoons butter, 3/8 teaspoon salt, 2 tablespoons cream, a little cayenne pepper, yolks of 2 eggs together
2. Shape in small nests
3. Fill with creamed peas
4. Cover and roll into croquette shapes
5. Dip in egg and crumbs
6. Fry in deep fat
7. Drain

title: Potatoes for Supper
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- water
- onions
- salt
- pepper
- butter

## Directions

1. Pare potatoes, put on to cook with barely enough water to cover
2. Cut up one large or 2 small onions, put in pot with potatoes
3. Let cook until water is all cooked up and potatoes and onions are soft
4. Add salt and pepper to taste, 1 tablespoon butter
5. Beat thoroughly

title: Potatoes Fried with Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- cold boiled potatoes
- butter
- 1 or 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Slice cold boiled potatoes and fry in butter till nicely brown
2. In meantime beat 1 or 2 eggs and stir into the potatoes nicely
3. Take up at once so as not to harden the egg, but merely to cook slightly

title: Potatoes with Chicken
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups hot mashed potatoes
- butter, size of an egg
- 1.5 cups hot milk
- beaten yolks of 2 eggs
- salt
- pepper
- minced celery
- beaten whites of 2 eggs
- stewed chicken

## Directions

1. Use 2 cups hot mashed potatoes, butter size of an egg, 1.5 cups hot milk, beaten yolks of 2 eggs, salt and pepper to season, and a little minced celery
2. Beat till all are thoroughly mixed
3. Fold in the beaten whites of eggs
4. Pour in a border mould
5. Bake in a hot oven
6. Turn out on a hot dish, and fill centre with stewed chicken

title: Poultry Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups bread crumbs
- 1/2 cup raisins
- 1 large sour apple
- sugar to sweeten
- milk to moisten
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Chop raisins and apples fine
2. Combine with bread crumbs
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste
4. Sweeten with sugar and moisten with milk

title: Pound Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound sugar
- 3/4 pound butter well beaten
- whites and yolks of 8 eggs beaten separately to a stiff froth
- 1 pound flour
- 1 heaping teaspoon baking powder
- nutmeg or mace
- 4 ounces finely sliced citron
- 4 ounces almonds blanched

## Directions

1. Beat butter well
2. Cream butter and sugar together
3. Beat whites and yolks of 8 eggs separately to a stiff froth
4. Mix flour dry with baking powder
5. Combine all ingredients
6. Add nutmeg or mace for flavor
7. Stir in citron and almonds before baking

title: Powders For Children
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- five grains of oil of anise-seed
- two grains of peppermint
- half an ounce of lump sugar
- a drachm of magnesia

## Directions

1. Drop five grains of oil of anise-seed and two of peppermint on half an ounce of lump sugar
2. Rub it in a mortar, with a drachm of magnesia, into a fine powder
3. A small quantity of this may be given in a little water at any time

title: Prairie Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1/2 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup melted butter
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 2 tablespoons soda in 1 cup boiling water
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- yolks of 4 eggs well beaten
- 10 tablespoons boiling water
- 2 cups sugar
- whites of 4 eggs beaten
- 1 cup raisins

## Directions

1. Mix molasses, brown sugar, and melted butter together
2. Add cloves and cinnamon
3. Dissolve soda in 1 cup boiling water and add to mixture
4. Add flour
5. Add yolks of 4 eggs well beaten last
6. Bake in layers
7. For filling, boil 10 tablespoons boiling water and 2 cups sugar until it thickens
8. Pour over the beaten whites of 4 eggs and 1 cup raisins
9. Mix and spread over layers and on top

title: Prairie Chickens, Partridges and Quails
body:
## Ingredients

- soda
- water
- dressing
- butter
- parsley
- currant jelly

## Directions

1. Clean nicely, using a little soda in the water in which they are washed
2. Rinse and dry
3. Fill with dressing, sewing up nicely, binding down the legs and wings with cords
4. Put in a steamer over hot water, and let them cook until just done
5. Then place in a pan with a little butter until of a nice brown
6. They ought to brown nicely in about 5 minutes
7. Serve on a platter with sprigs of parsley alternating with currant jelly

title: Premium Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups sugar
- 1 1/2 cups butter
- 6 eggs
- 1 1/2 cups sour cream
- 2 teaspoons saleratus or soda
- 1 pound currants
- 1 1/2 pounds raisins
- 3/4 pound citron peel
- 1 nutmeg
- flour to make stiff

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs thoroughly, then add sugar and butter
2. Beat till smooth
3. Dissolve the soda in a little warm water, put in the cream
4. Make the cake quite thick with flour
5. Cut the raisins in halves and remove seeds
6. When put in pan one layer of cake and one of citron peel

title: Preserve Dumplings
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- preserved peaches, plums, quinces, cherries or any other sweetmeat
- light crust

## Directions

1. Make a light crust, and roll a small piece of moderate thickness and fill with the fruit in quantity to make the size of a peach dumpling
2. Tie each one in a dumpling cloth, well floured inside
3. Drop them into hot water, and boil for half an hour
4. When done, remove the cloth, send to table hot, and eat with cream

title: Preserve Strawberries or Raspberries Without Cooking
body:
## Ingredients

- berries
- 3/4 pound sugar to 1 pound berries

## Directions

1. After the berries are picked over put them in a stone jar, or granite kettle
2. Mash with a potato masher
3. Add 3/4 pound sugar to 1 pound berries
4. Stir well until sugar has dissolved
5. Let stand over night and put into sealers in the morning

title: Preserved Cherries
body:
## Ingredients

- fruit
- sugar (0.75 pound for every pound of fruit)
- water (1 pint to 1.5 pounds)
- brandied paper

## Directions

1. Stone the fruit and weigh it
2. Dissolve sugar in water, a pint to the pound and a half
3. Add fruit and let it boil as fast as possible for 0.5 hour, till it begins to jelly
4. As soon as it begins to thicken, put in pots or earthen jars and cover with brandied paper
5. Next the fruit and then cover closely from the air

title: Preserved Orange Peel
body:
## Ingredients

- Oranges
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Peel the oranges and cut rinds into narrow shreds
2. Boil till tender, change the water 3 times
3. Squeeze the juice of orange over sugar
4. Put pound to pound of sugar, and peel
5. Boil all together 20 minutes

title: Preserved Oysters
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters
- salt
- water
- whole peppers
- mace
- cloves
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Put oysters in salt and water to cover them
2. Let them come to a boil, then skim them into cold water
3. Scald whole peppers, mace and cloves in a little vinegar, the quantity of these to be determined by the number of oysters
4. When oysters are cold put into a stone jar with layers of spice between them
5. Cover with liquor in which they are cooked
6. Season to taste

title: Pressed Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cold roast beef
- 1 hard-boiled egg
- 1 teaspoon mustard
- salt
- pepper
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Put through food chopper 1 cup cold roast beef and 1 hard-boiled egg
2. Add 1 teaspoon mustard and season with salt and pepper to taste
3. Moisten the whole with vinegar and press

title: Pressed Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cold roast beef
- 1 hard-boiled egg
- 1 teaspoon mustard
- salt and pepper to taste
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Put through food chopper 1 cup cold roast beef and 1 hard-boiled egg
2. Add 1 teaspoon mustard and season with salt and pepper to taste
3. Moisten the whole with vinegar and press

title: Pressed Chicken
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- hot water

## Directions

1. Boil a chicken until tender
2. Take out all the bones and chop the meat very fine
3. Season with salt, pepper and plenty of butter
4. Add to the liquid the chicken was boiled in, 1 cup bread crumbs made soft with hot water, and to this the chopped chicken
5. When heated, take out and press into a basin
6. Serve cold

title: Pressed Chicken 2
body:
## Ingredients

- young fowl
- boiling water
- carrot
- onion
- celery
- salt
- pepper
- buttered paper

## Directions

1. Cover a young fowl, cut in joints, with boiling water
2. Let simmer until tender, with a few slices of carrot, 1/4 an onion and a stalk of celery
3. Remove skin and bones and return with broth to fire and let simmer until reduced to 1 cup
4. Strain broth and set aside
5. When the flesh is nearly cold, chop fine, remove fat from broth, reheat
6. Stir the chicken into it, adding salt and pepper
7. Pack in pot, cover with buttered paper, weight it down
8. Let stand until set, slice thin and serve with salad

title: Pressed Head
body:
## Ingredients

- pig's head
- salt
- upper parts of shanks
- pepper
- cinnamon
- cloves

## Directions

1. Soak the pig's head in cold water with a little salt in it over night
2. When it has soaked enough, add the upper parts of the shanks
3. Boil until the meat will drop from the bone
4. Chop fine, season with pepper, salt, cinnamon and cloves to taste
5. Put in a mould and press while warm

title: Prince Albert Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs beaten together
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup sour milk mixed with 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup seeded raisins
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 1 grated nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat eggs together
2. Cream butter and brown sugar
3. Mix sour milk with soda
4. Combine all ingredients
5. Add raisins, flour, nutmeg, and cinnamon
6. Bake in 2 jelly tins

title: Prince Albert Cake Icing
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound blanched almonds chopped fine
- 1/2 cup butter slightly warmed
- 8 tablespoons icing sugar
- 1 tablespoon brandy or cold coffee

## Directions

1. Chop blanched almonds fine and put in the oven to dry
2. Mix butter and sugar to paste
3. Add nuts and brandy or cold coffee

title: Prince Charlie Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 1 cup white sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 egg
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup sour cream or sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- spice

## Directions

1. Rub flour, white sugar, and butter together like pie paste and keep out 1 cup
2. To the balance add egg, raisins, sour cream or sour milk, soda, and a little spice
3. Pour the batter in the pan
4. Pour the cupful saved out on the top of batter; latter serves as icing

title: Prince Charlie Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- whites of 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup cornstarch
- 3/4 cup sweet milk
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- yolks of 3 eggs
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 3/4 cup sour cream
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in warm water
- 1 tablespoon molasses
- 1 tablespoon cloves ground
- 1 tablespoon nutmeg
- 1 cup chopped raisins
- 2 cups flour or enough to make a thick batter

## Directions

1. For white part: mix whites of 3 eggs, cornstarch, sweet milk, butter, granulated sugar, flour, and baking powder
2. Bake in 2 layers
3. For dark part: mix yolks of 3 eggs, brown sugar, sour cream, butter, soda dissolved in warm water, molasses, cloves, nutmeg, and raisins
4. Add flour to make a thick batter
5. Bake in 2 layers

title: Prince of Wales Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup sour milk
- 2 cups flour
- 1 cup chopped raisins
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in warm water
- 1 tablespoon molasses
- yolks of 3 eggs
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1 cup flour
- 3/4 cup cornstarch
- 3/4 cup sweet milk
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup white sugar
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup white sugar
- water
- white of 1 egg

## Directions

1. For dark part: mix brown sugar, butter, and sour milk
2. Add flour, raisins, soda dissolved in warm water, molasses, yolks of 3 eggs, cloves, and nutmeg
3. For white part: mix flour, cornstarch, sweet milk, butter, white sugar, and baking powder
4. Bake all in four layers
5. For boiled icing: boil 1 cup white sugar in water enough to dissolve it till it will hair
6. Beat the white of 1 egg to a stiff froth
