6. When the bottom of the dish is covered with the oysters sprinkle over them a little salt and pepper
7. Add a few drops of onion-juice and a tablespoonful of chopped celery
8. Fill the dish in the same order
9. Put over the top one tablespoonful of butter cut into pieces
10. Pour over one-half of a cupful of thin cream
11. Bake about twenty-five minutes in a hot oven

title: Scalloped Salmon
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tin salmon
- 1 pint milk
- butter about size of an egg
- pepper
- salt
- about 6 soda biscuits
- lemon

## Directions

1. Pick all bones out of salmon and flake it up finely with a fork
2. Roll soda biscuits out fine
3. Add all ingredients and heat to boiling point in a double boiler
4. Put it in a baker
5. Sprinkle a few more cracker crumbs over the top
6. Brown in the oven
7. Just before going to the table cut up a lemon in about eight pieces and put over the top, a piece being allowed for each person
8. Each one may then squeeze the juice over their portion as they desire

title: Scalloped Tomatoes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- fine, dry crumbs
- sliced and peeled tomatoes
- pepper
- salt
- sugar
- butter
- onion-juice

## Directions

1. Butter a bake-dish and cover the bottom with fine, dry crumbs.
2. Next put a layer of sliced and peeled tomatoes; season with pepper, salt, sugar, butter, and a few drops of onion-juice.
3. More crumbs and more tomatoes until the dish is full.
4. The top layer should be crumbs, peppered, salted, and buttered.
5. Bake half an hour, covered.
6. Uncover and brown.
7. If canned tomatoes are used, drain off half the juice before you begin the scallop, or it will be too watery.
8. Season the liquor and save for sauces and soups.

title: Scalloped Tomatoes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- can of tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- breadcrumbs
- sugar
- onion juice
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Season a can of tomatoes with one teaspoonful of salt, and one-quarter teaspoonful of pepper.
2. Spread a shallow baking dish with a thin layer of breadcrumbs.
3. Pour in the tomatoes, sprinkle over them a tablespoonful of sugar, and a few drops of onion juice.
4. Cover the top with a cupful of breadcrumbs which have been moistened with a tablespoonful of melted butter.
5. Bake in a hot oven for fifteen minutes.
6. Serve in the same dish.

title: Scalloped Tomatoes with Salt Pork
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- large ripe tomatoes
- 2 slices fat salt pork
- 1 small onion
- breadcrumbs
- sugar
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Peel and slice tomatoes.
2. Chop salt pork and onion.
3. Place a layer of tomatoes in a pudding-dish, pepper and salt lightly, sprinkle with a very little sugar and with the pork and onion.
4. Cover with crumbs and continue using the ingredients in this order until the dish is full.
5. Have the top layer crumbs.
6. Bake, covered, half an hour, then uncover and brown ten minutes.
7. Serve in the dish in which they were baked.

title: Scalloped Turkey
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- cold turkey
- bread crumbs
- milk
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- turkey stuffing
- hot water
- turkey gravy
- eggs
- melted butter
- cracker crumbs

## Directions

1. Pick the meat from the bones of cold turkey, and chop it fine
2. Put a layer of bread crumbs on the bottom of a buttered dish, moisten them with a little milk
3. Put in a layer of turkey with some of the stuffing, and cut small pieces of butter over the top
4. Sprinkle with pepper and salt
5. Add another layer of bread crumbs, and so until the dish is nearly full
6. Add a little hot water to the gravy left from the turkey and pour over it
7. Take two eggs, two tablespoonfuls of milk, one of melted butter, a little salt and cracker crumbs as much as will make it thick enough to spread on with a knife
8. Put bits of butter over it, and cover with a plate
9. Bake three-quarters of an hour
10. Ten minutes before serving, remove the plate and let it brown

title: Scalloped Vegetables
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked vegetable
- cream sauce made with milk substituted for vegetable water
- breadcrumbs
- melted butter
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Make a cream sauce, using the same ingredients as for vegetable sauce, substituting milk for the vegetable water
2. To each cup of cooked vegetable use one cup of cream sauce
3. Place in alternate layers in a baking dish, having the top layer sauce
4. Sprinkle with crumbs that have been mixed with a small quantity of melted butter
5. Sprinkle grated cheese over each layer
6. Brown in the oven

title: Scones
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups sifted flour
- 3 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- ½ teaspoonful salt
- 1 teaspoonful sugar
- 3 teaspoonfuls cold butter
- 1 cup milk

## Directions

1. To sifted flour, add baking-powder, and salt; then sift again.
2. Mix with cold butter (cut in dice), and milk, add the flour to the mixture, handling as little as possible.
3. Cut into three portions, make with a knife a + and bake twenty minutes.
4. On removing from oven rub over with a little butter.

title: Scones
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 cups buttermilk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 4 large cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup currants

## Directions

1. Drop in gem rings on a buttered pan and bake in a quick oven

title: Scones 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup currants
- butter size of an egg
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- sweet milk

## Directions

1. Wet with sweet milk
2. Mix soft and bake in a hot oven

title: Scotch Breads
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds flour
- 1/2 pound brown sugar
- 3/4 pound butter
- 1/2 pound lard
- sugar

## Directions

1. Roll
2. Sprinkle with sugar
3. Cut in squares

title: Scotch Broth
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 qt. stock
- 1/4 cup pearl barley or rice
- 1 medium-sized onion minced
- 1 tablespoonful minced parsley
- 2 tablespoonfuls white roux

## Directions

1. Obtain the stock by boiling down the water in which a leg of mutton was cooked until you have half the original quantity, or by boiling for eight hours the bones left from roast mutton, or the trimmings sent home by the butcher.
2. If raw meat and bones are used, allow one quart of water to each pound.
3. Be careful to skim all the fat from the stock.
4. Wash the barley or rice and soak in cold water one hour.
5. Put the stock over the fire with the onion and bring to a rapid boil.
6. Add the barley (or rice) and simmer for three-quarters of an hour.
7. Put in the parsley and cook five minutes more before stirring in.

title: Scotch Broth
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Two pounds of the scraggy part of a neck of mutton
- One large slice of turnip
- Two slices of carrot
- One onion
- One stalk of celery
- Half a cup of barley
- Three pints of cold water
- One pint of water
- One tablespoonful of flour
- One tablespoonful of butter
- One teaspoonful of chopped parsley
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cut the meat from the bones, and cut off all the fat
2. Cut meat into small pieces and put into soup pot with one large slice of turnip, two of carrot, one onion and a stalk of celery, all cut fine
3. Add half a cup of barley and three pints of cold water
4. Simmer gently two hours
5. On to the bones put one pint of water; simmer two hours and strain on the soup
6. Cook a tablespoonful of flour and one of butter together until perfectly smooth
7. Stir into the soup, and add a teaspoonful of chopped parsley
8. Season with salt and pepper

title: Scotch Broth
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup barley
- 4 quarts cold water
- neck of mutton
- 2 carrots
- 1 large onion
- small head cabbage
- 1 bunch parsley
- 1 sprig celery top
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Bring barley and cold water to the boil and skim
2. Put in a neck of mutton and boil 1 hour
3. Skim well the sides of the pot
4. Chop carrots, onion, cabbage, parsley, and celery top fine
5. Add your chopped vegetables, pepper and salt to taste
6. Cook for two hours total

title: Scotch Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 lb. butter
- 2 oz. sugar
- 0.5 lb. flour
- A pinch of soda

## Directions

1. Put the butter in a large bowl, rubbing a few times with the hand
2. then put the flour, sugar and soda in a sifter, and as these are sifted into the butter mix with the hand, the warmth being sufficient to make all into a dough
3. Have a pan ready with buttered paper, and put the ball of dough on this, pressing to the desired thinness with the hands
4. Prick with fork on top, and bake twenty minutes or so in a moderate oven
5. Cut in squares while in the pan and hot, directly upon being taken out of the oven

title: Scotch Currant Bun
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 pound flour
- 1/2 pound sugar
- 3 pounds blue raisins
- 2 pounds currants
- 3/4 pound orange peel
- 3/4 pound almonds
- 1 ounce ground ginger
- 1/2 ounce cinnamon
- 1/4 ounce Jamaica pepper
- 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
- 1 small teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cream tartar
- 1 small cup sweet milk
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 3/4 pound butter
- 1/2 teaspoon baking powder
- cold water

## Directions

1. Prepare the fruit carefully
2. Mix fruit and all the dry ingredients together carefully
3. Moisten with the milk; only sufficient milk should be used to bind ingredients together
4. Mix butter into flour, add baking powder and enough cold water to make a firm paste
5. Roll out rather thin and cut out a piece for bottom of tin, also one for top
6. Roll out the scraps into a long-shaped piece
7. Have a cake tin well greased, put the paste in the bottom, then line sides and pack in mixture of fruit tightly as possible
8. Press into corners firmly, turn in an edge of paste, wet it and put on top of paste, put on loosely to avoid cracks
9. When mixture begins to cook, brush top with white of eggs, prick over with fork, and bake in moderate oven 4 hours
10. This will keep a year and improves with age

title: Scotch Currant Bun (Glenoechy)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. flour
- 1 lb. sugar
- 2 lbs. currants
- 2 lbs. raisins
- 1 lb. orange peel
- ½ lb. almonds
- 1 large cup of buttermilk
- 2 teaspoonfuls ginger
- 2 teaspoonfuls cinnamon
- 2 teaspoonfuls Jamaica pepper
- 1 teaspoonful soda
- 1 teaspoonful cream tartar
- ½ teaspoonful black pepper
- 1½ lbs. flour for paste
- ½ lb. butter for paste
- ½ teaspoonful baking powder for paste

## Directions

1. Stone raisins, clean currants, blanch almonds
2. Cut up orange-peel fine
3. Put all fruit, flour, sugar, and spices into a big basin; set aside
4. Make paste by rubbing butter into flour with baking powder, making into a stiff dough with water
5. Roll out thin
6. Grease tin, line it with paste; keep piece for top of bun
7. Pour milk into flour and mix also fruit all well together with the hand
8. It must be just moist, not too thin
9. Pour all into the tin and lay on top sheet
10. Dot with fork
11. Bake for three hours in moderate oven

title: Scotch Currant Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 pound butter
- 5 eggs
- 1/4 milk
- 3/4 pound sugar
- 1 pound flour
- 6 ounces currants

## Directions

1. Beat the butter and sugar to a cream
2. Add the eggs 1 by 1
3. Add the flour by spoonfuls
4. Beat in the currants
5. Stir thoroughly and add the milk
6. Line 2 cake tins with buttered paper
7. Pour in the mixture and bake in moderate oven 1 3/4 hours

title: Scotch Haggis
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- bag and pluck of a sheep
- heart, lights and liver
- 1 pound of fresh suet
- 2 handfuls of oatmeal
- few onions
- black pepper
- allspice
- salt

## Directions

1. Procure the bag and pluck of a sheep
2. Clean the bag very carefully
3. Parboil the heart, lights and liver for an hour and a half
4. Let them cool, and then mince very fine
5. Mince also a pound of fresh suet and grate the parboiled liver
6. Mix this along with two handfuls of oatmeal (previously browned in the oven), a few onions, black pepper, allspice and salt to taste
7. Take the bag and wash it first with cold water, then with boiling water
8. When quite clean fill in the mince, but do not let it be more than half full, else the bag will burst
9. Add a little of the liquid in which the meat was parboiled, and sew up the bag
10. Put it in boiling water and prick it frequently with a large needle to let the air escape
11. Boil it for three hours with a plate in the bottom of the pot

title: Scotch Marmalade
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 doz. Seville oranges
- 3 lemons
- 16 lbs. sugar
- 8½ quarts cold water

## Directions

1. Cut fruit into thin slices and take out seeds
2. Put in an earthenware pan and cover with eight and one-half quarts of cold water
3. Let it stand for twenty-four hours
4. Boil quickly for two hours, then add sugar and boil again one and one-half hours
5. The seeds should be soaked for twenty-four hours in one pint of cold water; when ready to put in the sugar pour the liquid off them through a strainer and add to the oranges

title: Scotch Scones
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 sifter flour
- 1 1/2 teaspoons baking soda
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 1/2 cups buttermilk

## Directions

1. Sift the cream tartar 2 or 3 times with flour
2. Mix with knife

title: Scotch Scones 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3/4 cup sweet milk

## Directions

1. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt well together
2. Beat 1 egg and 1 tablespoon butter light, add 3/4 cup sweet milk
3. Stir all together, roll out, cut and put on hot, well-greased griddle
4. Bake 20 minutes, turn

title: Scotch Shortbread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One pound flour
- One-half pound butter
- One-quarter pound sugar, fine granulated

## Directions

1. Put flour on board, add butter and sugar, and knead with the hand until a nice dough is formed.
2. Roll into a round cake any thickness desired and bake in a moderate oven about half an hour, or until it is nicely browned.
3. Cut into shapes while hot.

title: Scotch Shortbread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1 pound flour
- 8 ounces butter
- 4 ounces coffee sugar
- yolk of one egg

## Directions

1. Measure out the ingredients, put the butter and sugar in a basin, beat to a cream
2. Make a hole in the centre of the mixture and add the yolk of the egg
3. Mix flour and baking powder well together and add gradually to the butter and sugar, mixing well
4. Turn out on a floured pastry board and work the mixture into flat, round shapes about as large as saucers
5. Notch the edges or place on a wooden shape or earthenware mould and bake in a slow oven for twenty minutes till a nice brown color

title: Scotch Shortbread 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound butter
- 1/4 pound sugar
- 2 pounds flour

## Directions

1. Beat 1 pound butter to a cream, and add by degrees 1/4 pound sugar and 2 pounds flour
2. Work this dough until smooth, roll out, cut into squares and pinch up edges
3. Prick it well with fork
4. Bake in slow oven

title: Scotch Toffee
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. yellow sugar
- 6 oz. fresh butter
- Cream to make thin batter

## Directions

1. Melt the butter slowly and when fully melted add the sugar
2. Mix thoroughly and stir in sufficient cream to make the whole of the consistency of a thin batter
3. Now place on the stove and stir until the boiling point is reached
4. After this it must not be stirred on any account
5. Boil very slowly until it feels tough, but not brittle, when tested by cooling a little in cold water
6. Now pour into buttered trays and cool slowly, then cut into squares

title: Scotch Woodcock
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1 1/2 tablespoons flour
- 1 cup milk
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- pepper
- 4 hard-boiled eggs
- toast or crackers

## Directions

1. Melt butter and add flour, cook till smooth and thick.
2. Add 1 cup milk, 3/4 teaspoon salt, pepper to suit taste.
3. Add 4 hard-boiled eggs chopped fine.
4. Reheat and serve on toast or crackers.
5. If after eggs are boiled hard they are put in cold water, they will not turn dark.

title: Scotland Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- a scant cup butter
- 3 well-beaten eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 3 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons cream tartar
- lemon or vanilla flavoring

## Directions

1. Beat butter to a froth
2. Dissolve 1 teaspoon soda in the milk
3. Sift 2 teaspoons cream tartar into the flour
4. Mix ingredients together
5. Flavor with lemon or vanilla and bake

title: Scottish Fancies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1/2 tablespoon melted butter
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 3/4 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 1/2 cups rolled oats

## Directions

1. Beat 1 egg till very light and lemon colored using egg beater
2. Add 1 cup granulated sugar, 1/2 tablespoon melted butter, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 3/4 teaspoon vanilla, 1 1/2 cups rolled oats
3. Stir until well mixed together and drop from spoon and shape like macaroons, on a buttered pan
4. Bake in a moderate oven till delicately browned

title: Scrambled Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 2 tablespoons sweet milk
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 3/4 teaspoon pepper
- 2 tablespoons butter

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs, add the other ingredients, and mix thoroughly.
2. Melt the butter in a frying pan.
3. Pour in the mixture, stir constantly till cooked, and serve at once.

title: Scrambled Eggs with Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups cold mashed potatoes
- 4 eggs
- pepper and salt
- butter

## Directions

1. Beat together until light.
2. Cook in hot buttered frying-pan, stirring constantly.
3. Season with pepper and salt before removing from fire.

title: Scripture Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 1/2 cups flour
- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups sugar
- 2 cups figs
- 1 cup almonds
- 2 tablespoons honey
- spices to taste
- 6 tablespoons eggs
- 1 pinch of salt
- 1 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Follow Solomon's prescription for making a good boy and you will have a good cake
2. Bake in a slow oven
3. This cake will keep a year and is better to be made some time before wanted

title: Sea Foam
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 white of egg
- 2.5 cups brown sugar
- 0.75 cup water
- 1 cup chopped walnuts
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Cook sugar and water just past soft ball stage
2. Pour into beaten white
3. Add nuts and vanilla
4. Drop by spoonfuls on to buttered paper

title: Seed Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups sugar (scant)
- 1 cup milk
- 3 cups flour
- 3 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- Whites 6 eggs
- A heaping teaspoonful caraway seeds

## Directions

1. Cream the butter and sugar, add milk, half the stiffly beaten whites and half the flour and baking powder, then the rest of the whites and flour and the seeds.
2. Beat well and bake in two small loaves or one large one.
3. Ice while warm.

title: Shank of Beef Jellied
body:
## Ingredients

- shank of beef
- cold water
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Procure a nice shank of beef chopped into about four pieces
2. Cover well with cold water and boil till tender
3. Boil until there is enough juice to cover the meat when taken from the bones
4. Put loosely in any convenient mould or basin
5. Let stand till cold in some cold place
6. Season to taste

title: Sherbet Pineapple
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 gallon hot water
- juice of 5 lemons
- juice of 4 oranges
- 2 pounds granulated sugar
- whites of 10 eggs well beaten
- 2 cans pineapple grated
- a little gelatine dissolved in hot water

## Directions

1. Dissolve the sugar in the water
2. Add whites of 10 eggs well beaten
3. Add 2 cans pineapple grated
4. Add a little gelatine dissolved in hot water
5. Put the whites of eggs in last
6. Freeze the same as ice cream

title: Sherbet Pineapple
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 gallon hot water
- juice of 5 lemons
- juice of 4 oranges
- 2 pounds granulated sugar
- whites of 10 eggs
- 2 cans pineapple
- gelatine

## Directions

1. Dissolve the sugar in the water
2. Add whites of 10 eggs well beaten
3. Add 2 cans pineapple grated
4. Add a little gelatine dissolved in hot water
5. Put the whites of eggs in last
6. Freeze the same as ice cream

title: Sherry Flip
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt. cream
- 2 doz. almonds
- Juice of 2 lemons
- Sugar to taste
- 3 glasses sherry

## Directions

1. Blanch and chop the almonds and put them into a jug with the cream.
2. In another jug put the sherry, lemon-juice and enough sugar to sweeten the whole nicely.
3. Pour rapidly from one jug to the other till the mixture is well frothed.
4. Then pour it into individual glasses.

title: Short Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound butter
- 1/2 pound lard
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1 cup good cream

## Directions

1. Stir butter, lard, and brown sugar well together
2. Add 1 egg, 1 teaspoon baking powder, 1 cup good cream
3. Roll out 1/2 an inch thick and cut in squares

title: Short Pastry
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound flour
- ½ pound shortening
- Ice-cold water

## Directions

1. If the fingers are cool, rub the shortening into the flour; otherwise, cut it into it with two knives until thoroughly mixed with the flour
2. Mix into a dough with the ice water, using only enough to hold it together
3. Turn out on the floured board, and knead only enough to make the ball smooth
4. Cut into pieces for rolling out to line pie-plates, etc.

title: Shortbread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. butter
- 2 lbs. flour
- 1/2 lb. brown sugar
- Sweet almonds
- Caraway comfits

## Directions

1. Put butter into a basin, squeeze till quite soft, squeeze into it flour and sugar and almonds, chopped fine.
2. Mix all well together, cut into cakes one-half an inch thick.
3. Bake in a slow oven.

title: Shortbread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. butter
- 2 lbs. flour
- 1/4 lb. brown sugar
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat butter to cream and dredge in flour and sugar gradually
2. Must be well beaten
3. Roll out an inch thick
4. Pinch edge all around
5. prick with a fork
6. cut in small pieces

title: Shortbread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 lbs. flour
- 1/2 lb. butter
- 1/4 lb. sugar

## Directions

1. Cream the butter and sugar, beating until light.
2. Add the flour.
3. Mould and roll into cakes about an inch thick.
4. Pinch them neatly round the edges, and prick them on the top with a fork.
5. Bake slowly till a light golden brown.

title: Shortcakes for Everyday Use
body:
## Ingredients

- 9 1/2 pounds flour
- 4 ounces cream tartar
- 2 ounces baking soda
- salt
- lard
- buttermilk or sweet milk

## Directions

1. Sift flour, cream tartar, and baking soda twice together
2. Keep this on hand
3. Then as required, take the amount you wish, add a little salt, also a little lard not much
4. Mix with either buttermilk or sweet milk, buttermilk preferred
5. Roll out about 3/4 or 1 inch thick, cut with cake cutter and bake in very hot oven

title: Shortcakes for Everyday Use
body:
## Ingredients

- 9½ pounds flour
- 4 ounces cream tartar
- 2 ounces baking soda
- salt
- lard

## Directions

1. Sift flour, cream tartar, and baking soda twice together and keep on hand
2. As required, take the amount you wish, add a little salt and a little lard
3. Mix with either buttermilk or sweet milk, buttermilk preferred
4. Roll out about 3½ or ¼ inch thick
5. Cut with cake cutter
6. Bake in very hot oven

title: Shrewsbury Cookies
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One-half pound flour
- One-half pound butter
- One-half pound sugar
- Two eggs
- A teaspoon mace

## Directions

1. Well mix flour, butter and sugar together, add two eggs and a teaspoon mace, roll out thin and cut any size you like; bake in a slow oven.

title: Shrimps
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups shrimps
- 2 cups white sauce
- 2 tablespoons mushrooms
- 1 teaspoon chopped celery
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice
- crackers

## Directions

1. Break shrimps once or twice
2. Make 2 cups white sauce
3. When cooked, add 2 tablespoons mushrooms chopped, 1 teaspoon chopped celery, 1 teaspoon onion juice, 1 teaspoon lemon juice
4. Heat shrimps in sauce
5. Serve on crackers

title: Shrimps With Anchovy Sauce
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can shrimps
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 1 gill cream
- 1 teaspoonful anchovy paste
- Yolks of 2 eggs
- 1/2 saltspoonful cayenne

## Directions

1. Melt together the butter and anchovy, lay in the shrimps, pepper them, and saute until they are hot through
2. Break the eggs in a bowl, beat the cream into them, and pour into the chafing-dish
3. Stir two or three minutes, until the sauce thickens, and serve at once on toast. This dish should be prepared over hot water

title: Shrimps With Tomato Sauce
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One cupful of tomato sauce
- One can of shrimps
- Salt to taste
- one saltspoonful of cayenne

## Directions

1. Stir the shrimps into the tomato sauce, bring to a boil, season, and serve on toast or in scallop-shells, or nappies

title: Simple Recipe for Marmalade
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 bitter oranges
- 1 lemon
- 6 quarts water
- 7 or 8 pounds sugar

## Directions

1. Cut bitter oranges and one lemon very thin
2. Put into water
3. Let stand over night or thirty-six hours
4. Boil rather fast two and one-half hours
5. Add seven or eight pounds of white sugar
6. Boil one hour longer
7. Take out all seeds and hard ends

title: Simple Recipe for Marmalade
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 bitter oranges
- 1 lemon
- 6 qts. water
- 7 or 8 lbs. sugar

## Directions

1. Cut bitter oranges and one lemon very thin, and put into water
2. Let stand over night or thirty-six hours
3. Boil rather fast two and one-half hours
4. Add seven or eight pounds of white sugar and boil one hour longer
5. Take out all seeds and hard ends
6. If sweet oranges are used put in only the pulp
7. The addition of the pulp of two sweet oranges sometimes improves the marmalade

title: Slashed Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- mashed potatoes
- cream
- butter
- salt
- white pepper

## Directions

1. Take 2 quarts mashed potatoes, 1/2 cup cream, 1/2 cup butter
2. Season with salt and white pepper
3. Beat until the consistency of cream
4. Serve

title: Slip
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- prepared rennet
- powdered sugar
- nutmeg
- cream

## Directions

1. Make a quart of milk moderately warm
2. Stir into it one large spoonful of the preparation called rennet
3. Set it by, and when cool again it will be as stiff as jelly
4. In summer set the dish on ice after it has jellied
5. It must be served with powdered sugar, nutmeg and cream

title: Slippery-Elm Bark Tea
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- slippery-elm bark
- boiling water
- sugar
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Break the bark into bits
2. Pour boiling water over it, cover, and let it infuse until cold
3. Sweeten, ice, and take for summer disorders, or add lemon juice and drink for a bad cold

title: Slippery-Elm Tea
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- a teaspoonful of powdered slippery-elm
- cold water
- lemon
- sugar

## Directions

1. Put a teaspoonful of powdered slippery-elm into a tumbler
2. Pour cold water upon it, and season with lemon and sugar

title: Small Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 1/2 cups granulated sugar
- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoons sweet milk
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients and bake

title: Small Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- ¾ cup butter
- 1½ cups granulated sugar
- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoons sweet milk
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- flour enough to make it roll
- granulated sugar for sprinkling

## Directions

1. Roll thin and sprinkle top with granulated sugar
2. Cut out with hole in centre and bake in a moderate oven

title: Small Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 3 cups flour
- 1/4 cup sour milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon soda
- fruit
- cloves
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Combine 1/2 cup butter, 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup molasses, 3 cups flour, 1/4 cup sour milk, 2 eggs, 1 teaspoon soda, fruit, cloves and nutmeg.
2. Bake in moderate oven.

title: Small Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup butter
- 2 eggs
- 1/4 cup milk
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Mix sugar, butter, eggs and milk
2. Combine baking powder with flour
3. Mix all together
4. Bake

title: Smart Sandwiches
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- smoothly pounded cheese
- 1 tablespoonful Worcester sauce
- buttered slices

## Directions

1. Mix with smoothly pounded cheese a tablespoonful of Worcester sauce
2. Spread on buttered slices

title: Smelts
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- smelts
- salt
- beaten egg
- bread or cracker-crumbs
- boiling fat
- parsley
- lemon

## Directions

1. Clean the smelts by drawing them between the finger and thumb, beginning at the tail
2. wash them and drain in a colander
3. salt well and dip in beaten egg and bread or cracker-crumbs
4. dip first in the egg and then roll in the crumbs
5. fry in boiling fat deep enough to float them
6. they should be a handsome brown in two minutes and a half
7. take them up and place them on a sheet of brown paper for a few minutes to drain
8. pour on a hot dish
9. garnish with parsley and a few slices of lemon

title: Smoked Herring, Alewives, Bloaters, Etc.
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Smoked herring, alewives, bloaters, or similar
- Clean, wet manilla paper
- Sliced lemon

## Directions

1. Wash thoroughly, wipe dry, wrap them in clean, wet manilla paper
2. Leave in a quick oven for fifteen minutes
3. Serve with sliced lemon

title: Smoked Salmon
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Smoked salmon
- Olive oil
- Vinegar
- Sliced lemon

## Directions

1. Soak over night, changing the water three times for warmer
2. In the morning rub hard to get rid of the smoke and rust
3. Leave in ice-water half an hour
4. Wipe dry
5. Rub with olive oil and vinegar
6. Broil over a clean fire
7. Pass sliced lemon with it

title: Smothered Chicken (A Southern Method)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- young chickens
- salt
- pepper
- butter

## Directions

1. Dress young chickens, wash, and let them stand in water half an hour to make them white
2. Put into a baking pan (first cutting them open at the back)
3. Sprinkle salt and pepper over them, and put a lump of butter here and there
4. Cover tightly with another pan the same size and bake one hour
5. Baste often with butter

title: Smothered Fig Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups rich milk
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 eggs, well beaten
- Butter size of egg
- 2 tablespoonfuls cornstarch
- Figs
- Vanilla flavoring

## Directions

1. Make custard in double boiler.
2. Place a layer of finely cut up figs, then a layer of custard, and so on till dish is full.
3. Set away till cool.
4. Put whipped cream on top and serve. Preserved ginger used instead of the figs is also good.

title: Smyrna Steak
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- beef or mutton
- juice of onion
- salt
- pepper
- fine breadcrumbs
- several beaten eggs
- hot butter
- melted butter
- tomato juice

## Directions

1. Chop beef or mutton very fine, and season with juice of onion, salt and pepper
2. Add fine breadcrumbs and several beaten eggs
3. Mix well
4. Make into rolls and brown in hot butter in a frying-pan
5. Put in a kettle, cover with melted butter and a little tomato juice
6. Simmer gently until tender

title: Snappy Ginger Snaps
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup lard or other shortening
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 heaping teaspoon soda dissolved in vinegar
- flour sufficient to make a stiff dough

## Directions

1. Put molasses, sugar and lard on the stove and boil up, but do not burn
2. Add 1 teaspoon ginger and a heaping teaspoon soda dissolved in a little vinegar
3. Stir well, remove from fire
4. Add flour sufficient to make a stiff dough

title: Snow Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- whites of 2 eggs
- 1½ cups flour
- ¼ cup milk
- 1½ teaspoons baking powder
- 2 teaspoons vanilla
- chocolate filling

## Directions

1. Cream butter, adding gradually sugar and vanilla
2. Beat eggs to a stiff froth
3. Add milk
4. Add flour and the beaten whites last
5. Bake
6. Use chocolate filling

title: Snow Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons cornstarch
- cold water
- boiling water
- 5 tablespoons sugar
- whites of 3 eggs
- teaspoon salt
- vanilla
- yolks of 3 eggs
- 2 cups sweet milk
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch

## Directions

1. Take 4 tablespoons cornstarch and wet with a little cold water
2. Pour in boiling water to thicken
3. Stir in 5 tablespoons sugar
4. Have whites of 3 eggs beaten to stiff froth
5. Beat all together and add teaspoon salt and some vanilla
6. Set away to cool
7. Make sauce with yolks of 3 eggs, 2 cups sweet milk, 1 tablespoon cornstarch
8. Sweeten and put in a dish and boil in water
9. Flavor with vanilla
10. Serve with sauce

title: Snow Pudding 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoons cornstarch
- 1 pint boiling water
- cold water
- juice of 2 lemons
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- whites of 2 eggs
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 1 white of egg
- 1 cup sugar

## Directions

1. Moisten 3 tablespoons starch with cold water
2. Stir over boiling water until cooked
3. Add juice of 2 lemons
4. Add 1 cup granulated sugar
5. Set away to cool
6. Add whites of 2 eggs
7. Make sauce with yolks of 2 eggs, 1 white of egg and 1 cup sugar
8. Stir till cooked
9. Use when cold over snow pudding

title: Snow Pudding 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups hot water
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 1/2 cup sugar
- a pinch of salt
- whites of 3 eggs
- 1/2 cup or 1/2 cake grated chocolate
- 3/4 cup sweet milk
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Cook 2 cups hot water with 2 tablespoons cornstarch, 1/2 cup sugar and a pinch of salt
2. Beat whites of 3 eggs to a stiff froth
3. Pour into boiling starch
4. For custard part, boil 1/2 cup or 1/2 cake grated chocolate in 3/4 cup sweet milk
5. Flavor with vanilla
6. When cool add to the above
7. Bake slowly

title: Snowball Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- ¼ cup milk
- 2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon cream tartar
- ½ teaspoon soda
- whites of 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar thoroughly
2. Add milk
3. Sift flour with cream tartar and soda
4. Add the stiffly beaten whites of eggs, folding them in lightly
5. Bake in a moderate oven 30 minutes or more

title: Snowball Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- ½ cup butter
- ¼ cup sweet milk
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 cups flour
- 1 snowball a little larger than an egg

## Directions

1. Stir ingredients quickly
2. Put in a very hot oven before snow melts

title: Snowball Drops
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 2 eggs
- 2 cups milk
- 5 cups flour
- ½ teaspoon salt
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and sugar together
2. Add milk, salt and nutmeg
3. Add baking powder sifted in the flour last
4. Drop off spoon in hot fat and cook a light brown
5. When nearly cold roll in sugar

title: Snowballs
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup sweet milk
- ½ cup butter
- 3 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- whites of 5 eggs
- freshly grated coconut

## Directions

1. Beat sugar, milk, butter, flour, baking powder, and egg whites well
2. Bake in a deep square tin
3. Cut in 2-inch squares
4. Remove the outside
5. Frost all sides
6. Roll in freshly grated coconut

title: Soda Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- ¼ pound butter
- 1 pound flour
- 1 cup milk
- ¼ pound currants
- ½ pound sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1 teaspoon carbonate soda

## Directions

1. Rub butter into the flour
2. Add currants and sugar and mix well
3. Whisk eggs well and stir into mixture
4. Dissolve soda in milk
5. Add milk and soda to mixture and stir well
6. Put in greased cake tin and bake at once for 1 hour

title: Soda Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg well beaten
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup thick sour cream
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in a little warm water
- flour
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat egg
2. Mix in brown sugar
3. Add sour cream
4. Dissolve soda in warm water and stir through the sour cream
5. Add flour to thicken
6. Flavor with nutmeg
7. Bake

title: Soda Scones
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One pound sifted flour
- Two cups sour or buttermilk
- One teaspoon soda
- A little salt in the milk
- If sweet milk is used, to one teaspoonful of soda put two of cream of tartar

## Directions

1. Sift the soda well through the flour with salt in the milk.

title: Soft Caramel Custard
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of milk
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- 6 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt

## Directions

1. Put the milk on to boil, reserving a cupful
2. Beat the eggs and add the cold milk to them
3. Stir the sugar in a small frying-pan until it becomes liquid and just begins to smoke
4. Stir it into the boiling milk
5. Then add the beaten eggs and cold milk, and stir constantly until the mixture begins to thicken
6. Set away to cool
7. Serve in glasses

title: Soft Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 heaping cup butter
- 1½ cups sugar
- 2 eggs
- 3 tablespoons sour milk
- a small teaspoon soda
- as little flour as will roll them
- vanilla or lemon for flavoring

## Directions

1. Mix butter, sugar, eggs, and sour milk together
2. Add soda and flour
3. Roll out thin
4. Flavor with vanilla or lemon
5. Bake

title: Soft Cookies No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 teaspoon soda
- just enough flour to roll

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients together
2. Roll out
3. Bake quickly

title: Soft Gingerbread
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup blackstrap
- 1/2 cup melted butter
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons ginger
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup boiling water

## Directions

1. Combine eggs, brown sugar, and blackstrap
2. Add melted butter
3. Add flour, ginger, cinnamon, and allspice
4. Put soda in boiling water and add last

title: Soft Gingerbread No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup sour milk
- 2 eggs
- 3 cups flour
- 1 tablespoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add molasses
3. Add eggs 1 by 1 and beat thoroughly
4. Put soda in sour milk and mix well
5. Sift flour and spices
6. Add flour and spice mixture to other mixture, alternating with milk
7. Beat well

title: Soft Honey-Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups honey
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sour milk
- 2 teaspoons soda
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 4 cups flour

## Directions

1. Mix butter, honey, eggs and sour milk
2. Add soda, ginger and cinnamon
3. Mix with flour and bake

title: Soft Molasses Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1/2 cup warm water
- 1 cup molasses
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 egg
- pinch salt
- juice of 1 lemon and grated rind

## Directions

1. Mix 1/2 cup butter, 1/2 cup warm water, 1 cup molasses, 2 1/2 cups flour, 1 teaspoon soda, 1 egg, pinch salt, and juice of 1 lemon and grated rind
2. Bake in a loaf
3. The lemon may be omitted and a good tablespoon vinegar used instead

title: Soft Toast
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 thin slices stale bread
- salt
- boiling water
- butter

## Directions

1. Toast well, but not too brown, two thin slices of stale bread
2. Put them on a warm plate
3. Sprinkle with a pinch of salt and pour upon them some boiling water
4. Quickly cover with another dish of the same size, and drain off the water
5. Put a very small bit of butter on the toast and serve at once while hot

title: Soft-Shell Crabs
body:
## Ingredients

- crabs
- boiling water
- cracker crumbs
- egg
- deep fat

## Directions

1. Wash crabs
2. Drop in boiling water for 1/2 minute to kill them
3. Take off apron (tail pieces folded on under shell)
4. Lift points at each side and cut out gills
5. Cut off a triangular piece at head including eyes and stomach
6. Wipe dry
7. Crumb
8. Egg crumb
9. Fry in deep fat until brown

title: Soles in Batter
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pair of soles
- 1/4 lb. flour
- Pepper and salt
- 2 oz. butter
- Lard or drippings for frying
- 1/4 teaspoonful salt
- 2 eggs
- Milk to mix it

## Directions

1. Fillet the soles, and cut each fillet in two pieces
2. Sprinkle them with pepper and salt
3. Make a light batter with the above ingredients, taking care that it is not very thin
4. Dip each piece of fish into this, and fry quickly in boiling fat to a golden brown
5. Arrange them in a circle, one overlapping the other, on a hot dish
6. Garnish with fresh or fried parsley
7. Serve as soon as cooked
8. Melted butter may be sent to table with them in a tureen, if liked

title: Souffle de Volaille
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. raw chicken
- 3 oz. butter
- 4 eggs
- 1.5 pts. double cream
- pepper and salt to taste
- good white sauce made with butter, flour, milk, good chicken stock and a little cream

## Directions

1. Pound meat in a mortar (or pass twice through fine mincer), add gradually three ounces butter, four yolks and two whites of eggs.
2. Season to taste and then pass through a hair sieve.
3. Whip the remaining two whites of eggs to a stiff froth.
4. Half whip the cream and stir these in very gently to the chicken mixture.
5. Steam very gently in mould for three-quarters of an hour.
6. Turn out and serve with good white sauce made with butter, flour, milk, good chicken stock and a little cream.

title: Soufflé
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 oz. butter
- 2.5 oz. flour
- Yolks of 4 eggs
- Whites of 6 eggs
- 1 teaspoonful vanilla
- 2 oz. chocolate
- 2 oz. sugar
- 1 gill cream

## Directions

1. Melt butter and flour, then add cream
2. Cook two minutes
3. Add chocolate and stir till melted
4. Remove from fire and let cool
5. Add yolks
6. Just before steaming, add whites stiffly beaten and fold them in gently
7. Steam one hour and a half in mould placed in saucepan of hot water with water come half way up mould
8. Put mould in bottom of saucepan and cover with a greased paper, and then cover saucepan
9. Do not let water boil

title: Sour Cream Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 2 beaten eggs
- 2 cups flour
- 1 level teaspoon soda
- 1/2 teaspoon ground cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Mix 1 level teaspoon soda with cream
2. Add to eggs and sugar
3. Add 1/2 teaspoon ground cloves and 1 teaspoon cinnamon
4. Bake 20 minutes in a loaf pan

title: Sour Cream Filling
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour cream
- 1.5 cups brown sugar
- 4 yolks of eggs
- butter size of an egg
- 10 cents' worth chopped walnuts

## Directions

1. Boil until thick
2. Add 10 cents' worth chopped walnuts

title: Sour Cream Filling (Another Variation)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/8 cup chopped walnuts
- 1/8 cup chopped raisins
- 1 cup sour cream
- 3/4 cup sugar

## Directions

1. Mix and spread

title: Sour Cream Filling (Variation)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 1/8 cup sour cream
- 2 cups brown sugar
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Boil like candy
2. Stir while cooking
3. Flavor when cold with vanilla

title: Sour Cream Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- Yolks of 2 eggs
- ¾ cup granulated sugar
- 1 cup sour cream
- ¾ teaspoon soda
- 1 cup currants or raisins
- teaspoon cinnamon
- a pinch of cloves

## Directions

1. Cook this mixture on the stove until the froth leaves it
2. Fill pie crust which has been previously baked
3. Put into oven until well set
4. Cover with whites beaten stiff and return to oven to brown

title: Sour Cream Pie No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon flour
- ½ cup raisins cut and seeded
- 1 cup sour cream
- a little salt
- cinnamon
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Stir all ingredients together
2. Bake with 2 crusts
3. Bake very slowly

title: Sour Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- fruit
- water
- sugar
- ½ tablespoon lemon juice

## Directions

1. Wash fruit
2. Remove stems and decayed part
3. Cook with enough water to cover until tender
4. Drain
5. Add 1 cup sugar for each cup juice
6. Heat sugar first
7. Boil until it jells on cool saucer
8. Add ½ tablespoon lemon juice
9. Mould with sardines and serve with mayonnaise

title: Sour Milk Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 cup shortening
- 2 teaspoons vanilla
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour to make a stiff dough

## Directions

1. Mix up the night before
2. Next day roll out and bake

title: Southern Hash
body:
## Ingredients

- any left-over chicken or tomatoes
- 2 cups chicken, cut into small pieces
- 2 cups tomatoes, cut into small pieces
- 1 cup water
- 1 onion
- 1 cup boiled rice
- parsley for garnish

## Directions

1. Stew chicken pieces and tomatoes gently in 1 cup water for 20 minutes
2. Add onion while stewing if desired
3. Put the chicken, tomatoes, and 1 cup boiled rice in a kettle and heat to boiling point
4. Serve hot, garnish the platter with parsley

title: Southern Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- 2 cups corn pulp or whole green corn
- 2 well-beaten eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- seasoning to taste
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Butter a shallow bake dish
2. Pour into it a mixture of 2 cups corn pulp or whole green corn, 2 well-beaten eggs, 1 cup milk, 1 tablespoon each sugar and melted butter
3. Season to taste
4. Cover with bread crumbs and bits of butter
5. Bake in a slow oven until brown

title: Southern Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups corn pulp or whole green corn
- 2 well-beaten eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- salt to taste
- bread crumbs
- bits of butter

## Directions

1. Butter a shallow bake dish
2. Pour the mixture of corn pulp or whole green corn, well-beaten eggs, milk, sugar, and melted butter into the dish
3. Season to taste
4. Cover with bread crumbs and bits of butter
5. Bake in a slow oven until brown

title: Spanish Bun
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 4 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 3 cups flour
- 3 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- Flavoring as desired

## Directions

1. Bake in a moderate oven.
2. Ice with the following: The whites of three eggs well beaten with one and one-half cups of sugar.

title: Spanish Bun
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of 3 eggs
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 teaspoonful cinnamon
- 0.25 cup butter
- a pinch of salt
- 0.25 cup milk
- flour to make batter
- whites of 3 eggs
- 1 cup brown sugar

## Directions

1. Bake in moderate oven
2. Beat icing (whites of 3 eggs and 1 cup brown sugar) five minutes
3. Spread icing on the cake
4. Put in the oven and brown

title: Spanish Bun
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 2 cups flour
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 heaping teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Mix cinnamon with flour and baking powder
2. Combine all ingredients and mix

title: Spanish Bun 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs yolks and 1 whole egg
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 heaping dessertspoon mixed spices
- 2 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- Whites of 3 eggs for icing
- 1/2 cup white sugar for icing

## Directions

1. Beat sugar, butter, spices, and eggs together
2. Add milk and flour
3. Put in oven
4. For icing: beat whites of 3 eggs and mix with 1/2 cup white sugar
5. Put icing on cake and let brown a little

title: Spanish Bun 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 2 3/4 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 3/4 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 2 teaspoons mixed spice
- Whites of 2 eggs for icing
- 3/4 cup brown sugar for icing

## Directions

1. Combine ingredients and mix
2. For icing: beat whites of 2 eggs with 3/4 cup brown sugar until stiff
3. Apply icing to cake

title: Spanish Bun 4
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- little nutmeg
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients and mix
2. Bake

title: Spanish Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt. new milk
- 1 box gelatine
- 1/4 lb. white sugar
- 4 eggs (whites and yolks beaten separately)
- 2 teaspoonfuls vanilla
- a little almond extract

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in a little water till very soft.
2. Boil the milk, stir in gelatine, then sugar, then the well-beaten yolks.
3. Stir well, and let the mixture thicken.
4. Put in flavoring and boil till the mixture separates.
5. Take from the fire, beat in the whites (previously beaten stiff).
6. Stir lightly together and pour into a mould.

title: Spanish Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- one box gelatine
- one and one-half pints milk
- three eggs, beaten separately
- three tablespoonfuls sugar

## Directions

1. Dissolve gelatine on top of kettle, boil milk.
2. Add gelatine, stirring it in quickly, then add yolks of eggs, beaten with sugar.
3. When well scalded take off the fire and stir the whites in, well beaten.
4. Flavor to taste and put into mould.

title: Spanish Cream
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pts. milk
- 1 box gelatine
- 8 tablespoonful sugar
- Whites 6 eggs beaten stiff
- Yolks 6 eggs

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in half of the milk for an hour.
2. Scald the rest of the milk, then stir in the gelatine.
3. Add the yolks of beaten eggs and eight tablespoons of sugar.
4. Take from the fire and allow to cool, when put in the beaten whites and turn into a mould.

title: Spanish Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 gallons green tomatoes
- 12 onions
- 3 cups sugar
- 1 quart vinegar
- 2 tablespoons mustard
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 1 teaspoon pepper
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Chop fine all ingredients
2. Cook 1 hour

title: Spanish Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 ripe tomatoes
- 12 sour apples
- 4 onions
- 2 quarts vinegar
- 2 pounds brown sugar
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon mustard
- 1 heaping teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients and cook

title: Spice Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 pint sweet milk
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 cup currants
- 4 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons soda
- 4 teaspoons cream of tartar
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- salt

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. Let rise in baker 1/2 hour
3. Bake 1 hour and let rise in warm place

title: Spice Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoonful cinnamon
- 1/2 teaspoonful cloves
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder

## Directions

1. Combine ingredients and bake. This is nice for either a loaf or a layer cake.

title: Spice Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 1 cup dark sugar
- 1 large cup flour
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoonful soda
- 1 teaspoonful each of cloves, allspice and cinnamon
- 2 tablespoonfuls molasses
- 0.5 cup sour milk

## Directions

1. Bake in two layers
2. Ice and fill with icing made by boiling sugar and water

title: Spice Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ cup butter
- 1½ cups sugar
- 1 cup cream
- ½ teaspoon soda dissolved in teaspoon water
- 1 egg
- 1 cup raisins
- ½ cup cornstarch
- 2 cups flour
- ½ teaspoon cinnamon
- ½ teaspoon cloves

## Directions

1. Bake in moderate oven

title: Spice Cake 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 small teaspoon salt
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in milk
- 1 cup raisins chopped
- 2 cups sifted flour

## Directions

1. Cream sugar and butter
2. Add cinnamon, allspice, and salt
3. Add sour milk with dissolved soda
4. Add chopped raisins
5. Add sifted flour
6. Bake in a loaf in a slow oven
7. Can be used as a pudding

title: Spice Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups flour
- 1 cup lard or dripping
- 3½ cups brown sugar
- 3½ cups molasses
- 1 cup currants
- 1 teaspoon soda
- buttermilk or sour milk

## Directions

1. Rub flour and lard well together
2. Add brown sugar and molasses
3. Add currants and soda
4. Mix with buttermilk or sour milk till stiff enough to roll ¼ inch
5. Cut as desired
6. Bake in a moderate oven till a dark brown

title: Spice Gems
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 teaspoonful ginger
- ½ teaspoonful each of other spices
- 1 egg
- ½ cup molasses
- ½ cup milk
- Flour to make stiff batter that will cling to spoon
- Small teaspoonful of carbonate of soda
- A pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Put in ingredients in order mentioned.
2. Dissolve small teaspoonful of carbonate of soda in a very little boiling water; add to the batter a pinch of salt.
3. Mix thoroughly, and bake in buttered gem-pans in moderate oven.

title: Spice Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck crabapples
- 7 cups vinegar
- 5 cups water
- 1 ounce whole cinnamon
- 1 ounce whole allspice
- 3 1/2 ounce whole cloves
- 1 pound sugar to 1 pint of juice

## Directions

1. Boil and strain
2. Add 1 pound sugar to 1 pint of juice
3. Boil until it jells

title: Spiced Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- shank
- onion
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Boil a shank until tender
2. Lift out meat and chop very fine
3. Add onion, pepper, salt or other seasoning if you choose
4. Return to kettle containing the liquid and boil to a jelly
5. Put in bowls to cool

title: Spiced Beef Ham
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 pounds beef ham
- 1 pound brown sugar
- 1 pound salt
- 3/4 pound pepper
- 3/4 pound allspice
- 1 ounce saltpetre

## Directions

1. Mix together salt, sugar, pepper, allspice and saltpetre
2. Rub over meat
3. Pack in a jar very closely
4. Turn to rub every day for ten days
5. Then hang up to dry

title: Spiced Currants
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds currants
- 2 pounds sugar
- 1.5 cups vinegar
- 1.5 pounds raisins
- 1 ounce stick cinnamon
- 1 ounce mace
- 0.5 ounce whole cloves
- Teaspoonful white mustard seed

## Directions

1. To currants add sugar, cinnamon, mace, cloves, mustard-seed tied in a muslin bag
2. Cook slowly one hour, then add vinegar
3. Stir constantly for fifteen minutes
4. Add one and one-quarter pounds of raisins chopped fine

title: Spiced Currants For Meats
body:
## Ingredients

- currants (4 quarts)
- vinegar (1 pint)
- sugar (3 pounds)
- cinnamon (1 tablespoon)
- allspice (1 tablespoon)
- cloves (1 tablespoon)
- nutmeg (1 tablespoon)

## Directions

1. Cook for 1 hour
2. Keep in a cool place tightly covered

title: Spiced Gooseberries
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 pounds ripe gooseberries
- 5 pounds sugar
- 1 tablespoon cloves
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon nutmeg
- 1 tablespoon allspice
- 1 cup vinegar

## Directions

1. Cook 3 hours
2. When half done add 1 cup vinegar

title: Spiced Grape Catsup
body:
## Ingredients

- grapes
- 1 pint granulated sugar per quart of juice
- 1 cup vinegar per quart of juice
- 2 teaspoons salt per quart of juice
- 1 tablespoon whole cloves per quart of juice
- 1 grated nutmeg per quart of juice
- 1 teaspoon ground allspice per quart of juice
- 1 tablespoon powdered cinnamon per quart of juice

## Directions

1. Cook grapes in a double boiler until the skins burst
2. Carefully strain off every particle of juice and return to the fire
3. Add to each quart of juice: 1 pint granulated sugar, 1 cup vinegar, 2 teaspoons salt, 1 tablespoon whole cloves, a grated nutmeg, 1 teaspoon ground allspice, 1 tablespoon powdered cinnamon
4. Boil slowly about 1 hour, and seal

title: Spiced Grapes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 lbs. grapes
- 1 pt. vinegar
- 4 lbs. sugar
- 4 teaspoonfuls ground cinnamon
- 5 teaspoonfuls ground cloves

## Directions

1. Remove skins of grapes and boil pulp till soft.
2. Strain through a bag or fine colander.
3. Add skins and ingredients, and boil two hours.
4. Bottle.

title: Spiced Grapes
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 lbs. grapes
- 5 lbs. sugar
- 1 cup vinegar
- 1 teaspoonful nutmeg
- 1 teaspoonful cinnamon
- 1 teaspoonful allspice
- 1 teaspoonful cloves

## Directions

1. Squeeze pulp from skin
2. Boil pulp and strain out seeds
3. Boil again with skins and other ingredients until it jellies

title: Spiced Grapes
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 pounds grapes
- 3 pounds sugar
- 1 pint vinegar
- scant 2 tablespoons cinnamon
- 2 tablespoons cloves

## Directions

1. Prepare grapes the same as for preserved grapes
2. Cook vinegar, spices and fruit after it has been prepared 10 to 20 minutes
3. Add sugar and boil down until of right consistency

title: Spiced Green Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 32 tomatoes chopped fine
- 6 cups brown sugar
- 1 quart vinegar
- 1 teaspoon mace
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Boil 32 tomatoes chopped fine with 6 cups brown sugar for 1.5 hours
2. Add 1 quart vinegar, 1 teaspoon each mace, cloves and cinnamon
3. Boil 15 minutes
4. Cool, place in jars

title: Spiced Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup white sugar
- 1/4 pound butter
- 3/4 cup sour milk
- 2 tablespoons syrup
- 1 nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour
- 1 cup seeded raisins
- 1 cup white sugar
- 2 tablespoons water
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Save whites of 2 eggs for icing
2. Mix eggs, sugar, butter, sour milk and syrup
3. Add nutmeg, cinnamon, allspice and soda mixed in flour enough to stiffen
4. Add seeded raisins
5. Beat well and bake in two layers
6. For icing: Boil 1 cup white sugar in 2 tablespoons water till stringy
7. Beat whites of 2 eggs well
8. Add sugar and eggs together and beat well
9. Flavor with vanilla

title: Spiced Layer Cake (Version 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup water
- 4 eggs
- 3 cups flour
- 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 nutmeg
- 1 1/4 teaspoons cloves
- 3 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix butter, sugar and water
2. Add eggs
3. Add flour, cinnamon, nutmeg and cloves
4. Add baking powder
5. Bake in layers
6. Spread with icing

title: Spiced Meat
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds of good steak or veal
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 cup cracker crumbs
- butter size of an egg
- 1/2 nutmeg
- pepper
- salt
- 3 tablespoons cream

## Directions

1. Chop meat
2. Add eggs, cracker crumbs, butter, nutmeg, pepper and salt to taste
3. Add 3 tablespoons cream
4. Stir together
5. Bake in a loaf for 1 hour

title: Spiced Peaches
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart vinegar
- 6 cups brown sugar
- 1 stick cinnamon
- 1 cup mixed spices
- whole cloves
- peaches

## Directions

1. Make syrup of 1 quart vinegar, 6 cups brown sugar, 1 stick cinnamon, and 1 cup mixed spices
2. Put whole cloves in the peaches
3. Add peaches to syrup

title: Spiced Raisin Loaf
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups warmed milk
- 1/4 cup old-fashioned yeast
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 teaspoonful cloves, cinnamon and allspice
- 3 eggs
- 1 lb. seeded raisins
- Flour to make smooth, soft dough
- 1 cake of compressed yeast can be used

## Directions

1. Mix warm milk, flour to make a soft dough, a quarter of a cup of old-fashioned yeast; let it stand in a warm place till light.
2. Then add butter, brown sugar, cinnamon, cloves and allspice, eggs, raisins and bread flour enough to make it smooth and soft.
3. Dough kneaded well; put in a warm place to rise.
4. When light mould in a loaf; let rise again.
5. When it has risen to the top of the pan bake in a moderate oven for one hour.

title: Spiced Round of Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- round of beef weighing about 20 pounds
- 2 pounds clear fat fresh pork
- 2 ounces ground pepper
- 1 ounce ground allspice
- 1 ounce ground ginger
- 1 nutmeg grated
- 1/2 ounce powdered saltpetre
- 1 pound dark brown sugar
- 1 pound fine salt
- cold water

## Directions

1. Take half the quantity of salt and rub the beef thoroughly, and let stand over night
2. Add the other ingredients, which have been well mixed together
3. Rub well, and turn meat every day for a fortnight, basting well at the same time
4. Have the pork lying in the dish with the meat
5. When it is ready to cook, put the pork in the hole where the bone was, strew and tie up well
6. Put in a pot with a close cover, and cover well with cold water
7. When it comes to a boil, boil hard for 1 hour
8. Remove from stove, keeping it well covered
9. Stand on floor and cover with rugs and blankets and let stand for 24 hours
10. Take it out of the water and put it away to get thoroughly cold before using
11. Cut in very thin slices

title: Spiced Sweet Apples
body:
## Ingredients

- sugar
- water
- vinegar
- whole cloves
- cinnamon
- whole sweet apples

## Directions

1. Make a syrup of equal parts sugar and water
2. Add a little vinegar, a few whole cloves, and a little cinnamon
3. Add whole sweet apples peeled
4. Cook until tender

title: Spiced Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds ripe tomatoes
- 2 pounds brown sugar
- 1 pint cider vinegar
- 0.5 ounce stick cinnamon
- 0.5 ounce cloves

## Directions

1. Cook all together till tomatoes are done
2. Take out tomatoes
3. Boil juice down to a syrup and pour over tomatoes
4. Store in an open jar

title: Spiced Veal
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds veal
- salt
- pepper
- cloves
- cinnamon
- 4 small crackers
- 1 egg
- a lump of butter nearly the size of an egg

## Directions

1. Chop veal fine and season highly with salt, pepper, cloves and cinnamon
2. Add 4 small crackers rolled out, 1 egg, and a lump of butter nearly the size of an egg
3. Mix thoroughly together
4. Press in a baking tin and bake
5. Slice when cold

title: Spiced Veal
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds veal
- salt
- pepper
- cloves
- cinnamon
- 4 small crackers
- 1 egg
- butter

## Directions

1. Chop the veal fine and season highly with salt, pepper, cloves and cinnamon.
2. Add 4 small crackers rolled out, 1 egg, and a lump of butter nearly the size of an egg.
3. Mix thoroughly together and press in a baking tin, and bake hours.
4. Slice when cold.

title: Spinach
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 peck spinach
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon salt
- cold water

## Directions

1. Have 2 pans filled with cold water
2. Pick over the leaves carefully and drop them into 1 pan of water
3. Shake them well in the water and lift them into the other pan
4. Empty the water from the first pan and fill it again with cold water
5. Wash the spinach in this way until not a grain of sand is left in it
6. Put the leaves in a granite kettle and cover closely
7. Cook gently for 3/4 hour
8. Add the salt when about half cooked
9. When tender, turn into a colander and chop with a knife
10. Drain well
11. Put into a hot vegetable dish and add the butter

title: Spinach Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- cold boiled spinach
- dressing
- hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Take cold boiled spinach and mince fine
2. Cover with dressing
3. Garnish with sliced hard-boiled eggs

title: Spinach Souffle
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pk. spinach
- 1 tablespoonful butter
- 1 egg, beaten
- 2 tablespoonfuls cream
- 1 teaspoonful powdered sugar
- salt
- nutmeg
- black pepper
- whites of 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Boil and chop spinach, and while hot stir in butter and beaten egg, salt, and nutmeg
2. Season with a little sugar and pepper, and set away to get cold
3. When you are ready for it, whip into the cold spinach the cream and the stiffened whites of the eggs
4. Pour into a handsome bake-dish, sift a small teaspoonful of powdered sugar on top, and bake in a hot oven ten minutes, covered, five minutes when you have uncovered it
5. Send immediately to table, as it soon falls
6. Each portion should be helped out upon a square of fried bread

title: Spinach Soufflé
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- spinach
- two or three well-beaten eggs
- a small amount of milk
- pepper
- salt
- butter

## Directions

1. Boil some spinach thoroughly
2. Pass it through a sieve
3. Add two or three well-beaten eggs and a small amount of milk with pepper and salt
4. Mix it thoroughly
5. Put it in well buttered soufflé dishes
6. Bake for ten minutes

title: Split Pea or Bean Soup
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup split peas or 1 cup dried beans
- 2 quarts of water
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 4 teaspoonful of sugar
- Salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Let the peas or beans soak over night in three quarts of cold water
2. Put the soaked peas or beans into a saucepan with two quarts of water and a ham-bone, if you have it, otherwise it may be omitted
3. Let simmer for four or five hours, or until the peas or beans are perfectly soft. Add more water from time to time, if necessary
4. Pass them through a sieve; add to the pulp enough stock, or milk, or water to make a soup of the consistency of cream
5. Put it again into a saucepan on the fire; season, and add a roux made of one tablespoonful of butter and one tablespoonful of flour cooked together
6. Dilute the roux to smoothness with a little of the soup before adding it to the pot
7. The roux will hold the particles of peas or beans in suspension
8. Serve croutons on the soup, or pass them

title: Split Pea Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup split peas
- 2.5 quarts water
- 2 teaspoons chopped onion
- 3 teaspoons butter
- 3 teaspoons flour
- 1.5 teaspoons salt
- 0.75 teaspoon pepper
- 1 pint milk

## Directions

1. Wash the peas and soak them over night in cold water
2. Drain and rinse thoroughly
3. Add 2.5 quarts cold water and the onion
4. Cook slowly until soft
5. Rub through a strainer and add the remainder of the liquid
6. Make a white sauce and cook until it is thick like thick cream
7. Cooking a ham bone with the soup improves the flavor

title: Sponge Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup flour
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoonful cream tartar
- A pinch of salt
- 3 eggs
- 1/4 teaspoonful soda dissolved in tablespoonfuls cold water
- Juice of 1/2 lemon

## Directions

1. Mix together flour, sugar, cream tartar, and a little salt.
2. Break eggs and beat thoroughly; soda dissolved in cold water, juice of lemon.
3. Bake in moderate oven.

title: Sponge Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 eggs
- Weight of 10 eggs in sugar
- Weight of 9 in flour
- Juice and rind of 1 lemon
- 1 heaping teaspoonful baking powder
- A pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Beat yolks until very light
2. Add sugar, grated rind and juice of lemon, and well-beaten whites, beating all together fully five minutes
3. Add flour as quickly as possible
4. Pour into large dripping pan lined with buttered paper about two inches in depth
5. Put in well-heated oven at once
6. Don't open oven door for fifteen minutes at least
7. Try cake with a straw and when it comes out clean cake is done

title: Sponge Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs, keep out 1 white
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup sifted flour
- 1 teaspoonful vinegar
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking-powder
- 2 tablespoonfuls cold water
- 1 cup icing sugar
- juice of lemon or essence

## Directions

1. Mix eggs and sugar together
2. put baking powder in flour
3. beat well
4. make icing with white of one egg; one cup icing sugar, juice of lemon or essence

title: Sponge Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- Juice and rind of 1 lemon
- 1 scant cup flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs separately
2. when whites are very stiff beat into them one-half a cup of sugar
3. beat the yolks and add the other half cup of sugar
4. beat for five minutes by the clock
5. add to yolks rind and juice of lemon
6. now beat yolks and whites together and scant cup of flour stirred in quickly
7. Sprinkle top of cake with sugar when in cake-tin before putting in the oven
8. Bake one-half an hour

title: Sponge Cake
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1 cup flour
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 and 1/2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat whites and yolks separate
2. Add sugar to whites, then yolks, flour, and baking powder
3. Mix quickly

title: Sponge Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup white sugar
- ½ cup butter
- ¼ cup sweet milk
- ⅜ teaspoon soda
- 1½ teaspoons cream tartar
- 1 tablespoon vanilla
- 2 good cups flour

## Directions

1. Stir eggs and butter first of all to a cream and sugar too along with it
2. Add flour, soda, and cream tartar
3. Bake in a medium hot oven, not too fast
4. Ice if you wish when cool
5. Flavor with lemon

title: Sponge Cake (Classic)
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- Four eggs
- one cupful of fine white sugar
- one cupful of flour
- lemon flavoring

## Directions

1. Beat yolks and whites separately
2. add half the sugar to yolks and half to whites and beat well
3. then beat both together
4. stir in flour
5. bake in slow oven

title: Sponge Drops
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 whites
- 1/4 cup powdered sugar
- 2 yolks
- 3 cups flour
- 1/8 teaspoon salt
- 3/4 teaspoon vanilla
- powdered sugar for sprinkling

## Directions

1. Beat whites until stiff and dry
2. Add sugar gradually
3. Add yolks beaten until thick and lemon colored
4. Add flavoring
5. Cut and fold in flour mixed and sifted with salt
6. Drop from tip of spoon on unbuttered paper
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar
8. Bake about 8 minutes in a moderate oven

title: Sponge Gingerbread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 3/4 pounds flour
- 4 ounces sugar
- 5 ounces butter
- 1 pound syrup
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 egg
- milk

## Directions

1. Warm butter and syrup together
2. Stir in flour, sugar, baking powder, ginger, and egg
3. Add little milk if required
4. Bake in a buttered tin
5. Cut into squares when done

title: Sponge Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 4 tablespoonfuls flour
- 5 tablespoonfuls white sugar
- 6 eggs, whites and yolks beaten separately
- 1 pt. sweet milk

## Directions

1. Boil the sugar, flour and one pint of sweet milk together, then take off the fire and stir in butter.
2. When cool add the eggs well beaten.
3. Bake one hour in a pan of water.

title: Sponge Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 oz. butter
- 1 oz. sugar
- 1 oz. flour
- 1/2 pt. milk
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Scald the milk, and put the butter, sugar, flour, and yolks of eggs into it.
2. Beat the whites stiff and stir in.
3. Bake in a pan set in another pan of water, for about half an hour.

title: Sponge Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt. milk
- 1 cup butter
- 3 cup flour
- 1 cup sugar
- 5 eggs
- 1 teaspoonful vanilla

## Directions

1. Wet the flour with part of the milk
2. Cook it all in the milk ten minutes
3. Add butter and sugar while hot
4. When cool add the yolks of eggs well beaten
5. Add the whisked whites and stir thoroughly
6. Bake in a two-quart basin (first set in a pan of hot water) half an hour
7. Serve with cream for sauce

title: Sponge Pudding
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt. milk
- 2 oz. sugar
- 2 oz. flour
- 6 eggs, beaten separately
- butter

## Directions

1. Mix milk, sugar and flour and heat but not boil.
2. Take off the fire and put in butter, the yolks of eggs thoroughly beaten, then the whites.
3. Bake twenty-five minutes in a pan or mould set in hot water.
4. Eat with foam sauce.

title: Sponge Pudding Sauce
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- One cup of sugar
- One-half cup of butter
- One-half cup boiling water
- One-half cup wine
- A little nutmeg

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients for sauce to serve with sponge pudding.

title: Sponge Roll
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup boiling water
- 2 cups sugar
- 3 cups flour
- 4 eggs
- 2 teaspoonfuls baking powder
- Jelly or jam

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks and sugar together
2. slowly pour over them the boiling water
3. stir in the sifted flour and lastly the beaten whites of the eggs, retaining a little of the flour mixed with the baking powder until the very last
4. Bake in thin layers and while hot spread with jelly or jam and roll

title: Sponge Roll Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 well-beaten eggs
- 1 cup light brown sugar
- 1 cup sweet cream
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1 cup flour
- raspberry preserves

## Directions

1. Mix baking powder with flour
2. Beat all ingredients together
3. Bake in a quick oven
4. When cooked, spread a little raspberry preserves over the top
5. Roll while warm

title: Spoon Bread
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pt. milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoonful baking powder
- Salt
- Cornmeal to make thin batter
- Butter

## Directions

1. Stir into milk enough white cornmeal to make a thin batter.
2. Add baking powder, salt and eggs, the whites and yolks of which have been beaten separately.
3. Pour the mixture into a baking dish, smooth the top with a broad, flat knife, and dot with pieces of butter.
4. Bake and serve in the dish with a spoon.

title: Spring Mince Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups chopped raisins
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup warm water
- 1/2 cup vinegar
- 2 well-beaten eggs
- 5 crackers
- spices to taste
- rich crust

## Directions

1. Pound crackers fine
2. Stir all together and season with spices as other mince pies
3. Bake with rich crust
4. For the top crust roll, then cut in narrow strips and twist and lay across
5. This will make 2 pies

title: Squash Fritters
author: Grace E. Denison
body:
## Ingredients

- two cups cooked and creamed squash (cold)
- two cups milk
- two eggs
- saltspoonful of salt
- one cup flour
- one-half teaspoonful baking powder

## Directions

1. To squash add milk, eggs, salt, and flour in which has been sifted the baking powder
2. There should be just enough flour to hold the mixture together
3. Bake on a griddle as you would cakes
4. Send to table hot

title: Squash Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 cup squash
- 1 cup milk
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon molasses
- 1/2 teaspoon ginger
- 1/16 teaspoon cinnamon
- Speck of cloves
- 3 drops vanilla

## Directions

1. Combine all ingredients and bake

title: Standard White Sauce for Fish or Meats
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter (melted)
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup liquid

## Directions

1. Add flour to melted butter
2. Add liquid

title: Steam Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon baking syrup
- 1 cup chopped figs
- 1 3/4 cups buttermilk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour to make a good stiff batter

## Directions

1. Mix egg, butter, sugar, baking syrup, chopped figs, and buttermilk together
2. Add soda and flour to make a good stiff batter
3. Steam 1 hour

title: Steam Pudding 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup shortening
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup currants
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup buttermilk
- 3 eggs
- 1 teaspoon soda
- a pinch of salt
- flour to make stiff

## Directions

1. Mix shortening, brown sugar, currants, raisins, buttermilk, eggs, soda, salt, and flour to make stiff
2. Steam 2 1/2 or 3 hours
3. Serve with sauce

title: Steam Puffs
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 2 cups flour
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 4 tablespoons melted butter
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 1 cup chopped raisins
- 3 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix eggs, flour, sugar, melted butter, and sweet milk
2. Add raisins and baking powder
3. Steam 1 1/2 hour in cups
4. Serve with maple syrup

title: Steam Roast Chicken
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- bouillon for basting
- bread soaked in water and squeezed out
- onions chopped and browned in lard or butter
- chopped celery
- parsley
- pepper
- salt
- butter
- 2 eggs
- minced boiled salt pork if desired
- tomatoes (1 gallon)
- 2 gallons water
- onions
- garlic
- celery
- parsley
- bones of roast beef or chicken bones
- marrow or butter
- flour
- bouillon

## Directions

1. Roast a chicken in a covered roasting pan or in a Dutch oven from 3.5 to 3 hours, according to size of chicken
2. Baste with bouillon
3. For dressing: Mix bread that has been soaked in water and squeezed out, with onions that have been chopped and browned in lard or butter
4. To dressing add chopped celery, parsley, pepper, salt, butter and 2 eggs, also a little minced boiled salt pork if desired
5. For gravy: Boil tomatoes (if 1 gallon, then with 2 gallons of water) with onions, garlic, celery, parsley and bones of roast beef or chicken bones
6. Marrow or butter can be used instead of the bones
7. Boil 3 hours and then add some bouillon
8. Steam and boil again with flour to thicken ever so slightly, and a little salt to suit taste

title: Steam Xmas Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 cup suet
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup currants
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour to make not too stiff
- salt and spices to taste

## Directions

1. Combine 1 egg, 1/2 cup sugar, 3/4 cup molasses, 1 cup sour milk, 1 cup suet, 1 cup raisins, and 1 cup currants
2. Season to taste
3. Add 1 teaspoon soda
4. Add flour to make not too stiff
5. Steam

title: Steam Xmas Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 cup suet
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup currants
- season to taste
- 1 teaspoon soda
- flour to make not too stiff

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients
2. Steam

title: Steamed Bread Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups grated bread
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup coffee sugar
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon cloves

## Directions

1. Steam from 1 to 2 hours

title: Steamed Brown Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups Graham flour
- 1 cup milk
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 1 cup raisins
- little salt
- good teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Steam 3 hours
2. Put in the oven half an hour. (Lovely with beans)

title: Steamed Brown Bread 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups Indian meal
- 1 1/2 cups rye meal
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 2 cups sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Mix all together
2. Pour in a dish and steam 3 hours
3. When taken off put in the oven for 15 minutes

title: Steamed Brown Bread 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups cornmeal
- 1 1/2 cups sweet milk
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Mix all together
2. Steam 3 1/2 hours

title: Steamed Brown Bread Rolls
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 2 1/2 cups buttermilk
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 3 cups Graham flour
- white flour

## Directions

1. Beat 1/2 cup sugar and 1 egg together
2. Add 2 1/2 cups buttermilk, 1 teaspoon salt, 1 teaspoon soda, 3 cups Graham flour and enough white flour to make a stiff batter
3. Have ready 4 one-pound baking powder cans, well greased, lids and all
4. Fill the cans half-full of Graham batter
5. Put on lids and steam 2 1/2 hours
6. Remove from steamer and set in oven for 15 minutes with lids off
7. Turn upside down and with a little shaking turn out on a board

title: Steamed Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1 cup currants
- 1 cup raisins
- 2 tablespoons molasses
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 teaspoon mixed spice
- 1 heaping teaspoon baking soda
- 2 teaspoons vinegar
- buttermilk
- flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs, sugar, and butter well together
